title: How to Train Your MAML to Excel in Few-Shot Classification
title_zh: 如何训练 MAML 在少样本分类中表现出色
comment: Accepted to International Conference on Learning Representations 2022 (ICLR 2022)
comments: Accepted to International Conference on Learning Representations 2022 (ICLR 2022)
abstract: Model-agnostic meta-learning (MAML) is arguably one of the most popular meta-learning algorithms nowadays. Nevertheless, its performance on few-shot classification is far behind many recent algorithms dedicated to the problem. In this paper, we point out several key facets of how to train MAML to excel in few-shot classification. First, we find that MAML needs a large number of gradient steps in its inner loop update, which contradicts its common usage in few-shot classification. Second, we find that MAML is sensitive to the class label assignments during meta-testing. Concretely, MAML meta-trains the initialization of an $N$-way classifier. These $N$ ways, during meta-testing, then have "$N!$" different permutations to be paired with a few-shot task of $N$ novel classes. We find that these permutations lead to a huge variance of accuracy, making MAML unstable in few-shot classification. Third, we investigate several approaches to make MAML permutation-invariant, among which meta-training a single vector to initialize all the $N$ weight vectors in the classification head performs the best. On benchmark datasets like MiniImageNet and TieredImageNet, our approach, which we name UNICORN-MAML, performs on a par with or even outperforms many recent few-shot classification algorithms, without sacrificing MAML's simplicity.

Nevertheless, its performance on few-shot classification is far behind many recent algorithms dedicated to the problem. First, we find that MAML needs a large number of gradient steps in its inner loop update, which contradicts its common usage in few-shot classification. Second, we find that MAML is sensitive to the class label assignments during meta-testing. Concretely, MAML meta-trains the initialization of an $N$-way classifier. These $N$ ways, during meta-testing, then have "$N!$" different permutations to be paired with a few-shot task of $N$ novel classes. We find that these permutations lead to a huge variance of accuracy, making MAML unstable in few-shot classification. Third, we investigate several approaches to make MAML permutation-invariant, among which meta-training a single vector to initialize all the $N$ weight vectors in the classification head performs the best. On benchmark datasets like MiniImageNet and TieredImageNet, our approach, which we name UNICORN-MAML, performs on a par with or even outperforms many recent few-shot classification algorithms, without sacrificing MAML's simplicity.
abstract_zh: 模型无关元学习（MAML）可以说是当今最流行的元学习算法之一。然而，它在少样本分类上的性能远远落后于许多专门解决该问题的最新算法。在本文中，我们指出了如何训练 MAML 以在少样本分类中表现出色的几个关键方面。首先，我们发现 MAML 在内循环更新中需要大量梯度步骤，这与其在少样本分类中的常见用法相矛盾。其次，我们发现 MAML 对元测试期间的类标签分配很敏感。具体来说，MAML 元训练 $N$ 路分类器的初始化。在元测试期间，这些 $N$ 方式将具有“$N!$”种不同的排列，与 $N$ 新颖类的几次任务配对。我们发现这些排列会导致准确性的巨大差异，使得 MAML 在少样本分类中不稳定。第三，我们研究了几种使 MAML 排列不变的方法，其中元训练单个向量来初始化分类头中的所有 $N$ 权重向量效果最好。在 MiniImageNet 和 TieredImageNet 等基准数据集上，我们的方法（我们将其命名为 UNICORN-MAML）的性能与许多最近的小样本分类算法相当甚至优于许多最近的小样本分类算法，而不会牺牲 MAML 的简单性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进训练方法，使MAML在少样本分类任务中表现更优。
AI.motivation: 尽管MAML是主流元学习算法，但其在少样本分类中的性能远低于专用算法，需解决其训练中的关键问题。
AI.method: 提出UNICORN-MAML方法，包括增加内循环梯度步数、解决类别标签排列敏感性问题，并通过元训练单一向量初始化分类头。
AI.result: 在MiniImageNet和TieredImageNet数据集上，UNICORN-MAML性能与或优于现有算法，且保持MAML的简洁性。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化梯度更新策略和排列不变性设计，UNICORN-MAML显著提升了MAML在少样本分类中的稳定性与效果。

authors_text: Himanshu Arora,Saurabh Mishra,Shichong Peng,Ke Li,Ali Mahdavi-Amiri
title: Multimodal Shape Completion via IMLE
title_zh: 通过 IMLE 进行多模式形状补全
abstract: Shape completion is the problem of completing partial input shapes such as partial scans. This problem finds important applications in computer vision and robotics due to issues such as occlusion or sparsity in real-world data. However, most of the existing research related to shape completion has been focused on completing shapes by learning a one-to-one mapping which limits the diversity and creativity of the produced results. We propose a novel multimodal shape completion technique that is effectively able to learn a one-to-many mapping and generates diverse complete shapes. Our approach is based on the conditional Implicit MaximumLikelihood Estimation (IMLE) technique wherein we condition our inputs on partial 3D point clouds. We extensively evaluate our approach by comparing it to various baselines both quantitatively and qualitatively. We show that our method is superior to alternatives in terms of completeness and diversity of shapes.
summary: Shape completion is the problem of completing partial input shapes such as partial scans. This problem finds important applications in computer vision and robotics due to issues such as occlusion or sparsity in real-world data. However, most of the existing research related to shape completion has been focused on completing shapes by learning a one-to-one mapping which limits the diversity and creativity of the produced results. We propose a novel multimodal shape completion technique that is effectively able to learn a one-to-many mapping and generates diverse complete shapes. Our approach is based on the conditional Implicit MaximumLikelihood Estimation (IMLE) technique wherein we condition our inputs on partial 3D point clouds. We extensively evaluate our approach by comparing it to various baselines both quantitatively and qualitatively. We show that our method is superior to alternatives in terms of completeness and diversity of shapes.
abstract_zh: 形状完成是完成部分输入形状（例如部分扫描）的问题。由于现实世界数据中的遮挡或稀疏等问题，该问题在计算机视觉和机器人技术中具有重要的应用。然而，现有的大多数与形状完成相关的研究都集中在通过学习一对一映射来完成形状，这限制了生成结果的多样性和创造力。我们提出了一种新颖的多模态形状完成技术，该技术能够有效地学习一对多映射并生成不同的完整形状。我们的方法基于条件隐式最大似然估计 (IMLE) 技术，其中我们在部分 3D 点云上调节输入。我们通过将其与各种基线进行定量和定性比较来广泛评估我们的方法。我们表明，我们的方法在形状的完整性和多样性方面优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件隐式最大似然估计（IMLE）的多模态形状补全方法，解决部分3D点云数据的完整形状生成问题。
AI.motivation: 现有形状补全方法受限于一对一映射，生成结果缺乏多样性与创造性，难以应对现实场景中遮挡与数据稀疏性问题。
AI.method: 通过条件IMLE技术，以部分3D点云为输入，学习从单个输入到多种可能完整形状的映射，实现多模态生成。
AI.result: 在定量与定性评估中，该方法在形状完整性与多样性指标上均优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了形状补全的多样性与完整性，为复杂场景下的3D重建提供了新思路。

title: Long Short-term Cognitive Networks
title_zh: 长短期认知网络
abstract: In this paper, we present a recurrent neural system named Long Short-term Cognitive Networks (LSTCNs) as a generalization of the Short-term Cognitive Network (STCN) model. Such a generalization is motivated by the difficulty of forecasting very long time series efficiently. The LSTCN model can be defined as a collection of STCN blocks, each processing a specific time patch of the (multivariate) time series being modeled. In this neural ensemble, each block passes information to the subsequent one in the form of weight matrices representing the prior knowledge. As a second contribution, we propose a deterministic learning algorithm to compute the learnable weights while preserving the prior knowledge resulting from previous learning processes. As a third contribution, we introduce a feature influence score as a proxy to explain the forecasting process in multivariate time series. The simulations using three case studies show that our neural system reports small forecasting errors while being significantly faster than state-of-the-art recurrent models.
summary: In this paper, we present a recurrent neural system named Long Short-term Cognitive Networks (LSTCNs) as a generalization of the Short-term Cognitive Network (STCN) model. Such a generalization is motivated by the difficulty of forecasting very long time series efficiently. The LSTCN model can be defined as a collection of STCN blocks, each processing a specific time patch of the (multivariate) time series being modeled. In this neural ensemble, each block passes information to the subsequent one in the form of weight matrices representing the prior knowledge. As a second contribution, we propose a deterministic learning algorithm to compute the learnable weights while preserving the prior knowledge resulting from previous learning processes. As a third contribution, we introduce a feature influence score as a proxy to explain the forecasting process in multivariate time series. The simulations using three case studies show that our neural system reports small forecasting errors while being significantly faster than state-of-the-art recurrent models.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种名为长短期认知网络（LSTCN）的循环神经系统，作为短期认知网络（STCN）模型的推广。这种概括是由于有效预测很长的时间序列的困难而产生的。 LSTCN 模型可以定义为 STCN 块的集合，每个块处理正在建模的（多元）时间序列的特定时间补丁。在这个神经集合中，每个块以代表先验知识的权重矩阵的形式将信息传递给后续块。作为第二个贡献，我们提出了一种确定性学习算法来计算可学习权重，同时保留先前学习过程产生的先验知识。作为第三个贡献，我们引入了特征影响分数作为代理来解释多元时间序列的预测过程。使用三个案例研究的模拟表明，我们的神经系统报告的预测误差很小，同时比最先进的循环模型快得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为长短期认知网络（LSTCN）的循环神经网络模型，用于改进多变量时间序列的长期预测。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在处理非常长时间序列的高效预测方面存在困难，需改进模型以提升预测精度和效率。
AI.method: 通过集合多个短时认知网络（STCN）模块处理时间片段，利用权重矩阵传递先验知识，并设计确定性学习算法与特征影响评分解释预测过程。
AI.result: 三个案例研究显示，该模型在预测误差较小的同时，显著快于现有最先进的循环模型。
AI.conclusion: LSTCN通过模块化设计和知识传递机制，在长期时间序列预测任务中实现了高精度与高效率的平衡。

result: 三个案例研究显示，该模型在预测误差较小的同时，显著快于现有最先进的循环模型。
conclusion: LSTCN通过模块化设计和知识传递机制，在长期时间序列预测任务中实现了高精度与高效率的平衡。
search_text: Long Short-term Cognitive Networks 长短期认知网络 In this paper, we present a recurrent neural system named Long Short-term Cognitive Networks (LSTCNs) as a generalization of the Short-term Cognitive Network (STCN) model. Such a generalization is motivated by the difficulty of forecasting very long time series efficiently. The LSTCN model can be defined as a collection of STCN blocks, each processing a specific time patch of the (multivariate) time series being modeled. In this neural ensemble, each block passes information to the subsequent one in the form of weight matrices representing the prior knowledge. As a second contribution, we propose a deterministic learning algorithm to compute the learnable weights while preserving the prior knowledge resulting from previous learning processes. As a third contribution, we introduce a feature influence score as a proxy to explain the forecasting process in multivariate time series. The simulations using three case studies show that our neural system reports small forecasting errors while being significantly faster than state-of-the-art recurrent models. 在本文中，我们提出了一种名为长短期认知网络（LSTCN）的循环神经系统，作为短期认知网络（STCN）模型的推广。这种概括是由于有效预测很长的时间序列的困难而产生的。 LSTCN 模型可以定义为 STCN 块的集合，每个块处理正在建模的（多元）时间序列的特定时间补丁。在这个神经集合中，每个块以代表先验知识的权重矩阵的形式将信息传递给后续块。作为第二个贡献，我们提出了一种确定性学习算法来计算可学习权重，同时保留先前学习过程产生的先验知识。作为第三个贡献，我们引入了特征影响分数作为代理来解释多元时间序列的预测过程。使用三个案例研究的模拟表明，我们的神经系统报告的预测误差很小，同时比最先进的循环模型快得多。 本文提出了一种名为长短期认知网络（LSTCN）的循环神经网络模型，用于改进多变量时间序列的长期预测。 Gonzalo Nápoles,Isel Grau,Agnieszka Jastrzebska,Yamisleydi Salgueiro cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Analytic Insights into Structure and Rank of Neural Network Hessian Maps
title_zh: 对神经网络 Hessian 映射的结构和排序的分析见解
abstract: The Hessian of a neural network captures parameter interactions through second-order derivatives of the loss. It is a fundamental object of study, closely tied to various problems in deep learning, including model design, optimization, and generalization. Most prior work has been empirical, typically focusing on low-rank approximations and heuristics that are blind to the network structure. In contrast, we develop theoretical tools to analyze the range of the Hessian map, providing us with a precise understanding of its rank deficiency as well as the structural reasons behind it. This yields exact formulas and tight upper bounds for the Hessian rank of deep linear networks, allowing for an elegant interpretation in terms of rank deficiency. Moreover, we demonstrate that our bounds remain faithful as an estimate of the numerical Hessian rank, for a larger class of models such as rectified and hyperbolic tangent networks. Further, we also investigate the implications of model architecture (e.g.~width, depth, bias) on the rank deficiency. Overall, our work provides novel insights into the source and extent of redundancy in overparameterized networks.
summary: The Hessian of a neural network captures parameter interactions through second-order derivatives of the loss. It is a fundamental object of study, closely tied to various problems in deep learning, including model design, optimization, and generalization. Most prior work has been empirical, typically focusing on low-rank approximations and heuristics that are blind to the network structure. In contrast, we develop theoretical tools to analyze the range of the Hessian map, providing us with a precise understanding of its rank deficiency as well as the structural reasons behind it. This yields exact formulas and tight upper bounds for the Hessian rank of deep linear networks, allowing for an elegant interpretation in terms of rank deficiency. Moreover, we demonstrate that our bounds remain faithful as an estimate of the numerical Hessian rank, for a larger class of models such as rectified and hyperbolic tangent networks. Further, we also investigate the implications of model architecture (e.g.~width, depth, bias) on the rank deficiency. Overall, our work provides novel insights into the source and extent of redundancy in overparameterized networks.
abstract_zh: 神经网络的 Hessian 矩阵通过损失的二阶导数捕获参数相互作用。它是一个基本的研究对象，与深度学习中的各种问题密切相关，包括模型设计、优化和泛化。大多数先前的工作都是经验性的，通常侧重于对网络结构视而不见的低秩近似和启发式方法。相比之下，我们开发了理论工具来分析 Hessian 地图的范围，使我们能够准确理解其等级缺陷及其背后的结构原因。这为深度线性网络的 Hessian 秩产生了精确的公式和严格的上限，从而可以对秩不足进行优雅的解释。此外，我们证明，对于更大类的模型（例如整流网络和双曲正切网络），我们的界限作为数值 Hessian 秩的估计仍然可靠。此外，我们还研究了模型架构（例如宽度、深度、偏差）对排名不足的影响。总的来说，我们的工作为过度参数化网络中冗余的来源和程度提供了新颖的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文通过理论分析揭示神经网络Hessian矩阵的结构特性与秩缺陷，提供精确的数学解释和通用模型的秩估计方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多依赖经验性低秩近似，缺乏对网络结构导致Hessian秩缺陷的理论理解，限制了模型优化与泛化能力的深入分析。
AI.method: 构建理论框架分析Hessian映射的值域，结合深度线性网络的精确秩公式推导，验证其在ReLU/双曲正切网络中的适用性，并量化架构参数对秩的影响。
AI.result: 获得深度线性网络Hessian秩的精确表达式与紧上界，证明该理论界可有效估计更广泛模型的数值秩，揭示网络宽度/深度/偏置对秩缺陷的定量影响规律。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析阐明了过参数化网络冗余的根源，为设计高效模型架构和优化算法提供了结构化视角与数学工具。

title: Algorithm For 3D-Chemotaxis Using Spiking Neural Network
title_zh: 使用尖峰神经网络的 3D 趋化算法
comment: 12 pages, 8 figures, accepted for the '30th International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks, ICANN2021'
comments: 12 pages, 8 figures, accepted for the '30th International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks, ICANN2021'
abstract: In this work, we aim to devise an end-to-end spiking implementation for contour tracking in 3D media inspired by chemotaxis, where the worm reaches the region which has the given set concentration. For a planer medium, efficient contour tracking algorithms have already been devised, but a new degree of freedom has quite a few challenges. Here we devise an algorithm based on klinokinesis - where the motion of the worm is in response to the stimuli but not proportional to it. Thus the path followed is not the shortest, but we can track the set concentration successfully. We are using simple LIF neurons for the neural network implementation, considering the feasibility of its implementation in the neuromorphic computing hardware.
summary: In this work, we aim to devise an end-to-end spiking implementation for contour tracking in 3D media inspired by chemotaxis, where the worm reaches the region which has the given set concentration. For a planer medium, efficient contour tracking algorithms have already been devised, but a new degree of freedom has quite a few challenges. Here we devise an algorithm based on klinokinesis - where the motion of the worm is in response to the stimuli but not proportional to it. Thus the path followed is not the shortest, but we can track the set concentration successfully. We are using simple LIF neurons for the neural network implementation, considering the feasibility of its implementation in the neuromorphic computing hardware.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们的目标是受趋化性的启发，设计一种用于 3D 媒体中轮廓跟踪的端到端尖峰实现，其中蠕虫到达具有给定设定浓度的区域。对于平面介质，已经设计出高效的轮廓跟踪算法，但新的自由度面临不少挑战。在这里，我们设计了一种基于运动的算法 - 蠕虫的运动响应于刺激，但与刺激不成比例。因此所遵循的路径不是最短的，但我们可以成功地跟踪设定的浓度。考虑到其在神经形态计算硬件中实现的可行性，我们使用简单的 LIF 神经元来实现神经网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于脉冲神经网络的3D趋化算法，用于实现3D介质中的轮廓跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有2D轮廓跟踪算法难以直接扩展到3D场景，而3D趋化运动在生物和工程领域具有重要应用价值，需探索新的实现方法。
AI.method: 采用klinokinesis机制设计运动响应模型，结合LIF神经元构建脉冲神经网络，并适配神经形态计算硬件的实现需求。
AI.result: 成功实现了3D浓度场中的轨迹跟踪，验证了非最短路径策略的有效性，且神经网络结构具备硬件部署可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂介质中的趋化运动提供了新的计算范式，展示了脉冲神经网络在生物启发算法中的潜力。

authors_text: Lars Schmarje,Monty Santarossa,Simon-Martin Schröder,Claudius Zelenka,Rainer Kiko,Jenny Stracke,Nina Volkmann,Reinhard Koch
title: A data-centric approach for improving ambiguous labels with combined semi-supervised classification and clustering
title_zh: 一种以数据为中心的方法，通过结合半监督分类和聚类来改善模糊标签
comment: Source code is available at https://github.com/Emprime/dc3, Datasets available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.5550916
comments: Source code is available at https://github.com/Emprime/dc3, Datasets available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.5550916
abstract: Consistently high data quality is essential for the development of novel loss functions and architectures in the field of deep learning. The existence of such data and labels is usually presumed, while acquiring high-quality datasets is still a major issue in many cases. In real-world datasets we often encounter ambiguous labels due to subjective annotations by annotators. In our data-centric approach, we propose a method to relabel such ambiguous labels instead of implementing the handling of this issue in a neural network. A hard classification is by definition not enough to capture the real-world ambiguity of the data. Therefore, we propose our method "Data-Centric Classification & Clustering (DC3)" which combines semi-supervised classification and clustering. It automatically estimates the ambiguity of an image and performs a classification or clustering depending on that ambiguity. DC3 is general in nature so that it can be used in addition to many Semi-Supervised Learning (SSL) algorithms. On average, this results in a 7.6% better F1-Score for classifications and 7.9% lower inner distance of clusters across multiple evaluated SSL algorithms and datasets. Most importantly, we give a proof-of-concept that the classifications and clusterings from DC3 are beneficial as proposals for the manual refinement of such ambiguous labels. Overall, a combination of SSL with our method DC3 can lead to better handling of ambiguous labels during the annotation process.
summary: Consistently high data quality is essential for the development of novel loss functions and architectures in the field of deep learning. The existence of such data and labels is usually presumed, while acquiring high-quality datasets is still a major issue in many cases. In real-world datasets we often encounter ambiguous labels due to subjective annotations by annotators. In our data-centric approach, we propose a method to relabel such ambiguous labels instead of implementing the handling of this issue in a neural network. A hard classification is by definition not enough to capture the real-world ambiguity of the data. Therefore, we propose our method "Data-Centric Classification & Clustering (DC3)" which combines semi-supervised classification and clustering. It automatically estimates the ambiguity of an image and performs a classification or clustering depending on that ambiguity. DC3 is general in nature so that it can be used in addition to many Semi-Supervised Learning (SSL) algorithms. On average, this results in a 7.6% better F1-Score for classifications and 7.9% lower inner distance of clusters across multiple evaluated SSL algorithms and datasets. Most importantly, we give a proof-of-concept that the classifications and clusterings from DC3 are beneficial as proposals for the manual refinement of such ambiguous labels. Overall, a combination of SSL with our method DC3 can lead to better handling of ambiguous labels during the annotation process.
abstract_zh: 始终如一的高数据质量对于深度学习领域新型损失函数和架构的开发至关重要。通常假设此类数据和标签的存在，但在许多情况下获取高质量数据集仍然是一个主要问题。在现实世界的数据集中，由于注释者的主观注释，我们经常遇到不明确的标签。在我们以数据为中心的方法中，我们提出了一种重新标记此类模糊标签的方法，而不是在神经网络中实现此问题的处理。根据定义，硬分类不足以捕捉现实世界中数据的模糊性。因此，我们提出了结合半监督分类和聚类的“以数据为中心的分类和聚类（DC3）”方法。它自动估计图像的模糊性，并根据该模糊性执行分类或聚类。 DC3 本质上是通用的，因此除了许多半监督学习 (SSL) 算法之外还可以使用它。平均而言，在多个评估的 SSL 算法和数据集中，分类 F1 分数提高了 7.6%，簇内部距离降低了 7.9%。最重要的是，我们给出了一个概念证明，即 DC3 的分类和聚类对于手动细化此类模糊标签是有益的。总的来说，SSL 与我们的方法 DC3 的结合可以在注释过程中更好地处理不明确的标签。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的方法DC3，结合半监督分类与聚类以改善真实数据集中的模糊标签问题。
AI.motivation: 高质量数据是深度学习模型发展的基础，但实际数据集中常因标注者主观性导致标签模糊，现有方法多依赖神经网络处理而非直接优化数据质量。
AI.method: DC3方法通过半监督分类与聚类的结合，自动评估图像模糊度并据此选择分类或聚类策略，可兼容多种半监督学习算法。
AI.result: 在多数据集和SSL算法上，DC3使分类F1-Score平均提升7.6%，聚类内部距离降低7.9%，且其输出可作为人工修正标签的参考依据。
AI.conclusion: DC3通过数据层面的模糊标签优化，为半监督学习提供了更可靠的标注改进方案，证明了数据驱动策略在提升模型性能中的有效性。

search_text: A data-centric approach for improving ambiguous labels with combined semi-supervised classification and clustering 一种以数据为中心的方法，通过结合半监督分类和聚类来改善模糊标签 Consistently high data quality is essential for the development of novel loss functions and architectures in the field of deep learning. The existence of such data and labels is usually presumed, while acquiring high-quality datasets is still a major issue in many cases. In real-world datasets we often encounter ambiguous labels due to subjective annotations by annotators. In our data-centric approach, we propose a method to relabel such ambiguous labels instead of implementing the handling of this issue in a neural network. A hard classification is by definition not enough to capture the real-world ambiguity of the data. Therefore, we propose our method "Data-Centric Classification & Clustering (DC3)" which combines semi-supervised classification and clustering. It automatically estimates the ambiguity of an image and performs a classification or clustering depending on that ambiguity. DC3 is general in nature so that it can be used in addition to many Semi-Supervised Learning (SSL) algorithms. On average, this results in a 7.6% better F1-Score for classifications and 7.9% lower inner distance of clusters across multiple evaluated SSL algorithms and datasets. Most importantly, we give a proof-of-concept that the classifications and clusterings from DC3 are beneficial as proposals for the manual refinement of such ambiguous labels. Overall, a combination of SSL with our method DC3 can lead to better handling of ambiguous labels during the annotation process. 始终如一的高数据质量对于深度学习领域新型损失函数和架构的开发至关重要。通常假设此类数据和标签的存在，但在许多情况下获取高质量数据集仍然是一个主要问题。在现实世界的数据集中，由于注释者的主观注释，我们经常遇到不明确的标签。在我们以数据为中心的方法中，我们提出了一种重新标记此类模糊标签的方法，而不是在神经网络中实现此问题的处理。根据定义，硬分类不足以捕捉现实世界中数据的模糊性。因此，我们提出了结合半监督分类和聚类的“以数据为中心的分类和聚类（DC3）”方法。它自动估计图像的模糊性，并根据该模糊性执行分类或聚类。 DC3 本质上是通用的，因此除了许多半监督学习 (SSL) 算法之外还可以使用它。平均而言，在多个评估的 SSL 算法和数据集中，分类 F1 分数提高了 7.6%，簇内部距离降低了 7.9%。最重要的是，我们给出了一个概念证明，即 DC3 的分类和聚类对于手动细化此类模糊标签是有益的。总的来说，SSL 与我们的方法 DC3 的结合可以在注释过程中更好地处理不明确的标签。 本文提出了一种数据驱动的方法DC3，结合半监督分类与聚类以改善真实数据集中的模糊标签问题。 Lars Schmarje,Monty Santarossa,Simon-Martin Schröder,Claudius Zelenka,Rainer Kiko,Jenny Stracke,Nina Volkmann,Reinhard Koch cs.CV

authors_text: Spandan Madan,Tomotake Sasaki,Hanspeter Pfister,Tzu-Mao Li,Xavier Boix
title: In-distribution adversarial attacks on object recognition models using gradient-free search
title_zh: 使用无梯度搜索对对象识别模型进行分布对抗攻击
abstract: Neural networks are susceptible to small perturbations in the form of 2D rotations and shifts, image crops, and even changes in object colors. Past works attribute these errors to dataset bias, claiming that models fail on these perturbed samples as they do not belong to the training data distribution. Here, we challenge this claim and present evidence of the widespread existence of perturbed images within the training data distribution, which networks fail to classify. We train models on data sampled from parametric distributions, then search inside this data distribution to find such in-distribution adversarial examples. This is done using our gradient-free evolution strategies (ES) based approach which we call CMA-Search. Despite training with a large-scale (0.5 million images), unbiased dataset of camera and light variations, CMA-Search can find a failure inside the data distribution in over 71% cases by perturbing the camera position. With lighting changes, CMA-Search finds misclassifications in 42% cases. These findings also extend to natural images from ImageNet and Co3D datasets. This phenomenon of in-distribution images presents a highly worrisome problem for artificial intelligence -- they bypass the need for a malicious agent to add engineered noise to induce an adversarial attack. All code, datasets, and demos are available at https://github.com/Spandan-Madan/in_distribution_adversarial_examples.
summary: Neural networks are susceptible to small perturbations in the form of 2D rotations and shifts, image crops, and even changes in object colors. Past works attribute these errors to dataset bias, claiming that models fail on these perturbed samples as they do not belong to the training data distribution. Here, we challenge this claim and present evidence of the widespread existence of perturbed images within the training data distribution, which networks fail to classify. We train models on data sampled from parametric distributions, then search inside this data distribution to find such in-distribution adversarial examples. This is done using our gradient-free evolution strategies (ES) based approach which we call CMA-Search. Despite training with a large-scale (0.5 million images), unbiased dataset of camera and light variations, CMA-Search can find a failure inside the data distribution in over 71% cases by perturbing the camera position. With lighting changes, CMA-Search finds misclassifications in 42% cases. These findings also extend to natural images from ImageNet and Co3D datasets. This phenomenon of in-distribution images presents a highly worrisome problem for artificial intelligence -- they bypass the need for a malicious agent to add engineered noise to induce an adversarial attack. All code, datasets, and demos are available at https://github.com/Spandan-Madan/in_distribution_adversarial_examples.
abstract_zh: 神经网络很容易受到二维旋转和移位、图像裁剪、甚至物体颜色变化等小扰动的影响。过去的工作将这些错误归因于数据集偏差，声称模型在这些扰动样本上失败，因为它们不属于训练数据分布。在这里，我们挑战了这一说法，并提供了训练数据分布中广泛存在扰动图像的证据，而网络无法对其进行分类。我们使用从参数分布中采样的数据来训练模型，然后在该数据分布内部进行搜索以找到此类分布内的对抗性示例。这是使用我们基于无梯度进化策略 (ES) 的方法（我们称之为 CMA-Search）来完成的。尽管使用大规模（50 万张图像）、相机和光线变化的无偏差数据集进行训练，CMA-Search 仍然可以通过扰动相机位置在超过 71% 的情况下发现数据分布中的故障。随着照明的变化，CMA-Search 在 42% 的情况下发现了错误分类。这些发现还扩展到 ImageNet 和 Co3D 数据集的自然图像。这种分发图像的现象给人工智能带来了一个非常令人担忧的问题——它们绕过了恶意代理添加工程噪声来引发对抗性攻击的需要。所有代码、数据集和演示均可在 https://github.com/Spandan-Madan/in_distribution_adversarial_examples 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需梯度的进化策略方法CMA-Search，在数据分布内搜索针对物体识别模型的对抗样本。
AI.motivation: 挑战传统观点认为模型在分布外样本上出错是由于数据偏差，证明分布内也存在对抗样本并威胁AI可靠性。
AI.method: 基于无梯度进化策略（CMA-Search）在参数化数据分布中搜索对抗样本，通过扰动相机位置和光照条件生成误导样本。
AI.result: 在50万张无偏数据集上，71%的样本通过相机位置扰动触发错误，42%通过光照变化触发；结果在ImageNet和Co3D数据集上同样有效。
AI.conclusion: 分布内对抗样本的存在表明AI系统存在严重安全隐患，无需外部噪声即可被攻击，需重新审视模型鲁棒性设计。

This phenomenon of in-distribution images presents a highly worrisome problem for artificial intelligence -- they bypass the need for a malicious agent to add engineered noise to induce an adversarial attack. title: Grid Recognition: Classical and Parameterized Computational Perspectives
title_zh: 网格识别：经典和参数化计算视角
abstract: Grid graphs, and, more generally, $k\times r$ grid graphs, form one of the most basic classes of geometric graphs. Over the past few decades, a large body of works studied the (in)tractability of various computational problems on grid graphs, which often yield substantially faster algorithms than general graphs. Unfortunately, the recognition of a grid graph is particularly hard -- it was shown to be NP-hard even on trees of pathwidth 3 already in 1987. Yet, in this paper, we provide several positive results in this regard in the framework of parameterized complexity (additionally, we present new and complementary hardness results). Specifically, our contribution is threefold. First, we show that the problem is fixed-parameter tractable (FPT) parameterized by $k+\mathsf {mcc}$ where $\mathsf{mcc}$ is the maximum size of a connected component of $G$. This also implies that the problem is FPT parameterized by $\mathtt{td}+k$ where $\mathtt{td}$ is the treedepth of $G$ (to be compared with the hardness for pathwidth 2 where $k=3$). Further, we derive as a corollary that strip packing is FPT with respect to the height of the strip plus the maximum of the dimensions of the packed rectangles, which was previously only known to be in XP. Second, we present a new parameterization, denoted $a_G$, relating graph distance to geometric distance, which may be of independent interest. We show that the problem is para-NP-hard parameterized by $a_G$, but FPT parameterized by $a_G$ on trees, as well as FPT parameterized by $k+a_G$. Third, we show that the recognition of $k\times r$ grid graphs is NP-hard on graphs of pathwidth 2 where $k=3$. Moreover, when $k$ and $r$ are unrestricted, we show that the problem is NP-hard on trees of pathwidth 2, but trivially solvable in polynomial time on graphs of pathwidth 1.

Third, we show that the recognition of $k\times r$ grid graphs is NP-hard on graphs of pathwidth 2 where $k=3$. Moreover, when $k$ and $r$ are unrestricted, we show that the problem is NP-hard on trees of pathwidth 2, but trivially solvable in polynomial time on graphs of pathwidth 1.
abstract_zh: 网格图，更一般地说，$k\times r$ 网格图，构成了最基本的几何图类之一。在过去的几十年里，大量的工作研究了网格图上各种计算问题的可处理性，这些计算问题通常比一般图产生更快的算法。不幸的是，网格图的识别特别困难——即使在 1987 年，即使在路径宽度为 3 的树上，它也被证明是 NP 困难的。然而，在本文中，我们在参数化复杂性的框架中提供了这方面的一些积极结果（此外，我们提出了新的和补充的硬度结果）。具体来说，我们的贡献是三重的。首先，我们证明该问题是由 $k+\mathsf {mcc}$ 参数化的固定参数易处理（FPT）问题，其中 $\mathsf{mcc}$ 是 $G$ 的连通分量的最大大小。这也意味着问题是由 $\mathtt{td}+k$ 参数化的 FPT，其中 $\mathtt{td}$ 是 $G$ 的树深度（与路径宽度 2 的硬度进行比较，其中 $k=3$）。此外，我们得出的推论是，条带打包是 FPT，相对于条带的高度加上打包矩形的最大尺寸，这之前只知道在 XP 中。其次，我们提出了一种新的参数化，表示为 $a_G$，将图形距离与几何距离相关联，这可能是独立的兴趣。我们证明该问题是由 $a_G$ 参数化的准 NP 困难问题，但在树上由 $a_G$ 参数化 FPT，以及由 $k+a_G$ 参数化的 FPT。第三，我们表明，在路径宽度为 2（其中 $k=3$）的图上，$k\times r$ 网格图的识别是 NP 困难的。此外，当 $k$ 和 $r$ 不受限制时，我们表明该问题在路径宽度为 2 的树上是 NP 困难的，但在路径宽度为 1 的图上可以在多项式时间内轻松解决。

AI.tldr: 本文研究网格图识别问题的计算复杂性，从经典和参数化计算视角提供新结果。
AI.motivation: 网格图识别在经典计算中已被证明是NP难问题，但参数化复杂性框架下可能存在更高效的解决方案，需探索其参数化可解性。
AI.method: 通过参数化复杂性分析，引入新参数（如mcc、treedepth、a_G），结合归约与组合优化技术，研究问题在不同参数下的复杂性边界。
AI.result: 证明网格图识别在k+mcc参数下FPT，提出a_G参数的para-NP难性及树结构下的FPT性，并展示路径宽度2树上的NP难性及条带装箱问题的FPT新结果。
AI.conclusion: 参数化方法为网格图识别提供了新的可解性视角，部分参数下问题可高效求解，但某些结构下仍保持NP难性，深化了对几何图计算复杂性的理解。

search_text: Grid Recognition: Classical and Parameterized Computational Perspectives 网格识别：经典和参数化计算视角 Grid graphs, and, more generally, $k\times r$ grid graphs, form one of the most basic classes of geometric graphs. Over the past few decades, a large body of works studied the (in)tractability of various computational problems on grid graphs, which often yield substantially faster algorithms than general graphs. Unfortunately, the recognition of a grid graph is particularly hard -- it was shown to be NP-hard even on trees of pathwidth 3 already in 1987. Yet, in this paper, we provide several positive results in this regard in the framework of parameterized complexity (additionally, we present new and complementary hardness results). Specifically, our contribution is threefold. First, we show that the problem is fixed-parameter tractable (FPT) parameterized by $k+\mathsf {mcc}$ where $\mathsf{mcc}$ is the maximum size of a connected component of $G$. This also implies that the problem is FPT parameterized by $\mathtt{td}+k$ where $\mathtt{td}$ is the treedepth of $G$ (to be compared with the hardness for pathwidth 2 where $k=3$). Further, we derive as a corollary that strip packing is FPT with respect to the height of the strip plus the maximum of the dimensions of the packed rectangles, which was previously only known to be in XP. Second, we present a new parameterization, denoted $a_G$, relating graph distance to geometric distance, which may be of independent interest. We show that the problem is para-NP-hard parameterized by $a_G$, but FPT parameterized by $a_G$ on trees, as well as FPT parameterized by $k+a_G$. Third, we show that the recognition of $k\times r$ grid graphs is NP-hard on graphs of pathwidth 2 where $k=3$. Moreover, when $k$ and $r$ are unrestricted, we show that the problem is NP-hard on trees of pathwidth 2, but trivially solvable in polynomial time on graphs of pathwidth 1. 网格图，更一般地说，$k\times r$ 网格图，构成了最基本的几何图类之一。在过去的几十年里，大量的工作研究了网格图上各种计算问题的可处理性，这些计算问题通常比一般图产生更快的算法。不幸的是，网格图的识别特别困难——即使在 1987 年，即使在路径宽度为 3 的树上，它也被证明是 NP 困难的。然而，在本文中，我们在参数化复杂性的框架中提供了这方面的一些积极结果（此外，我们提出了新的和补充的硬度结果）。具体来说，我们的贡献是三重的。首先，我们证明该问题是由 $k+\mathsf {mcc}$ 参数化的固定参数易处理（FPT）问题，其中 $\mathsf{mcc}$ 是 $G$ 的连通分量的最大大小。这也意味着问题是由 $\mathtt{td}+k$ 参数化的 FPT，其中 $\mathtt{td}$ 是 $G$ 的树深度（与路径宽度 2 的硬度进行比较，其中 $k=3$）。此外，我们得出的推论是，条带打包是 FPT，相对于条带的高度加上打包矩形的最大尺寸，这之前只知道在 XP 中。其次，我们提出了一种新的参数化，表示为 $a_G$，将图形距离与几何距离相关联，这可能是独立的兴趣。我们证明该问题是由 $a_G$ 参数化的准 NP 困难问题，但在树上由 $a_G$ 参数化 FPT，以及由 $k+a_G$ 参数化的 FPT。第三，我们表明，在路径宽度为 2（其中 $k=3$）的图上，$k\times r$ 网格图的识别是 NP 困难的。此外，当 $k$ 和 $r$ 不受限制时，我们表明该问题在路径宽度为 2 的树上是 NP 困难的，但在路径宽度为 1 的图上可以在多项式时间内轻松解决。 本文研究网格图识别问题的计算复杂性，从经典和参数化计算视角提供新结果。 Siddharth Gupta,Guy Sa'ar,Meirav Zehavi cs.DS

authors_text: Shamay G. Samuel,Enrique Areyan Viqueira,Serdar Kadioglu
title: Integrated Vehicle Routing and Monte Carlo Scheduling Approach for the Home Service Assignment, Routing, and Scheduling Problem
title_zh: 用于家庭服务分配、路由和调度问题的集成车辆路由和蒙特卡罗调度方法
abstract: We formulate and solve the H-SARA Problem, a Vehicle Routing and Appointment Scheduling Problem motivated by home services management. We assume that travel times, service durations, and customer cancellations are stochastic. We use a two-stage process that first generates teams and routes using a VRP Solver with optional extensions and then uses an MC Scheduler that determines expected arrival times by teams at customers. We further introduce two different models of cancellation and their associated impacts on routing and scheduling. Finally, we introduce the Route Fracture Metaheuristic that iteratively improves an H-SARA solution by replacing the worst-performing teams. We present insights into the problem and a series of numerical experiments that illustrate properties of the optimal routing, scheduling, and the impact of the Route Fracture Metaheuristic for both models of cancellation.
summary: We formulate and solve the H-SARA Problem, a Vehicle Routing and Appointment Scheduling Problem motivated by home services management. We assume that travel times, service durations, and customer cancellations are stochastic. We use a two-stage process that first generates teams and routes using a VRP Solver with optional extensions and then uses an MC Scheduler that determines expected arrival times by teams at customers. We further introduce two different models of cancellation and their associated impacts on routing and scheduling. Finally, we introduce the Route Fracture Metaheuristic that iteratively improves an H-SARA solution by replacing the worst-performing teams. We present insights into the problem and a series of numerical experiments that illustrate properties of the optimal routing, scheduling, and the impact of the Route Fracture Metaheuristic for both models of cancellation.
abstract_zh: 我们制定并解决了 H-SARA 问题，这是一个由家庭服务管理驱动的车辆路径和预约调度问题。我们假设行程时间、服务持续时间和客户取消是随机的。我们采用两阶段流程，首先使用带有可选扩展的 VRP 求解器生成团队和路线，然后使用 MC 调度程序确定团队预计到达客户的时间。我们进一步介绍两种不同的取消模型及其对路由和调度的相关影响。最后，我们引入了路由断裂元启发式算法，它通过替换表现最差的团队来迭代改进 H-SARA 解决方案。我们提出了对该问题的见解和一系列数值实验，这些实验说明了最佳路由、调度的属性以及路由断裂元启发式对两种取消模型的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种集成车辆路径规划与蒙特卡洛调度的方法，解决家庭服务中的任务分配、路径规划与时间安排问题。
AI.motivation: 家庭服务管理面临旅行时间、服务时长及客户取消等随机因素的挑战，需优化资源分配与调度策略以提高效率。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：首先通过VRP求解器生成团队与路线，再利用蒙特卡洛调度器计算预期到达时间；引入取消模型与Route Fracture元启发式算法迭代优化方案。
AI.result: 数值实验验证了方法的有效性，展示了最优路径特性、调度规律及取消模型对方案的影响，证明元启发式算法能显著提升解决方案质量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为处理家庭服务中的不确定性问题提供了有效框架，可为实际服务管理提供理论支持与实践指导。

authors_text: Pingjun Chen,Muhammad Aminu,Siba El Hussein,Joseph D. Khoury,Jia Wu
title: Hierarchical Phenotyping and Graph Modeling of Spatial Architecture in Lymphoid Neoplasms
title_zh: 淋巴肿瘤空间结构的分层表型和图形建模
abstract: The cells and their spatial patterns in the tumor microenvironment (TME) play a key role in tumor evolution, and yet the latter remains an understudied topic in computational pathology. This study, to the best of our knowledge, is among the first to hybridize local and global graph methods to profile orchestration and interaction of cellular components. To address the challenge in hematolymphoid cancers, where the cell classes in TME may be unclear, we first implemented cell-level unsupervised learning and identified two new cell subtypes. Local cell graphs or supercells were built for each image by considering the individual cell's geospatial location and classes. Then, we applied supercell level clustering and identified two new cell communities. In the end, we built global graphs to abstract spatial interaction patterns and extract features for disease diagnosis. We evaluate the proposed algorithm on H&E slides of 60 hematolymphoid neoplasms and further compared it with three cell level graph-based algorithms, including the global cell graph, cluster cell graph, and FLocK. The proposed algorithm achieved a mean diagnosis accuracy of 0.703 with the repeated 5-fold cross-validation scheme. In conclusion, our algorithm shows superior performance over the existing methods and can be potentially applied to other cancer types.
summary: The cells and their spatial patterns in the tumor microenvironment (TME) play a key role in tumor evolution, and yet the latter remains an understudied topic in computational pathology. This study, to the best of our knowledge, is among the first to hybridize local and global graph methods to profile orchestration and interaction of cellular components. To address the challenge in hematolymphoid cancers, where the cell classes in TME may be unclear, we first implemented cell-level unsupervised learning and identified two new cell subtypes. Local cell graphs or supercells were built for each image by considering the individual cell's geospatial location and classes. Then, we applied supercell level clustering and identified two new cell communities. In the end, we built global graphs to abstract spatial interaction patterns and extract features for disease diagnosis. We evaluate the proposed algorithm on H&E slides of 60 hematolymphoid neoplasms and further compared it with three cell level graph-based algorithms, including the global cell graph, cluster cell graph, and FLocK. The proposed algorithm achieved a mean diagnosis accuracy of 0.703 with the repeated 5-fold cross-validation scheme. In conclusion, our algorithm shows superior performance over the existing methods and can be potentially applied to other cancer types.
abstract_zh: 肿瘤微环境（TME）中的细胞及其空间模式在肿瘤进化中发挥着关键作用，但后者仍然是计算病理学中尚未得到充分研究的课题。据我们所知，这项研究是第一个混合局部和全局图方法来分析细胞组件的编排和交互的研究之一。为了解决血淋巴癌中的挑战（TME 中的细胞类别可能不清楚），我们首先实施了细胞水平的无监督学习并确定了两种新的细胞亚型。通过考虑单个细胞的地理空间位置和类别，为每个图像构建局部细胞图或超级细胞。然后，我们应用超细胞级别聚类并识别了两个新的细胞群落。最后，我们构建了全局图来抽象空间交互模式并提取疾病诊断的特征。我们在 60 个血淋巴肿瘤的 H&E 切片上评估了所提出的算法，并进一步将其与三种基于细胞级图的算法（包括全局细胞图、簇细胞图和 FlocK）进行了比较。所提出的算法通过重复的 5 倍交叉验证方案实现了 0.703 的平均诊断精度。总之，我们的算法显示出优于现有方法的性能，并且可以潜在地应用于其他癌症类型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合局部和全局图方法的算法，用于分析淋巴瘤肿瘤微环境中细胞的空间结构，以提高疾病诊断的准确性。
AI.motivation: 肿瘤微环境中细胞的空间模式对肿瘤演化至关重要，但现有方法难以同时捕捉局部与全局交互，尤其在血液淋巴瘤中细胞类型不明确的情况下。
AI.method: 通过无监督学习识别新细胞亚型，构建基于细胞地理位置和类别的局部图（超细胞），再进行聚类形成社区，最后建立全局图提取空间交互特征用于诊断。
AI.result: 在60例血液淋巴瘤的H&E切片上，该算法通过5折交叉验证实现平均诊断准确率0.703，优于现有三种基于图的算法。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在性能上优于现有方法，具有潜在的泛化能力，可应用于其他癌症类型的诊断分析。

search_text: Hierarchical Phenotyping and Graph Modeling of Spatial Architecture in Lymphoid Neoplasms 淋巴肿瘤空间结构的分层表型和图形建模 The cells and their spatial patterns in the tumor microenvironment (TME) play a key role in tumor evolution, and yet the latter remains an understudied topic in computational pathology. This study, to the best of our knowledge, is among the first to hybridize local and global graph methods to profile orchestration and interaction of cellular components. To address the challenge in hematolymphoid cancers, where the cell classes in TME may be unclear, we first implemented cell-level unsupervised learning and identified two new cell subtypes. Local cell graphs or supercells were built for each image by considering the individual cell's geospatial location and classes. Then, we applied supercell level clustering and identified two new cell communities. In the end, we built global graphs to abstract spatial interaction patterns and extract features for disease diagnosis. We evaluate the proposed algorithm on H&E slides of 60 hematolymphoid neoplasms and further compared it with three cell level graph-based algorithms, including the global cell graph, cluster cell graph, and FLocK. The proposed algorithm achieved a mean diagnosis accuracy of 0.703 with the repeated 5-fold cross-validation scheme. In conclusion, our algorithm shows superior performance over the existing methods and can be potentially applied to other cancer types. 肿瘤微环境（TME）中的细胞及其空间模式在肿瘤进化中发挥着关键作用，但后者仍然是计算病理学中尚未得到充分研究的课题。据我们所知，这项研究是第一个混合局部和全局图方法来分析细胞组件的编排和交互的研究之一。为了解决血淋巴癌中的挑战（TME 中的细胞类别可能不清楚），我们首先实施了细胞水平的无监督学习并确定了两种新的细胞亚型。通过考虑单个细胞的地理空间位置和类别，为每个图像构建局部细胞图或超级细胞。然后，我们应用超细胞级别聚类并识别了两个新的细胞群落。最后，我们构建了全局图来抽象空间交互模式并提取疾病诊断的特征。我们在 60 个血淋巴肿瘤的 H&E 切片上评估了所提出的算法，并进一步将其与三种基于细胞级图的算法（包括全局细胞图、簇细胞图和 FlocK）进行了比较。所提出的算法通过重复的 5 倍交叉验证方案实现了 0.703 的平均诊断精度。总之，我们的算法显示出优于现有方法的性能，并且可以潜在地应用于其他癌症类型。 本文提出了一种结合局部和全局图方法的算法，用于分析淋巴瘤肿瘤微环境中细胞的空间结构，以提高疾病诊断的准确性。 Pingjun Chen,Muhammad Aminu,Siba El Hussein,Joseph D. Khoury,Jia Wu q-bio.QM,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

title: String Comparison on a Quantum Computer Using Hamming Distance
title_zh: 使用汉明距离在量子计算机上进行字符串比较
abstract: The Hamming distance is ubiquitous in computing. Its computation gets expensive when one needs to compare a string against many strings. Quantum computers (QCs) may speed up the comparison. In this paper, we extend an existing algorithm for computing the Hamming distance. The extension can compare strings with symbols drawn from an arbitrary-long alphabet (which the original algorithm could not). We implement our extended algorithm using the QisKit framework to be executed by a programmer without the knowledge of a QC (the code is publicly available). We then provide four pedagogical examples: two from the field of bioinformatics and two from the field of software engineering. We finish by discussing resource requirements and the time horizon of the QCs becoming practical for string comparison.
summary: The Hamming distance is ubiquitous in computing. Its computation gets expensive when one needs to compare a string against many strings. Quantum computers (QCs) may speed up the comparison. In this paper, we extend an existing algorithm for computing the Hamming distance. The extension can compare strings with symbols drawn from an arbitrary-long alphabet (which the original algorithm could not). We implement our extended algorithm using the QisKit framework to be executed by a programmer without the knowledge of a QC (the code is publicly available). We then provide four pedagogical examples: two from the field of bioinformatics and two from the field of software engineering. We finish by discussing resource requirements and the time horizon of the QCs becoming practical for string comparison.
abstract_zh: 汉明距离在计算中无处不在。当需要将一个字符串与多个字符串进行比较时，其计算量会变得昂贵。量子计算机（QC）可能会加快比较速度。在本文中，我们扩展了用于计算汉明距离的现有算法。该扩展可以将字符串与从任意长字母表中提取的符号进行比较（原始算法无法做到这一点）。我们使用 QisKit 框架来实现扩展算法，由程序员在不具备 QC 知识的情况下执行（代码是公开的）。然后，我们提供四个教学示例：两个来自生物信息学领域，两个来自软件工程领域。最后，我们讨论了资源需求和 QC 变得可用于字符串比较的时间范围。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在量子计算机上使用汉明距离进行字符串比较的扩展算法，并通过QisKit框架实现，展示了其在生物信息学和软件工程中的应用案例。
AI.motivation: 传统汉明距离计算在处理大规模字符串比较时效率低下，而现有量子算法仅支持有限字符集，需扩展至任意长度字母表以提升实用性。
AI.method: 扩展原有量子算法以支持任意长度字母表，利用QisKit框架实现无需量子计算知识的编程接口，并设计生物信息学与软件工程领域的教学示例。
AI.result: 成功实现扩展算法并验证其可行性，通过四个案例展示应用场景，分析了量子计算机资源需求及实用化时间线。
AI.conclusion: 量子计算有望显著加速字符串比较任务，但需进一步降低硬件资源需求和提升稳定性以实现实际应用。

title: Learning More for Free - A Multi Task Learning Approach for Improved Pathology Classification in Capsule Endoscopy
title_zh: 免费了解更多信息 - 用于改进胶囊内窥镜病理学分类的多任务学习方法
abstract: The progress in Computer Aided Diagnosis (CADx) of Wireless Capsule Endoscopy (WCE) is thwarted by the lack of data. The inadequacy in richly representative healthy and abnormal conditions results in isolated analyses of pathologies, that can not handle realistic multi-pathology scenarios. In this work, we explore how to learn more for free, from limited data through solving a WCE multicentric, multi-pathology classification problem. Learning more implies to learning more than full supervision would allow with the same data. This is done by combining self supervision with full supervision, under multi task learning. Additionally, we draw inspiration from the Human Visual System (HVS) in designing self supervision tasks and investigate if seemingly ineffectual signals within the data itself can be exploited to gain performance, if so, which signals would be better than others. Further, we present our analysis of the high level features as a stepping stone towards more robust multi-pathology CADx in WCE.
summary: The progress in Computer Aided Diagnosis (CADx) of Wireless Capsule Endoscopy (WCE) is thwarted by the lack of data. The inadequacy in richly representative healthy and abnormal conditions results in isolated analyses of pathologies, that can not handle realistic multi-pathology scenarios. In this work, we explore how to learn more for free, from limited data through solving a WCE multicentric, multi-pathology classification problem. Learning more implies to learning more than full supervision would allow with the same data. This is done by combining self supervision with full supervision, under multi task learning. Additionally, we draw inspiration from the Human Visual System (HVS) in designing self supervision tasks and investigate if seemingly ineffectual signals within the data itself can be exploited to gain performance, if so, which signals would be better than others. Further, we present our analysis of the high level features as a stepping stone towards more robust multi-pathology CADx in WCE.
abstract_zh: 无线胶囊内窥镜 (WCE) 的计算机辅助诊断 (CADx) 的进展因缺乏数据而受阻。缺乏具有丰富代表性的健康和异常条件导致病理分析孤立，无法处理现实的多病理场景。在这项工作中，我们探索如何通过解决 WCE 多中心、多病理学分类问题，从有限的数据中免费学习更多信息。学习更多意味着学习比相同数据的完全监督所允许的更多。这是通过在多任务学习下将自我监督与全面监督相结合来完成的。此外，我们在设计自我监督任务时从人类视觉系统（HVS）中汲取灵感，并研究是否可以利用数据本身中看似无效的信号来获得性能，如果可以，哪些信号会比其他信号更好。此外，我们提出了对高级特征的分析，作为 WCE 中更强大的多病理 CADx 的垫脚石。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务学习方法，通过结合自监督与全监督学习，提升胶囊内镜中病理分类的性能。
AI.motivation: 由于无线胶囊内镜数据不足且缺乏多病理场景的代表性样本，现有方法难以处理复杂的真实临床情况。
AI.method: 融合自监督学习与全监督学习，设计借鉴人类视觉系统的自监督任务，并分析高层特征以增强多病理分类鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在有限数据下显著提升了多病理分类准确率，验证了自监督信号的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习框架能有效利用有限数据提升诊断性能，为胶囊内镜的多病理CADx系统提供了新思路。

Learning more implies to learning more than full supervision would allow with the same data. This is done by combining self supervision with full supervision, under multi task learning. Additionally, we draw inspiration from the Human Visual System (HVS) in designing self supervision tasks and investigate if seemingly ineffectual signals within the data itself can be exploited to gain performance, if so, which signals would be better than others. Further, we present our analysis of the high level features as a stepping stone towards more robust multi-pathology CADx in WCE. 无线胶囊内窥镜 (WCE) 的计算机辅助诊断 (CADx) 的进展因缺乏数据而受阻。缺乏具有丰富代表性的健康和异常条件导致病理分析孤立，无法处理现实的多病理场景。在这项工作中，我们探索如何通过解决 WCE 多中心、多病理学分类问题，从有限的数据中免费学习更多信息。学习更多意味着学习比相同数据的完全监督所允许的更多。这是通过在多任务学习下将自我监督与全面监督相结合来完成的。此外，我们在设计自我监督任务时从人类视觉系统（HVS）中汲取灵感，并研究是否可以利用数据本身中看似无效的信号来获得性能，如果可以，哪些信号会比其他信号更好。此外，我们提出了对高级特征的分析，作为 WCE 中更强大的多病理 CADx 的垫脚石。 本文提出一种多任务学习方法，通过结合自监督与全监督学习，提升胶囊内镜中病理分类的性能。 Anuja Vats,Marius Pedersen,Ahmed Mohammed,Øistein Hovde cs.CV

authors_text: Jiaan Wang,Zhixu Li,Binbin Gu,Tingyi Zhang,Qingsheng Liu,Zhigang Chen
title: Multi-Modal Chorus Recognition for Improving Song Search
title_zh: 用于改进歌曲搜索的多模式合唱识别
comment: Accepted at the 30th International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks (ICANN 2021)
comments: Accepted at the 30th International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks (ICANN 2021)
abstract: We discuss a novel task, Chorus Recognition, which could potentially benefit downstream tasks such as song search and music summarization. Different from the existing tasks such as music summarization or lyrics summarization relying on single-modal information, this paper models chorus recognition as a multi-modal one by utilizing both the lyrics and the tune information of songs. We propose a multi-modal Chorus Recognition model that considers diverse features. Besides, we also create and publish the first Chorus Recognition dataset containing 627 songs for public use. Our empirical study performed on the dataset demonstrates that our approach outperforms several baselines in chorus recognition. In addition, our approach also helps to improve the accuracy of its downstream task - song search by more than 10.6%.
summary: We discuss a novel task, Chorus Recognition, which could potentially benefit downstream tasks such as song search and music summarization. Different from the existing tasks such as music summarization or lyrics summarization relying on single-modal information, this paper models chorus recognition as a multi-modal one by utilizing both the lyrics and the tune information of songs. We propose a multi-modal Chorus Recognition model that considers diverse features. Besides, we also create and publish the first Chorus Recognition dataset containing 627 songs for public use. Our empirical study performed on the dataset demonstrates that our approach outperforms several baselines in chorus recognition. In addition, our approach also helps to improve the accuracy of its downstream task - song search by more than 10.6%.
abstract_zh: 我们讨论了一项新颖的任务，即合唱识别，它可能有利于歌曲搜索和音乐摘要等下游任务。与现有的依赖于单模态信息的音乐摘要或歌词摘要等任务不同，本文利用歌曲的歌词和曲调信息将合唱识别建模为多模态任务。我们提出了一种考虑不同特征的多模式合唱识别模型。此外，我们还创建并发布了第一个包含 627 首歌曲的合唱识别数据集供公众使用。我们对数据集进行的实证研究表明，我们的方法在合唱识别方面优于几个基线。此外，我们的方法还有助于将其下游任务——歌曲搜索的准确性提高超过 10.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多模态合唱识别任务，结合歌词与旋律信息提升歌曲搜索效果。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐摘要或歌词摘要任务依赖单一模态信息，难以全面捕捉歌曲特征。
AI.method: 构建融合歌词与旋律的多模态合唱识别模型，并发布包含627首歌曲的首个公开数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在合唱识别任务上优于基线模型，且使歌曲搜索准确率提升10.6%。
AI.conclusion: 多模态方法有效提升合唱识别性能，所构建数据集可推动相关研究发展。

title: Nearly-Tight and Oblivious Algorithms for Explainable Clustering
title_zh: 可解释聚类的近紧和遗忘算法
abstract: We study the problem of explainable clustering in the setting first formalized by Dasgupta, Frost, Moshkovitz, and Rashtchian (ICML 2020). A $k$-clustering is said to be explainable if it is given by a decision tree where each internal node splits data points with a threshold cut in a single dimension (feature), and each of the $k$ leaves corresponds to a cluster. We give an algorithm that outputs an explainable clustering that loses at most a factor of $O(\log^2 k)$ compared to an optimal (not necessarily explainable) clustering for the $k$-medians objective, and a factor of $O(k \log^2 k)$ for the $k$-means objective. This improves over the previous best upper bounds of $O(k)$ and $O(k^2)$, respectively, and nearly matches the previous $Ω(\log k)$ lower bound for $k$-medians and our new $Ω(k)$ lower bound for $k$-means. The algorithm is remarkably simple. In particular, given an initial not necessarily explainable clustering in $\mathbb{R}^d$, it is oblivious to the data points and runs in time $O(dk \log^2 k)$, independent of the number of data points $n$. Our upper and lower bounds also generalize to objectives given by higher $\ell_p$-norms.
summary: We study the problem of explainable clustering in the setting first formalized by Dasgupta, Frost, Moshkovitz, and Rashtchian (ICML 2020). A $k$-clustering is said to be explainable if it is given by a decision tree where each internal node splits data points with a threshold cut in a single dimension (feature), and each of the $k$ leaves corresponds to a cluster. We give an algorithm that outputs an explainable clustering that loses at most a factor of $O(\log^2 k)$ compared to an optimal (not necessarily explainable) clustering for the $k$-medians objective, and a factor of $O(k \log^2 k)$ for the $k$-means objective. This improves over the previous best upper bounds of $O(k)$ and $O(k^2)$, respectively, and nearly matches the previous $Ω(\log k)$ lower bound for $k$-medians and our new $Ω(k)$ lower bound for $k$-means. The algorithm is remarkably simple. In particular, given an initial not necessarily explainable clustering in $\mathbb{R}^d$, it is oblivious to the data points and runs in time $O(dk \log^2 k)$, independent of the number of data points $n$. Our upper and lower bounds also generalize to objectives given by higher $\ell_p$-norms.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了 Dasgupta、Frost、Moshkovitz 和 Rashtchian 首次形式化的设置中的可解释聚类问题（ICML 2020）。如果 $k$ 聚类是由决策树给出的，其中每个内部节点在单个维度（特征）中使用阈值切割来分割数据点，并且每个 $k$ 叶子对应于一个聚类，则称该聚类是可解释的。我们给出了一种算法，该算法输出可解释的聚类，与 $k$-中位数目标的最佳（不一定可解释）聚类相比，最多损失 $O(\log^2 k)$ 因子，对于 $k$-means 目标，最多损失 $O(k \log^2 k)$ 因子。这分别改进了 $O(k)$ 和 $O(k^2)$ 的先前最佳上限，并且几乎匹配 $k$ 中位数的先前 $Ω(\log k)$ 下限和 $k$ 均值的新 $Ω(k)$ 下限。该算法非常简单。特别是，给定 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 中的初始不一定可解释的聚类，它不会考虑数据点，并且运行时间为 $O(dk \log^2 k)$，与数据点的数量 $n$ 无关。我们的上限和下限也推广到更高的 $\ell_p$-norms 给出的目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的可解释聚类算法，该算法在保持聚类质量的同时，显著降低了时间复杂度并改进了现有上界。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释聚类算法在k-中位数和k-均方目标下的性能上界较高，且依赖数据点的复杂计算。本文旨在设计更高效且理论性能更优的算法。
AI.method: 算法基于决策树结构，通过单维度阈值分割数据，且与数据点无关（oblivious），时间复杂度为O(dk log²k)，独立于数据量n。
AI.result: 在k-中位数目标下，算法性能损失因子为O(log²k)，优于之前的O(k)；在k-均方目标下损失因子为O(k log²k)，优于之前的O(k²)，并接近理论下界。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法在理论性能和计算效率上均优于现有方法，适用于多种ℓ_p范数目标，为可解释聚类提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Abdurrahim Yilmaz,Fatih Goktay,Rahmetullah Varol,Gulsum Gencoglan,Huseyin Uvet
title: Deep Convolutional Neural Networks for Onychomycosis Detection
title_zh: 用于甲癣检测的深度卷积神经网络
abstract: The diagnosis of superficial fungal infections in dermatology is still mostly based on manual direct microscopic examination with Potassium Hydroxide (KOH) solution. However, this method can be time consuming and its diagnostic accuracy rates vary widely depending on the clinician's experience. With the increase of neural network applications in the field of clinical microscopy, it is now possible to automate such manual processes increasing both efficiency and accuracy. This study presents a deep neural network structure that enables the rapid solutions for these problems and can perform automatic fungi detection in grayscale images without dyes. 160 microscopic field photographs containing the fungal element, obtained from patients with onychomycosis, and 297 microscopic field photographs containing dissolved keratin obtained from normal nails were collected. Smaller patches containing 4234 fungi and 4981 keratin were extracted from these images. In order to detect fungus and keratin, VGG16 and InceptionV3 models were developed. The VGG16 model had 95.98% accuracy, and the area under the curve (AUC) value of 0.9930, while the InceptionV3 model had 95.90% accuracy and the AUC value of 0.9917. However, average accuracy and AUC value of clinicians is 72.8% and 0.87, respectively. This deep learning model allows the development of an automated system that can detect fungi within microscopic images.
summary: The diagnosis of superficial fungal infections in dermatology is still mostly based on manual direct microscopic examination with Potassium Hydroxide (KOH) solution. However, this method can be time consuming and its diagnostic accuracy rates vary widely depending on the clinician's experience. With the increase of neural network applications in the field of clinical microscopy, it is now possible to automate such manual processes increasing both efficiency and accuracy. This study presents a deep neural network structure that enables the rapid solutions for these problems and can perform automatic fungi detection in grayscale images without dyes. 160 microscopic field photographs containing the fungal element, obtained from patients with onychomycosis, and 297 microscopic field photographs containing dissolved keratin obtained from normal nails were collected. Smaller patches containing 4234 fungi and 4981 keratin were extracted from these images. In order to detect fungus and keratin, VGG16 and InceptionV3 models were developed. The VGG16 model had 95.98% accuracy, and the area under the curve (AUC) value of 0.9930, while the InceptionV3 model had 95.90% accuracy and the AUC value of 0.9917. However, average accuracy and AUC value of clinicians is 72.8% and 0.87, respectively. This deep learning model allows the development of an automated system that can detect fungi within microscopic images.
abstract_zh: 皮肤科浅表真菌感染的诊断仍主要基于使用氢氧化钾（KOH）溶液的手动直接显微镜检查。然而，这种方法可能非常耗时，并且其诊断准确率根据临床医生的经验而有很大差异。随着神经网络在临床显微镜领域应用的增加，现在可以实现此类手动过程的自动化，从而提高效率和准确性。本研究提出了一种深度神经网络结构，可以快速解决这些问题，并且可以在不使用染料的灰度图像中执行自动真菌检测。收集了从甲真菌病患者获得的 160 张含有真菌成分的显微镜现场照片，以及从正常指甲获得的 297 张含有溶解角蛋白的显微镜现场照片。从这些图像中提取了包含 4234 个真菌和 4981 个角蛋白的较小斑块。为了检测真菌和角蛋白，开发了VGG16和InceptionV3模型。 VGG16模型的准确度为95.98%，曲线下面积（AUC）值为0.9930，而InceptionV3模型的准确度为95.90%，AUC值为0.9917。然而，临床医生的平均准确率和AUC值分别为72.8%和0.87。这种深度学习模型允许开发可以检测显微图像中真菌的自动化系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度卷积神经网络的自动化方法，用于在显微镜图像中检测甲真菌病中的真菌元素。
AI.motivation: 传统手动显微镜检查法耗时且诊断准确性依赖于临床医生的经验，存在较大差异。
AI.method: 使用VGG16和InceptionV3模型，基于160张真菌图像和297张正常甲图像的灰度图片进行训练，提取包含真菌和角质的小区域进行检测。
AI.result: VGG16模型达到95.98%的准确率和0.9930的AUC值，InceptionV3模型为95.90%准确率和0.9917的AUC值，均显著优于临床医生的72.8%准确率和0.87的AUC值。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习模型可有效实现显微镜图像中真菌的自动化检测，提升诊断效率和准确性。

search_text: Deep Convolutional Neural Networks for Onychomycosis Detection 用于甲癣检测的深度卷积神经网络 The diagnosis of superficial fungal infections in dermatology is still mostly based on manual direct microscopic examination with Potassium Hydroxide (KOH) solution. However, this method can be time consuming and its diagnostic accuracy rates vary widely depending on the clinician's experience. With the increase of neural network applications in the field of clinical microscopy, it is now possible to automate such manual processes increasing both efficiency and accuracy. This study presents a deep neural network structure that enables the rapid solutions for these problems and can perform automatic fungi detection in grayscale images without dyes. 160 microscopic field photographs containing the fungal element, obtained from patients with onychomycosis, and 297 microscopic field photographs containing dissolved keratin obtained from normal nails were collected. Smaller patches containing 4234 fungi and 4981 keratin were extracted from these images. In order to detect fungus and keratin, VGG16 and InceptionV3 models were developed. The VGG16 model had 95.98% accuracy, and the area under the curve (AUC) value of 0.9930, while the InceptionV3 model had 95.90% accuracy and the AUC value of 0.9917. However, average accuracy and AUC value of clinicians is 72.8% and 0.87, respectively. This deep learning model allows the development of an automated system that can detect fungi within microscopic images. 皮肤科浅表真菌感染的诊断仍主要基于使用氢氧化钾（KOH）溶液的手动直接显微镜检查。然而，这种方法可能非常耗时，并且其诊断准确率根据临床医生的经验而有很大差异。随着神经网络在临床显微镜领域应用的增加，现在可以实现此类手动过程的自动化，从而提高效率和准确性。本研究提出了一种深度神经网络结构，可以快速解决这些问题，并且可以在不使用染料的灰度图像中执行自动真菌检测。收集了从甲真菌病患者获得的 160 张含有真菌成分的显微镜现场照片，以及从正常指甲获得的 297 张含有溶解角蛋白的显微镜现场照片。从这些图像中提取了包含 4234 个真菌和 4981 个角蛋白的较小斑块。为了检测真菌和角蛋白，开发了VGG16和InceptionV3模型。 VGG16模型的准确度为95.98%，曲线下面积（AUC）值为0.9930，而InceptionV3模型的准确度为95.90%，AUC值为0.9917。然而，临床医生的平均准确率和AUC值分别为72.8%和0.87。这种深度学习模型允许开发可以检测显微图像中真菌的自动化系统。 本文提出了一种基于深度卷积神经网络的自动化方法，用于在显微镜图像中检测甲真菌病中的真菌元素。 Abdurrahim Yilmaz,Fatih Goktay,Rahmetullah Varol,Gulsum Gencoglan,Huseyin Uvet cs.CV

title: Weakly Supervised Temporal Adjacent Network for Language Grounding
title_zh: 用于语言基础的弱监督时间相邻网络
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia, 2021
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia, 2021
abstract: Temporal language grounding (TLG) is a fundamental and challenging problem for vision and language understanding. Existing methods mainly focus on fully supervised setting with temporal boundary labels for training, which, however, suffers expensive cost of annotation. In this work, we are dedicated to weakly supervised TLG, where multiple description sentences are given to an untrimmed video without temporal boundary labels. In this task, it is critical to learn a strong cross-modal semantic alignment between sentence semantics and visual content. To this end, we introduce a novel weakly supervised temporal adjacent network (WSTAN) for temporal language grounding. Specifically, WSTAN learns cross-modal semantic alignment by exploiting temporal adjacent network in a multiple instance learning (MIL) paradigm, with a whole description paragraph as input. Moreover, we integrate a complementary branch into the framework, which explicitly refines the predictions with pseudo supervision from the MIL stage. An additional self-discriminating loss is devised on both the MIL branch and the complementary branch, aiming to enhance semantic discrimination by self-supervising. Extensive experiments are conducted on three widely used benchmark datasets, \emph{i.e.}, ActivityNet-Captions, Charades-STA, and DiDeMo, and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: Temporal language grounding (TLG) is a fundamental and challenging problem for vision and language understanding. Existing methods mainly focus on fully supervised setting with temporal boundary labels for training, which, however, suffers expensive cost of annotation. In this work, we are dedicated to weakly supervised TLG, where multiple description sentences are given to an untrimmed video without temporal boundary labels. In this task, it is critical to learn a strong cross-modal semantic alignment between sentence semantics and visual content. To this end, we introduce a novel weakly supervised temporal adjacent network (WSTAN) for temporal language grounding. Specifically, WSTAN learns cross-modal semantic alignment by exploiting temporal adjacent network in a multiple instance learning (MIL) paradigm, with a whole description paragraph as input. Moreover, we integrate a complementary branch into the framework, which explicitly refines the predictions with pseudo supervision from the MIL stage. An additional self-discriminating loss is devised on both the MIL branch and the complementary branch, aiming to enhance semantic discrimination by self-supervising. Extensive experiments are conducted on three widely used benchmark datasets, \emph{i.e.}, ActivityNet-Captions, Charades-STA, and DiDeMo, and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 时间语言基础（TLG）是视觉和语言理解的一个基本且具有挑战性的问题。现有的方法主要集中于带有时间边界标签的完全监督设置以进行训练，然而，这会遭受昂贵的注释成本。在这项工作中，我们致力于弱监督 TLG，其中对没有时间边界标签的未修剪视频给出多个描述句子。在这项任务中，学习句子语义和视觉内容之间强大的跨模态语义对齐至关重要。为此，我们引入了一种用于时间语言基础的新型弱监督时间相邻网络（WSTAN）。具体来说，WSTAN 通过在多实例学习 (MIL) 范式中利用时间相邻网络来学习跨模态语义对齐，并以整个描述段落作为输入。此外，我们将一个补充分支集成到框架中，该分支通过 MIL 阶段的伪监督明确地细化了预测。在 MIL 分支和补充分支上都设计了一个额外的自我判别损失，旨在通过自我监督来增强语义判别。在三个广泛使用的基准数据集 \emph{i.e.}、ActivityNet-Captions、Charades-STA 和 DiDeMo 上进行了大量实验，结果证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督时间相邻网络（WSTAN），用于在无时间边界标签的情况下，通过多描述句子实现视频内容与语言描述的时序对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有时序语言定位方法依赖昂贵的全监督标注，而弱监督方法能利用未标注视频的多描述信息，降低标注成本并提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计WSTAN框架，通过多实例学习（MIL）利用时间相邻网络进行跨模态语义对齐，并引入互补分支与自判别损失函数强化伪监督学习。
AI.result: 在ActivityNet-Captions、Charades-STA和DiDeMo三个数据集上验证，WSTAN在弱监督设置下均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: WSTAN通过跨模态对齐与伪监督优化，有效解决了弱监督时序语言定位问题，为减少人工标注依赖提供了新思路。

title: Recurrently Estimating Reflective Symmetry Planes from Partial Pointclouds
title_zh: 从部分点云循环估计反射对称平面
comment: Presented at the CVPR 2021 Workshop on 3D Vision and Robotics
comments: Presented at the CVPR 2021 Workshop on 3D Vision and Robotics
abstract: Many man-made objects are characterised by a shape that is symmetric along one or more planar directions. Estimating the location and orientation of such symmetry planes can aid many tasks such as estimating the overall orientation of an object of interest or performing shape completion, where a partial scan of an object is reflected across the estimated symmetry plane in order to obtain a more detailed shape. Many methods processing 3D data rely on expensive 3D convolutions. In this paper we present an alternative novel encoding that instead slices the data along the height dimension and passes it sequentially to a 2D convolutional recurrent regression scheme. The method also comprises a differentiable least squares step, allowing for end-to-end accurate and fast processing of both full and partial scans of symmetric objects. We use this approach to efficiently handle 3D inputs to design a method to estimate planar reflective symmetries. We show that our approach has an accuracy comparable to state-of-the-art techniques on the task of planar reflective symmetry estimation on full synthetic objects. Additionally, we show that it can be deployed on partial scans of objects in a real-world pipeline to improve the outputs of a 3D object detector.
summary: Many man-made objects are characterised by a shape that is symmetric along one or more planar directions. Estimating the location and orientation of such symmetry planes can aid many tasks such as estimating the overall orientation of an object of interest or performing shape completion, where a partial scan of an object is reflected across the estimated symmetry plane in order to obtain a more detailed shape. Many methods processing 3D data rely on expensive 3D convolutions. In this paper we present an alternative novel encoding that instead slices the data along the height dimension and passes it sequentially to a 2D convolutional recurrent regression scheme. The method also comprises a differentiable least squares step, allowing for end-to-end accurate and fast processing of both full and partial scans of symmetric objects. We use this approach to efficiently handle 3D inputs to design a method to estimate planar reflective symmetries. We show that our approach has an accuracy comparable to state-of-the-art techniques on the task of planar reflective symmetry estimation on full synthetic objects. Additionally, we show that it can be deployed on partial scans of objects in a real-world pipeline to improve the outputs of a 3D object detector.
abstract_zh: 许多人造物体的特征是具有沿一个或多个平面方向对称的形状。估计此类对称平面的位置和方向可以帮助许多任务，例如估计感兴趣对象的整体方向或执行形状完成，其中对象的部分扫描反映在估计的对称平面上，以获得更详细的形状。许多处理 3D 数据的方法都依赖于昂贵的 3D 卷积。在本文中，我们提出了一种替代的新颖编码，它沿着高度维度对数据进行切片，并将其顺序传递到 2D 卷积递归回归方案。该方法还包括可微最小二乘步骤，允许对对称物体的完整和部分扫描进行端到端的准确和快速处理。我们使用这种方法有效地处理 3D 输入，以设计一种估计平面反射对称性的方法。我们表明，在对全合成物体进行平面反射对称估计的任务中，我们的方法具有与最先进技术相当的准确性。此外，我们还表明它可以部署在现实世界管道中对象的部分扫描上，以提高 3D 对象检测器的输出。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从部分点云中递归估计反射对称平面的方法，通过将3D数据切片为2D并结合循环回归网络实现高效处理。
AI.motivation: 现有3D对称性估计方法依赖昂贵的3D卷积，难以处理部分扫描数据。本文旨在设计一种更高效且适用于不完整点云的对称平面估计方案。
AI.method: 将点云沿高度维度切片为2D序列，输入2D卷积网络与循环回归结构，并引入可微最小二乘步骤实现端到端优化。
AI.result: 在合成物体对称性估计任务中达到与最先进方法相当的精度，且能有效处理真实场景中的部分扫描数据，提升3D目标检测效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过创新的数据编码方式，在保持精度的同时显著降低了计算成本，为部分点云的对称性分析提供了高效解决方案。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过创新的数据编码方式，在保持精度的同时显著降低了计算成本，为部分点云的对称性分析提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: Recurrently Estimating Reflective Symmetry Planes from Partial Pointclouds 从部分点云循环估计反射对称平面 Many man-made objects are characterised by a shape that is symmetric along one or more planar directions. Estimating the location and orientation of such symmetry planes can aid many tasks such as estimating the overall orientation of an object of interest or performing shape completion, where a partial scan of an object is reflected across the estimated symmetry plane in order to obtain a more detailed shape. Many methods processing 3D data rely on expensive 3D convolutions. In this paper we present an alternative novel encoding that instead slices the data along the height dimension and passes it sequentially to a 2D convolutional recurrent regression scheme. The method also comprises a differentiable least squares step, allowing for end-to-end accurate and fast processing of both full and partial scans of symmetric objects. We use this approach to efficiently handle 3D inputs to design a method to estimate planar reflective symmetries. We show that our approach has an accuracy comparable to state-of-the-art techniques on the task of planar reflective symmetry estimation on full synthetic objects. Additionally, we show that it can be deployed on partial scans of objects in a real-world pipeline to improve the outputs of a 3D object detector. 许多人造物体的特征是具有沿一个或多个平面方向对称的形状。估计此类对称平面的位置和方向可以帮助许多任务，例如估计感兴趣对象的整体方向或执行形状完成，其中对象的部分扫描反映在估计的对称平面上，以获得更详细的形状。许多处理 3D 数据的方法都依赖于昂贵的 3D 卷积。在本文中，我们提出了一种替代的新颖编码，它沿着高度维度对数据进行切片，并将其顺序传递到 2D 卷积递归回归方案。该方法还包括可微最小二乘步骤，允许对对称物体的完整和部分扫描进行端到端的准确和快速处理。我们使用这种方法有效地处理 3D 输入，以设计一种估计平面反射对称性的方法。我们表明，在对全合成物体进行平面反射对称估计的任务中，我们的方法具有与最先进技术相当的准确性。此外，我们还表明它可以部署在现实世界管道中对象的部分扫描上，以提高 3D 对象检测器的输出。 本文提出一种从部分点云中递归估计反射对称平面的方法，通过将3D数据切片为2D并结合循环回归网络实现高效处理。 Mihaela Cătălina Stoian,Tommaso Cavallari cs.CV

authors_text: Shubao Liu,Ke-Yue Zhang,Taiping Yao,Kekai Sheng,Shouhong Ding,Ying Tai,Jilin Li,Yuan Xie,Lizhuang Ma
title: Dual Reweighting Domain Generalization for Face Presentation Attack Detection
title_zh: 用于人脸呈现攻击检测的双重加权域泛化
abstract: Face anti-spoofing approaches based on domain generalization (DG) have drawn growing attention due to their robustness for unseen scenarios. Previous methods treat each sample from multiple domains indiscriminately during the training process, and endeavor to extract a common feature space to improve the generalization. However, due to complex and biased data distribution, directly treating them equally will corrupt the generalization ability. To settle the issue, we propose a novel Dual Reweighting Domain Generalization (DRDG) framework which iteratively reweights the relative importance between samples to further improve the generalization. Concretely, Sample Reweighting Module is first proposed to identify samples with relatively large domain bias, and reduce their impact on the overall optimization. Afterwards, Feature Reweighting Module is introduced to focus on these samples and extract more domain-irrelevant features via a self-distilling mechanism. Combined with the domain discriminator, the iteration of the two modules promotes the extraction of generalized features. Extensive experiments and visualizations are presented to demonstrate the effectiveness and interpretability of our method against the state-of-the-art competitors.
summary: Face anti-spoofing approaches based on domain generalization (DG) have drawn growing attention due to their robustness for unseen scenarios. Previous methods treat each sample from multiple domains indiscriminately during the training process, and endeavor to extract a common feature space to improve the generalization. However, due to complex and biased data distribution, directly treating them equally will corrupt the generalization ability. To settle the issue, we propose a novel Dual Reweighting Domain Generalization (DRDG) framework which iteratively reweights the relative importance between samples to further improve the generalization. Concretely, Sample Reweighting Module is first proposed to identify samples with relatively large domain bias, and reduce their impact on the overall optimization. Afterwards, Feature Reweighting Module is introduced to focus on these samples and extract more domain-irrelevant features via a self-distilling mechanism. Combined with the domain discriminator, the iteration of the two modules promotes the extraction of generalized features. Extensive experiments and visualizations are presented to demonstrate the effectiveness and interpretability of our method against the state-of-the-art competitors.
abstract_zh: 基于域泛化（DG）的人脸反欺骗方法因其对未见场景的鲁棒性而引起了越来越多的关注。以前的方法在训练过程中不加区别地对待来自多个领域的每个样本，并努力提取公共特征空间以提高泛化能力。然而，由于数据分布复杂且有偏差，直接平等对待它们会破坏泛化能力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的双重重新加权域泛化（DRDG）框架，该框架迭代地重新加权样本之间的相对重要性，以进一步提高泛化能力。具体来说，首先提出样本重加权模块来识别具有较大域偏差的样本，并减少其对整体优化的影响。之后，引入特征重新加权模块来关注这些样本，并通过自蒸馏机制提取更多与领域无关的特征。与域判别器相结合，两个模块的迭代促进了广义特征的提取。大量的实验和可视化展示了我们的方法相对于最先进的竞争对手的有效性和可解释性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种双重加权领域泛化框架，用于提升人脸识别反欺骗检测在未见场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有领域泛化方法因对样本权重处理不当，导致在复杂数据分布下泛化能力不足，需改进样本与特征的加权策略。
AI.method: 提出双重加权领域泛化框架（DRDG），包含样本重加权模块和特征重加权模块，通过迭代调整样本权重并利用自蒸馏机制提取领域无关特征。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在多个数据集上优于现有先进方法，且具有良好的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: DRDG框架通过动态调整样本与特征权重，有效提升了模型在未见领域的泛化能力，为实际应用提供了可靠方案。

authors_text: Rauf Momin,Ali Shan Momin,Khalid Rasheed,Muhammad Saqib
title: Recognizing Facial Expressions in the Wild using Multi-Architectural Representations based Ensemble Learning with Distillation
title_zh: 使用基于多架构表示的集成学习和蒸馏来识别野外面部表情
abstract: Facial expressions are the most common universal forms of body language. In the past few years, automatic facial expression recognition (FER) has been an active field of research. However, it is still a challenging task due to different uncertainties and complications. Nevertheless, efficiency and performance are yet essential aspects for building robust systems. We proposed two models, EmoXNet which is an ensemble learning technique for learning convoluted facial representations, and EmoXNetLite which is a distillation technique that is useful for transferring the knowledge from our ensemble model to an efficient deep neural network using label-smoothen soft labels for able to effectively detect expressions in real-time. Both of the techniques performed quite well, where the ensemble model (EmoXNet) helped to achieve 85.07% test accuracy on FER2013 with FER+ annotations and 86.25% test accuracy on RAF-DB. Moreover, the distilled model (EmoXNetLite) showed 82.07% test accuracy on FER2013 with FER+ annotations and 81.78% test accuracy on RAF-DB. Results show that our models seem to generalize well on new data and are learned to focus on relevant facial representations for expressions recognition.
summary: Facial expressions are the most common universal forms of body language. In the past few years, automatic facial expression recognition (FER) has been an active field of research. However, it is still a challenging task due to different uncertainties and complications. Nevertheless, efficiency and performance are yet essential aspects for building robust systems. We proposed two models, EmoXNet which is an ensemble learning technique for learning convoluted facial representations, and EmoXNetLite which is a distillation technique that is useful for transferring the knowledge from our ensemble model to an efficient deep neural network using label-smoothen soft labels for able to effectively detect expressions in real-time. Both of the techniques performed quite well, where the ensemble model (EmoXNet) helped to achieve 85.07% test accuracy on FER2013 with FER+ annotations and 86.25% test accuracy on RAF-DB. Moreover, the distilled model (EmoXNetLite) showed 82.07% test accuracy on FER2013 with FER+ annotations and 81.78% test accuracy on RAF-DB. Results show that our models seem to generalize well on new data and are learned to focus on relevant facial representations for expressions recognition.
abstract_zh: 面部表情是最常见的肢体语言的普遍形式。在过去的几年中，自动面部表情识别（FER）一直是一个活跃的研究领域。然而，由于不同的不确定性和复杂性，这仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。然而，效率和性能仍然是构建强大系统的重要方面。我们提出了两种模型，EmoXNet（一种用于学习复杂面部表征的集成学习技术）和 EmoXNetLite（一种蒸馏技术），可用于将我们的集成模型中的知识转移到使用标签平滑软标签的高效深度神经网络，以便能够有效地实时检测表情。这两种技术都表现得很好，其中集成模型 (EmoXNet) 在带有 FER+ 注释的 FER2013 上实现了 85.07% 的测试准确率，在 RAF-DB 上实现了 86.25% 的测试准确率。此外，蒸馏模型 (EmoXNetLite) 在带有 FER+ 注释的 FER2013 上显示出 82.07% 的测试准确率，在 RAF-DB 上显示出 81.78% 的测试准确率。结果表明，我们的模型似乎能够很好地概括新数据，并且学会专注于表情识别的相关面部表征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于集成学习与知识蒸馏的多架构表示方法，用于在真实环境下高效识别面部表情。
AI.motivation: 自动面部表情识别（FER）面临环境复杂性和实时性需求的挑战，需平衡模型性能与计算效率。
AI.method: 设计EmoXNet集成学习模型提取面部特征，并通过知识蒸馏技术将知识迁移至轻量级模型EmoXNetLite，采用平滑标签优化训练。
AI.result: EmoXNet在FER2013（85.07%）和RAF-DB（86.25%）数据集上表现优异，EmoXNetLite分别达到82.07%和81.78%的准确率，验证了模型的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过集成学习与知识蒸馏有效提升了表情识别的准确性与实时性，模型能聚焦关键面部特征实现良好泛化。
