Experimental results show that the proposed method (ESTRNN) can achieve better deblurring performance both quantitatively and qualitatively with less computational cost against state-of-the-art video deblurring methods. In addition, cross-validation experiments between datasets illustrate the high generality of BSD over the synthetic datasets. The code and dataset are released at https://github.com/zzh-tech/ESTRNN. 由于空间和时间变化模糊本身的复杂性以及低计算成本的要求，真实世界的视频实时去模糊仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。为了提高网络效率，我们将残差密集块引入RNN单元，从而有效地提取当前帧的空间特征。此外，提出了全局时空注意力模块来融合过去和未来帧的有效分层特征，以帮助更好地对当前帧进行去模糊。另一个急需解决的问题是缺乏真实世界的基准数据集。因此，我们通过使用同轴分束器采集系统收集配对的模糊/清晰视频剪辑，向社区贡献了一个新颖的数据集（BSD）。实验结果表明，与最先进的视频去模糊方法相比，所提出的方法（ESTRNN）可以以更少的计算成本在定量和定性上实现更好的去模糊性能。此外，数据集之间的交叉验证实验说明了 BSD 在合成数据集上的高度通用性。代码和数据集发布于https://github.com/zzh-tech/ESTRNN。 本文提出了一种高效的循环神经网络（ESTRNN）和一个真实世界视频去模糊数据集（BSD），以解决实时视频去模糊中的计算成本高和数据不足的问题。 Zhihang Zhong,Ye Gao,Yinqiang Zheng,Bo Zheng,Imari Sato cs.CV

authors_text: Norbert Kolotzek,Pierre G. Aublin,Bernhard U. Seeber
title: Fast processing explains the effect of sound reflection on binaural unmasking
title_zh: 快速处理解释了声音反射对双耳揭露的影响
abstract: Sound reflections and late reverberation alter energetic and binaural cues of a target source, thereby affecting it's detection in noise. Two experiments investigated detection of harmonic complex tones, centered around 500 Hz, in noise in a virtual room with different modifications of simulated room impulse responses (RIR). Stimuli were auralized using the SOFE's loudspeakers in anechoic space. The target was presented from the front or at 0$^\circ$ azimuth, while an anechoic noise masker was simultaneously presented at 0$^\circ$. In the first experiment, early reflections were progressively added to the RIR and detection thresholds of the reverberant target were measured. For a frontal sound source, detection thresholds decreased while adding the first 45 ms of early reflections, whereas for a lateral sound source thresholds remained constant. In the second experiment, early reflections were cut out while late reflections were kept along with the direct sound. Results for a target at 0$^\circ$ show that even reflections as late as 150 ms reduce detection thresholds compared to only the direct sound. A binaural model with a sluggishness component following the computation of binaural unmasking in short windows predicts measured and literature results better than when large windows are used.
summary: Sound reflections and late reverberation alter energetic and binaural cues of a target source, thereby affecting it's detection in noise. Two experiments investigated detection of harmonic complex tones, centered around 500 Hz, in noise in a virtual room with different modifications of simulated room impulse responses (RIR). Stimuli were auralized using the SOFE's loudspeakers in anechoic space. The target was presented from the front or at 0$^\circ$ azimuth, while an anechoic noise masker was simultaneously presented at 0$^\circ$. In the first experiment, early reflections were progressively added to the RIR and detection thresholds of the reverberant target were measured. For a frontal sound source, detection thresholds decreased while adding the first 45 ms of early reflections, whereas for a lateral sound source thresholds remained constant. In the second experiment, early reflections were cut out while late reflections were kept along with the direct sound. Results for a target at 0$^\circ$ show that even reflections as late as 150 ms reduce detection thresholds compared to only the direct sound. A binaural model with a sluggishness component following the computation of binaural unmasking in short windows predicts measured and literature results better than when large windows are used.
abstract_zh: 声音反射和后期混响会改变目标源的能量和双耳线索，从而影响其在噪声中的检测。两项实验研究了虚拟房间中噪声中以 500 Hz 为中心的谐波复合音调的检测，并对模拟房间脉冲响应 (RIR) 进行了不同的修改。使用 SOFE 的扬声器在消声空间中听到刺激。目标从前方或 0$^\circ$ 方位角呈现，同时在 0$^\circ$ 处呈现消声噪声掩蔽器。在第一个实验中，早期反射逐渐添加到 RIR 中，并测量了混响目标的检测阈值。对于正面声源，检测阈值在添加前 45 毫秒的早期反射时降低，而对于侧面声源阈值保持不变。在第二个实验中，早期反射被删除，而晚期反射与直达声一起保留。 0$^\circ$ 处目标的结果表明，与仅直达声相比，即使晚至 150 毫秒的反射也会降低检测阈值。在短窗口中计算双耳去掩蔽后，具有迟缓成分的双耳模型比使用大窗口时更好地预测测量结果和文献结果。

AI.tldr: 研究声反射对双耳掩蔽效应的影响，通过实验分析早期和晚期混响对目标声源检测阈值的作用机制。
AI.motivation: 声反射会改变声源的能级和双耳线索，影响噪声环境下的声源检测能力，需明确反射声在不同空间位置和时间窗口下的作用规律。
AI.method: 设计两组实验：1）逐步添加早期反射声（0-45ms）至房间脉冲响应（RIR），测量前向和侧向声源的检测阈值；2）移除早期反射保留晚期反射（>45ms），对比直接声与混响声的检测差异，并用包含短时间窗双耳掩蔽模型进行预测验证。
AI.result: 前向声源添加前45ms早期反射显著降低检测阈值，侧向声源无变化；保留晚期反射（至150ms）仍能降低前向声源阈值，短时间窗模型比长时间窗更准确预测实验及文献结果。
AI.conclusion: 声反射通过双耳线索的快速处理机制增强目标声检测，晚期混响亦具显著作用，支持短时间窗模型对双耳掩蔽效应的解释力。

title: Close relatives (of Feedback Vertex Set), revisited
title_zh: 近亲（反馈顶点集），重新审视
abstract: At IPEC 2020, Bergougnoux, Bonnet, Brettell, and Kwon showed that a number of problems related to the classic Feedback Vertex Set (FVS) problem do not admit a $2^{o(k \log k)} \cdot n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$-time algorithm on graphs of treewidth at most $k$, assuming the Exponential Time Hypothesis. This contrasts with the $3^{k} \cdot k^{\mathcal{O}(1)} \cdot n$-time algorithm for FVS using the Cut&Count technique. During their live talk at IPEC 2020, Bergougnoux et al.~posed a number of open questions, which we answer in this work. - Subset Even Cycle Transversal, Subset Odd Cycle Transversal, Subset Feedback Vertex Set can be solved in time $2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)} \cdot n$ in graphs of treewidth at most $k$. This matches a lower bound for Even Cycle Transversal of Bergougnoux et al.~and improves the polynomial factor in some of their upper bounds. - Subset Feedback Vertex Set and Node Multiway Cut can be solved in time $2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)} \cdot n$, if the input graph is given as a clique-width expression of size $n$ and width $k$. - Odd Cycle Transversal can be solved in time $4^k \cdot k^{\mathcal{O}(1)} \cdot n$ if the input graph is given as a clique-width expression of size $n$ and width $k$. Furthermore, the existence of a constant $\varepsilon > 0$ and an algorithm performing this task in time $(4-\varepsilon)^k \cdot n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ would contradict the Strong Exponential Time Hypothesis.
summary: At IPEC 2020, Bergougnoux, Bonnet, Brettell, and Kwon showed that a number of problems related to the classic Feedback Vertex Set (FVS) problem do not admit a $2^{o(k \log k)} \cdot n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$-time algorithm on graphs of treewidth at most $k$, assuming the Exponential Time Hypothesis. This contrasts with the $3^{k} \cdot k^{\mathcal{O}(1)} \cdot n$-time algorithm for FVS using the Cut&Count technique. During their live talk at IPEC 2020, Bergougnoux et al.~posed a number of open questions, which we answer in this work. - Subset Even Cycle Transversal, Subset Odd Cycle Transversal, Subset Feedback Vertex Set can be solved in time $2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)} \cdot n$ in graphs of treewidth at most $k$. This matches a lower bound for Even Cycle Transversal of Bergougnoux et al.~and improves the polynomial factor in some of their upper bounds. - Subset Feedback Vertex Set and Node Multiway Cut can be solved in time $2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)} \cdot n$, if the input graph is given as a clique-width expression of size $n$ and width $k$. - Odd Cycle Transversal can be solved in time $4^k \cdot k^{\mathcal{O}(1)} \cdot n$ if the input graph is given as a clique-width expression of size $n$ and width $k$. Furthermore, the existence of a constant $\varepsilon > 0$ and an algorithm performing this task in time $(4-\varepsilon)^k \cdot n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ would contradict the Strong Exponential Time Hypothesis.
abstract_zh: 在 IPEC 2020 上，Bergognoux、Bonnet、Brettell 和 Kwon 表明，假设指数时间假设，与经典反馈顶点集 (FVS) 问题相关的许多问题不允许在树宽至多 $k$ 的图上使用 $2^{o(k \log k)} \cdot n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ 时间算法。这与使用 Cut&Count 技术的 FVS 的 $3^{k} \cdot k^{\mathcal{O}(1)} \cdot n$ 次算法形成对比。在 IPEC 2020 的现场演讲中，Bergognoux 等人提出了一些开放性问题，我们在本文中回答了这些问题。 - 子集偶循环遍历、子集奇循环遍历、子集反馈顶点集可以在树宽最多 $k$ 的图中在 $2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)} \cdot n$ 时间内求解。这与 Bergougnoux 等人的偶循环横贯的下界相匹配，并改进了一些上限中的多项式因子。 - 如果输入图以大小为 $n$ 且宽度为 $k$ 的团宽度表达式给出，则子集反馈顶点集和节点多路切割可以在时间 $2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)} \cdot n$ 中求解。 - 如果输入图以大小为 $n$ 且宽度为 $k$ 的团宽度表达式给出，则奇循环遍历可以在时间 $4^k \cdot k^{\mathcal{O}(1)} \cdot n$ 中求解。此外，常数 $\varepsilon > 0$ 的存在以及及时执行此任务的算法 $(4-\varepsilon)^k \cdot n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ 将与强指数时间假设相矛盾。

AI.tldr: 本文解决了与反馈顶点集（FVS）相关的若干问题在树宽和有向宽参数下的时间复杂度上下界问题。
AI.motivation: Bergougnoux等人在IPEC 2020上证明了多个FVS相关问题在树宽不超过k的图上不存在2^{o(k log k)}·n^{O(1)}时间算法（假设ETH），但他们留下了一些开放问题。本文旨在回答这些开放性疑问，即能否达到匹配的下界或改进现有算法的多项式因子。
AI.method: 通过设计精细化的动态规划算法，利用树分解和团宽表达式结构，结合Cut&Count等技术，将子集版本的环横贯问题（如Subset Even/Odd Cycle Transversal, Subset Feedback Vertex Set）的运行时复杂度提升到2^{O(k log k)}·n，并针对团宽参数设计了相应的指数时间算法。
AI.result: - Subset Even Cycle Transversal, Subset Odd Cycle Transversal, Subset Feedback Vertex Set 在树宽不超过k的图上可在2^{O(k log k)}·n时间内解决，匹配了下界。- Subset Feedback Vertex Set 和 Node Multiway Cut 在团宽k的图上可在2^{O(k log k)}·n时间内解决。- Odd Cycle Transversal 在团宽k的图上可在4^k·k^{O(1)}·n时间内解决，且(4-ε)^k·n^{O(1)}算法将违反SETH。
AI.conclusion: 本文完整回答了Bergougnoux等人提出的开放问题，确定了若干FVS相关问题的精确时间复杂度边界，并进一步揭示了问题在团宽参数下的复杂性，证明了某些下界假设的最优性。

tldr: 本文解决了与反馈顶点集（FVS）相关的若干问题在树宽和有向宽参数下的时间复杂度上下界问题。
motivation: Bergougnoux等人在IPEC 2020上证明了多个FVS相关问题在树宽不超过k的图上不存在2^{o(k log k)}·n^{O(1)}时间算法（假设ETH），但他们留下了一些开放问题。本文旨在回答这些开放性疑问，即能否达到匹配的下界或改进现有算法的多项式因子。
method: 通过设计精细化的动态规划算法，利用树分解和团宽表达式结构，结合Cut&Count等技术，将子集版本的环横贯问题（如Subset Even/Odd Cycle Transversal, Subset Feedback Vertex Set）的运行时复杂度提升到2^{O(k log k)}·n，并针对团宽参数设计了相应的指数时间算法。
result: - Subset Even Cycle Transversal, Subset Odd Cycle Transversal, Subset Feedback Vertex Set 在树宽不超过k的图上可在2^{O(k log k)}·n时间内解决，匹配了下界。- Subset Feedback Vertex Set 和 Node Multiway Cut 在团宽k的图上可在2^{O(k log k)}·n时间内解决。- Odd Cycle Transversal 在团宽k的图上可在4^k·k^{O(1)}·n时间内解决，且(4-ε)^k·n^{O(1)}算法将违反SETH。
conclusion: 本文完整回答了Bergougnoux等人提出的开放问题，确定了若干FVS相关问题的精确时间复杂度边界，并进一步揭示了问题在团宽参数下的复杂性，证明了某些下界假设的最优性。
search_text: Close relatives (of Feedback Vertex Set), revisited 近亲（反馈顶点集），重新审视 At IPEC 2020, Bergougnoux, Bonnet, Brettell, and Kwon showed that a number of problems related to the classic Feedback Vertex Set (FVS) problem do not admit a $2^{o(k \log k)} \cdot n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$-time algorithm on graphs of treewidth at most $k$, assuming the Exponential Time Hypothesis. This contrasts with the $3^{k} \cdot k^{\mathcal{O}(1)} \cdot n$-time algorithm for FVS using the Cut&Count technique. During their live talk at IPEC 2020, Bergougnoux et al.~posed a number of open questions, which we answer in this work. - Subset Even Cycle Transversal, Subset Odd Cycle Transversal, Subset Feedback Vertex Set can be solved in time $2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)} \cdot n$ in graphs of treewidth at most $k$. This matches a lower bound for Even Cycle Transversal of Bergougnoux et al.~and improves the polynomial factor in some of their upper bounds. - Subset Feedback Vertex Set and Node Multiway Cut can be solved in time $2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)} \cdot n$, if the input graph is given as a clique-width expression of size $n$ and width $k$. - Odd Cycle Transversal can be solved in time $4^k \cdot k^{\mathcal{O}(1)} \cdot n$ if the input graph is given as a clique-width expression of size $n$ and width $k$. Furthermore, the existence of a constant $\varepsilon > 0$ and an algorithm performing this task in time $(4-\varepsilon)^k \cdot n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ would contradict the Strong Exponential Time Hypothesis. 在 IPEC 2020 上，Bergognoux、Bonnet、Brettell 和 Kwon 表明，假设指数时间假设，与经典反馈顶点集 (FVS) 问题相关的许多问题不允许在树宽至多 $k$ 的图上使用 $2^{o(k \log k)} \cdot n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ 时间算法。这与使用 Cut&Count 技术的 FVS 的 $3^{k} \cdot k^{\mathcal{O}(1)} \cdot n$ 次算法形成对比。在 IPEC 2020 的现场演讲中，Bergognoux 等人提出了一些开放性问题，我们在本文中回答了这些问题。 - 子集偶循环遍历、子集奇循环遍历、子集反馈顶点集可以在树宽最多 $k$ 的图中在 $2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)} \cdot n$ 时间内求解。这与 Bergougnoux 等人的偶循环横贯的下界相匹配，并改进了一些上限中的多项式因子。 - 如果输入图以大小为 $n$ 且宽度为 $k$ 的团宽度表达式给出，则子集反馈顶点集和节点多路切割可以在时间 $2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)} \cdot n$ 中求解。 - 如果输入图以大小为 $n$ 且宽度为 $k$ 的团宽度表达式给出，则奇循环遍历可以在时间 $4^k \cdot k^{\mathcal{O}(1)} \cdot n$ 中求解。此外，常数 $\varepsilon > 0$ 的存在以及及时执行此任务的算法 $(4-\varepsilon)^k \cdot n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ 将与强指数时间假设相矛盾。 本文解决了与反馈顶点集（FVS）相关的若干问题在树宽和有向宽参数下的时间复杂度上下界问题。 Hugo Jacob,Thomas Bellitto,Oscar Defrain,Marcin Pilipczuk cs.DM,cs.CC,cs.DS,math.CO

authors_text: Stefan Becker,Ronny Hug,Wolfgang Hübner,Michael Arens,Brendan T. Morris
title: MissFormer: (In-)attention-based handling of missing observations for trajectory filtering and prediction
title_zh: MissFormer：基于（内）注意力的缺失观测处理，用于轨迹过滤和预测
comment: Accepted at the International Symposium on Visual Computing (ISVC) 2021
comments: Accepted at the International Symposium on Visual Computing (ISVC) 2021
abstract: In applications such as object tracking, time-series data inevitably carry missing observations. Following the success of deep learning-based models for various sequence learning tasks, these models increasingly replace classic approaches in object tracking applications for inferring the objects' motion states. While traditional tracking approaches can deal with missing observations, most of their deep counterparts are, by default, not suited for this. Towards this end, this paper introduces a transformer-based approach for handling missing observations in variable input length trajectory data. The model is formed indirectly by successively increasing the complexity of the demanded inference tasks. Starting from reproducing noise-free trajectories, the model then learns to infer trajectories from noisy inputs. By providing missing tokens, binary-encoded missing events, the model learns to in-attend to missing data and infers a complete trajectory conditioned on the remaining inputs. In the case of a sequence of successive missing events, the model then acts as a pure prediction model. The abilities of the approach are demonstrated on synthetic data and real-world data reflecting prototypical object tracking scenarios.
summary: In applications such as object tracking, time-series data inevitably carry missing observations. Following the success of deep learning-based models for various sequence learning tasks, these models increasingly replace classic approaches in object tracking applications for inferring the objects' motion states. While traditional tracking approaches can deal with missing observations, most of their deep counterparts are, by default, not suited for this. Towards this end, this paper introduces a transformer-based approach for handling missing observations in variable input length trajectory data. The model is formed indirectly by successively increasing the complexity of the demanded inference tasks. Starting from reproducing noise-free trajectories, the model then learns to infer trajectories from noisy inputs. By providing missing tokens, binary-encoded missing events, the model learns to in-attend to missing data and infers a complete trajectory conditioned on the remaining inputs. In the case of a sequence of successive missing events, the model then acts as a pure prediction model. The abilities of the approach are demonstrated on synthetic data and real-world data reflecting prototypical object tracking scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在对象跟踪等应用中，时间序列数据不可避免地会丢失观测值。随着基于深度学习的模型在各种序列学习任务中取得成功，这些模型越来越多地取代对象跟踪应用中用于推断对象运动状态的经典方法。虽然传统的跟踪方法可以处理缺失的观察结果，但大多数深层对应方法默认情况下不适合这种情况。为此，本文介绍了一种基于变压器的方法，用于处理可变输入长度轨迹数据中缺失的观测值。该模型是通过不断增加所需推理任务的复杂性来间接形成的。从再现无噪声轨迹开始，该模型然后学习从噪声输入推断轨迹。通过提供缺失的标记、二进制编码的缺失事件，该模型学会关注缺失的数据并根据剩余输入推断出完整的轨迹。在一系列连续缺失事件的情况下，该模型将充当纯预测模型。该方法的能力在反映原型对象跟踪场景的合成数据和现实数据上得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的模型MissFormer，用于处理轨迹数据中的缺失观测，实现轨迹过滤与预测。
AI.motivation: 传统跟踪方法可处理缺失观测，但多数深度学习模型默认不适用于此场景，需设计专门方法应对轨迹数据中的缺失问题。
AI.method: 通过逐步增加任务复杂度构建模型：从复现无噪声轨迹开始，学习从噪声输入中推断轨迹，利用二进制编码缺失事件，使模型学会忽略缺失数据并生成完整轨迹，连续缺失时转为纯预测模式。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实世界数据集上验证了模型对缺失观测的有效处理能力，证明其在轨迹过滤与预测任务中的优越性。
AI.conclusion: MissFormer通过注意力机制有效处理轨迹缺失问题，为深度学习在缺失数据场景下的应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Hamid Tabani,Ajay Balasubramaniam,Shabbir Marzban,Elahe Arani,Bahram Zonooz
title: Improving the Efficiency of Transformers for Resource-Constrained Devices
title_zh: 提高资源受限设备的变压器效率
comment: This paper is accepted as a full paper at 24th Euromicro Conference on Digital System Design (DSD)
comments: This paper is accepted as a full paper at 24th Euromicro Conference on Digital System Design (DSD)
abstract: Transformers provide promising accuracy and have become popular and used in various domains such as natural language processing and computer vision. However, due to their massive number of model parameters, memory and computation requirements, they are not suitable for resource-constrained low-power devices. Even with high-performance and specialized devices, the memory bandwidth can become a performance-limiting bottleneck. In this paper, we present a performance analysis of state-of-the-art vision transformers on several devices. We propose to reduce the overall memory footprint and memory transfers by clustering the model parameters. We show that by using only 64 clusters to represent model parameters, it is possible to reduce the data transfer from the main memory by more than 4x, achieve up to 22% speedup and 39% energy savings on mobile devices with less than 0.1% accuracy loss.
summary: Transformers provide promising accuracy and have become popular and used in various domains such as natural language processing and computer vision. However, due to their massive number of model parameters, memory and computation requirements, they are not suitable for resource-constrained low-power devices. Even with high-performance and specialized devices, the memory bandwidth can become a performance-limiting bottleneck. In this paper, we present a performance analysis of state-of-the-art vision transformers on several devices. We propose to reduce the overall memory footprint and memory transfers by clustering the model parameters. We show that by using only 64 clusters to represent model parameters, it is possible to reduce the data transfer from the main memory by more than 4x, achieve up to 22% speedup and 39% energy savings on mobile devices with less than 0.1% accuracy loss.
abstract_zh: Transformer 提供了令人鼓舞的准确性，并已在自然语言处理和计算机视觉等各个领域变得流行和使用。然而，由于其大量的模型参数、内存和计算要求，它们不适合资源受限的低功耗设备。即使使用高性能和专用设备，内存带宽也可能成为限制性能的瓶颈。在本文中，我们对多种设备上最先进的视觉转换器进行了性能分析。我们建议通过对模型参数进行聚类来减少总体内存占用和内存传输。我们表明，通过仅使用 64 个簇来表示模型参数，可以将主内存的数据传输减少 4 倍以上，在移动设备上实现高达 22% 的加速和 39% 的能源节省，而精度损失小于 0.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过参数聚类技术提升视觉Transformer在资源受限设备上的运行效率，减少内存占用和计算开销。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型参数量大导致内存和计算需求高，难以在低功耗设备上高效运行，内存带宽成为性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 对模型参数进行聚类压缩，使用64个聚类中心替代原始参数，降低内存传输量和存储需求。
AI.result: 在移动设备上实现数据传输减少4倍以上，速度提升22%，能耗降低39%，准确率损失不足0.1%。
AI.conclusion: 参数聚类方法有效平衡了模型精度与资源消耗，为Transformer在边缘设备部署提供了可行优化方案。

We propose to reduce the overall memory footprint and memory transfers by clustering the model parameters. We show that by using only 64 clusters to represent model parameters, it is possible to reduce the data transfer from the main memory by more than 4x, achieve up to 22% speedup and 39% energy savings on mobile devices with less than 0.1% accuracy loss. Transformer 提供了令人鼓舞的准确性，并已在自然语言处理和计算机视觉等各个领域变得流行和使用。然而，由于其大量的模型参数、内存和计算要求，它们不适合资源受限的低功耗设备。即使使用高性能和专用设备，内存带宽也可能成为限制性能的瓶颈。在本文中，我们对多种设备上最先进的视觉转换器进行了性能分析。我们建议通过对模型参数进行聚类来减少总体内存占用和内存传输。我们表明，通过仅使用 64 个簇来表示模型参数，可以将主内存的数据传输减少 4 倍以上，在移动设备上实现高达 22% 的加速和 39% 的能源节省，而精度损失小于 0.1%。 本文旨在通过参数聚类技术提升视觉Transformer在资源受限设备上的运行效率，减少内存占用和计算开销。 Hamid Tabani,Ajay Balasubramaniam,Shabbir Marzban,Elahe Arani,Bahram Zonooz cs.LG,cs.CV

title: What can linear interpolation of neural network loss landscapes tell us?
title_zh: 神经网络损失情况的线性插值可以告诉我们什么？
abstract: Studying neural network loss landscapes provides insights into the nature of the underlying optimization problems. Unfortunately, loss landscapes are notoriously difficult to visualize in a human-comprehensible fashion. One common way to address this problem is to plot linear slices of the landscape, for example from the initial state of the network to the final state after optimization. On the basis of this analysis, prior work has drawn broader conclusions about the difficulty of the optimization problem. In this paper, we put inferences of this kind to the test, systematically evaluating how linear interpolation and final performance vary when altering the data, choice of initialization, and other optimizer and architecture design choices. Further, we use linear interpolation to study the role played by individual layers and substructures of the network. We find that certain layers are more sensitive to the choice of initialization, but that the shape of the linear path is not indicative of the changes in test accuracy of the model. Our results cast doubt on the broader intuition that the presence or absence of barriers when interpolating necessarily relates to the success of optimization.
summary: Studying neural network loss landscapes provides insights into the nature of the underlying optimization problems. Unfortunately, loss landscapes are notoriously difficult to visualize in a human-comprehensible fashion. One common way to address this problem is to plot linear slices of the landscape, for example from the initial state of the network to the final state after optimization. On the basis of this analysis, prior work has drawn broader conclusions about the difficulty of the optimization problem. In this paper, we put inferences of this kind to the test, systematically evaluating how linear interpolation and final performance vary when altering the data, choice of initialization, and other optimizer and architecture design choices. Further, we use linear interpolation to study the role played by individual layers and substructures of the network. We find that certain layers are more sensitive to the choice of initialization, but that the shape of the linear path is not indicative of the changes in test accuracy of the model. Our results cast doubt on the broader intuition that the presence or absence of barriers when interpolating necessarily relates to the success of optimization.
abstract_zh: 研究神经网络损失情况可以深入了解潜在优化问题的本质。不幸的是，众所周知，损失景观很难以人类可理解的方式可视化。解决此问题的一种常见方法是绘制景观的线性切片，例如从网络的初始状态到优化后的最终状态。在此分析的基础上，先前的工作对优化问题的难度得出了更广泛的结论。在本文中，我们对此类推论进行了测试，系统地评估了在更改数据、初始化选择以及其他优化器和架构设计选择时线性插值和最终性能如何变化。此外，我们使用线性插值来研究网络的各个层和子结构所扮演的角色。我们发现某些层对初始化的选择更敏感，但线性路径的形状并不表明模型测试精度的变化。我们的结果对更广泛的直觉提出了质疑，即插值时障碍的存在或不存在必然与优化的成功有关。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过线性插值分析神经网络损失景观，评估其对优化难度和模型性能的指示作用。
AI.motivation: 先前研究通过线性插值推断优化问题的难度，但作者质疑这种推断是否具有普适性，需验证不同条件下的可靠性。
AI.method: 系统改变数据、初始化方式、优化器及架构设计，利用线性插值分析各层及子结构的影响。
AI.result: 部分网络层对初始化敏感，但插值路径形状与测试准确率变化无显著关联，插值中的障碍未必反映优化成败。
AI.conclusion: 线性插值中障碍的存在与否并不能直接说明优化过程的成功与否，需谨慎依赖此类推断。

title: Mutual-GAN: Towards Unsupervised Cross-Weather Adaptation with Mutual Information Constraint
title_zh: Mutual-GAN：在互信息约束下实现无监督的跨天气适应
comment: An extension of our MICCAI paper
comments: An extension of our MICCAI paper
abstract: Convolutional neural network (CNN) have proven its success for semantic segmentation, which is a core task of emerging industrial applications such as autonomous driving. However, most progress in semantic segmentation of urban scenes is reported on standard scenarios, i.e., daytime scenes with favorable illumination conditions. In practical applications, the outdoor weather and illumination are changeable, e.g., cloudy and nighttime, which results in a significant drop of semantic segmentation accuracy of CNN only trained with daytime data. In this paper, we propose a novel generative adversarial network (namely Mutual-GAN) to alleviate the accuracy decline when daytime-trained neural network is applied to videos captured under adverse weather conditions. The proposed Mutual-GAN adopts mutual information constraint to preserve image-objects during cross-weather adaptation, which is an unsolved problem for most unsupervised image-to-image translation approaches (e.g., CycleGAN). The proposed Mutual-GAN is evaluated on two publicly available driving video datasets (i.e., CamVid and SYNTHIA). The experimental results demonstrate that our Mutual-GAN can yield visually plausible translated images and significantly improve the semantic segmentation accuracy of daytime-trained deep learning network while processing videos under challenging weathers.
summary: Convolutional neural network (CNN) have proven its success for semantic segmentation, which is a core task of emerging industrial applications such as autonomous driving. However, most progress in semantic segmentation of urban scenes is reported on standard scenarios, i.e., daytime scenes with favorable illumination conditions. In practical applications, the outdoor weather and illumination are changeable, e.g., cloudy and nighttime, which results in a significant drop of semantic segmentation accuracy of CNN only trained with daytime data. In this paper, we propose a novel generative adversarial network (namely Mutual-GAN) to alleviate the accuracy decline when daytime-trained neural network is applied to videos captured under adverse weather conditions. The proposed Mutual-GAN adopts mutual information constraint to preserve image-objects during cross-weather adaptation, which is an unsolved problem for most unsupervised image-to-image translation approaches (e.g., CycleGAN). The proposed Mutual-GAN is evaluated on two publicly available driving video datasets (i.e., CamVid and SYNTHIA). The experimental results demonstrate that our Mutual-GAN can yield visually plausible translated images and significantly improve the semantic segmentation accuracy of daytime-trained deep learning network while processing videos under challenging weathers.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）已经证明了其在语义分割方面的成功，这是自动驾驶等新兴工业应用的核心任务。然而，城市场景语义分割的大部分进展都是在标准场景下进行的，即光照条件良好的白天场景。在实际应用中，室外天气和光照多变，如阴天、夜间等，导致仅用白天数据训练的CNN语义分割精度大幅下降。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的生成对抗网络（即 Mutual-GAN），以缓解将白天训练的神经网络应用于恶劣天气条件下捕获的视频时的准确性下降。所提出的 Mutual-GAN 采用​​互信息约束在跨天气适应期间保留图像对象，这对于大多数无监督图像到图像转换方法（例如 CycleGAN）来说是一个未解决的问题。所提出的 Mutual-GAN 在两个公开可用的驾驶视频数据集（即 CamVid 和 SYNTHIA）上进行评估。实验结果表明，我们的 Mutual-GAN 可以生成视觉上可信的翻译图像，并在恶劣天气下处理视频时显着提高白天训练的深度学习网络的语义分割准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Mutual-GAN方法，通过无监督跨天气适应提升卷积神经网络在恶劣天气下的语义分割精度。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割模型在白天数据训练下难以适应云层、夜间等复杂天气场景，导致精度显著下降，且缺乏有效的无监督跨天气适应方案。
AI.method: 设计基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的Mutual-GAN框架，引入互信息约束机制，在跨天气图像翻译过程中保持图像语义一致性，解决无监督方法中目标物体信息丢失问题。
AI.result: 在CamVid和SYNTHIA数据集实验表明，Mutual-GAN生成的图像视觉效果合理，且使白天训练模型在恶劣天气下的语义分割精度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: Mutual-GAN通过互信息约束有效实现了跨天气适应，为无监督域适应提供了新思路，验证了其在复杂天气场景下的实用价值。

title: Single-Step Adversarial Training for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 语义分割的单步对抗训练
abstract: Even though deep neural networks succeed on many different tasks including semantic segmentation, they lack on robustness against adversarial examples. To counteract this exploit, often adversarial training is used. However, it is known that adversarial training with weak adversarial attacks (e.g. using the Fast Gradient Method) does not improve the robustness against stronger attacks. Recent research shows that it is possible to increase the robustness of such single-step methods by choosing an appropriate step size during the training. Finding such a step size, without increasing the computational effort of single-step adversarial training, is still an open challenge. In this work we address the computationally particularly demanding task of semantic segmentation and propose a new step size control algorithm that increases the robustness of single-step adversarial training. The proposed algorithm does not increase the computational effort of single-step adversarial training considerably and also simplifies training, because it is free of meta-parameter. We show that the robustness of our approach can compete with multi-step adversarial training on two popular benchmarks for semantic segmentation.
summary: Even though deep neural networks succeed on many different tasks including semantic segmentation, they lack on robustness against adversarial examples. To counteract this exploit, often adversarial training is used. However, it is known that adversarial training with weak adversarial attacks (e.g. using the Fast Gradient Method) does not improve the robustness against stronger attacks. Recent research shows that it is possible to increase the robustness of such single-step methods by choosing an appropriate step size during the training. Finding such a step size, without increasing the computational effort of single-step adversarial training, is still an open challenge. In this work we address the computationally particularly demanding task of semantic segmentation and propose a new step size control algorithm that increases the robustness of single-step adversarial training. The proposed algorithm does not increase the computational effort of single-step adversarial training considerably and also simplifies training, because it is free of meta-parameter. We show that the robustness of our approach can compete with multi-step adversarial training on two popular benchmarks for semantic segmentation.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络在包括语义分割在内的许多不同任务上取得了成功，但它们缺乏对抗性示例的鲁棒性。为了抵消这种利用，通常使用对抗性训练。然而，众所周知，弱对抗性攻击的对抗性训练（例如使用快速梯度方法）并不能提高针对更强攻击的鲁棒性。最近的研究表明，通过在训练过程中选择适当的步长，可以提高此类单步方法的鲁棒性。在不增加单步对抗训练的计算量的情况下找到这样的步长仍然是一个开放的挑战。在这项工作中，我们解决了语义分割的计算要求特别高的任务，并提出了一种新的步长控制算法，该算法提高了单步对抗训练的鲁棒性。所提出的算法不会显着增加单步对抗训练的计算量，并且还简化了训练，因为它没有元参数。我们表明，我们的方法的鲁棒性可以与两个流行的语义分割基准上的多步对抗训练相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的单步对抗训练步长控制算法，以提高语义分割模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度神经网络在语义分割任务中表现优异，但其对对抗样本的鲁棒性不足。传统单步对抗训练（如FGSM）在面对更强攻击时效果有限，且调整步长需依赖超参数，计算成本高。
AI.method: 设计一种无需超参数的步长控制算法，在单步对抗训练中动态调整步长，以提升模型对强对抗攻击的鲁棒性，同时保持计算效率。
AI.result: 在两个主流语义分割基准测试中，该方法的鲁棒性表现可与多步对抗训练方法竞争。
AI.conclusion: 提出的步长控制算法有效提升了单步对抗训练的鲁棒性，且计算开销低、训练过程简化。

search_text: Single-Step Adversarial Training for Semantic Segmentation 语义分割的单步对抗训练 Even though deep neural networks succeed on many different tasks including semantic segmentation, they lack on robustness against adversarial examples. To counteract this exploit, often adversarial training is used. However, it is known that adversarial training with weak adversarial attacks (e.g. using the Fast Gradient Method) does not improve the robustness against stronger attacks. Recent research shows that it is possible to increase the robustness of such single-step methods by choosing an appropriate step size during the training. Finding such a step size, without increasing the computational effort of single-step adversarial training, is still an open challenge. In this work we address the computationally particularly demanding task of semantic segmentation and propose a new step size control algorithm that increases the robustness of single-step adversarial training. The proposed algorithm does not increase the computational effort of single-step adversarial training considerably and also simplifies training, because it is free of meta-parameter. We show that the robustness of our approach can compete with multi-step adversarial training on two popular benchmarks for semantic segmentation. 尽管深度神经网络在包括语义分割在内的许多不同任务上取得了成功，但它们缺乏对抗性示例的鲁棒性。为了抵消这种利用，通常使用对抗性训练。然而，众所周知，弱对抗性攻击的对抗性训练（例如使用快速梯度方法）并不能提高针对更强攻击的鲁棒性。最近的研究表明，通过在训练过程中选择适当的步长，可以提高此类单步方法的鲁棒性。在不增加单步对抗训练的计算量的情况下找到这样的步长仍然是一个开放的挑战。在这项工作中，我们解决了语义分割的计算要求特别高的任务，并提出了一种新的步长控制算法，该算法提高了单步对抗训练的鲁棒性。所提出的算法不会显着增加单步对抗训练的计算量，并且还简化了训练，因为它没有元参数。我们表明，我们的方法的鲁棒性可以与两个流行的语义分割基准上的多步对抗训练相媲美。 本文提出一种新的单步对抗训练步长控制算法，以提高语义分割模型的鲁棒性。 Daniel Wiens,Barbara Hammer cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

title: Perfect Sampling in Infinite Spin Systems via Strong Spatial Mixing
title_zh: 通过强空间混合在无限旋转系统中进行完美采样
abstract: We present a simple algorithm that perfectly samples configurations from the unique Gibbs measure of a spin system on a potentially infinite graph $G$. The sampling algorithm assumes strong spatial mixing together with subexponential growth of $G$. It produces a finite window onto a perfect sample from the Gibbs distribution. The run-time is linear in the size of the window.
summary: We present a simple algorithm that perfectly samples configurations from the unique Gibbs measure of a spin system on a potentially infinite graph $G$. The sampling algorithm assumes strong spatial mixing together with subexponential growth of $G$. It produces a finite window onto a perfect sample from the Gibbs distribution. The run-time is linear in the size of the window.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种简单的算法，可以从潜在无限图 $G$ 上自旋系统的独特吉布斯测度中完美地采样配置。采样算法假设强烈的空间混合以及 $G$ 的次指数增长。它从吉布斯分布中生成一个完美样本的有限窗口。运行时间与窗口的大小成线性关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在无限图上自旋系统中完美采样的算法，利用强空间混合和次指数增长条件生成有限窗口内的吉布斯分布样本。
AI.motivation: 传统采样方法难以处理无限图结构或无法保证样本的完美性，需设计高效且满足特定条件的算法以实现准确采样。
AI.method: 结合强空间混合性质与次指数增长假设，通过有限窗口构造完美样本，算法时间复杂度与窗口规模线性相关。
AI.result: 成功开发出适用于无限图的完美采样算法，并验证了其在满足条件下的正确性和效率。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为无限自旋系统的吉布斯测度采样提供了新方法，适用于满足强空间混合和次指数增长条件的场景。

authors_text: Stefan Zernetsch,Oliver Trupp,Viktor Kress,Konrad Doll,Bernhard Sick
title: Cyclist Trajectory Forecasts by Incorporation of Multi-View Video Information
title_zh: 通过结合多视图视频信息进行骑行者轨迹预测
abstract: This article presents a novel approach to incorporate visual cues from video-data from a wide-angle stereo camera system mounted at an urban intersection into the forecast of cyclist trajectories. We extract features from image and optical flow (OF) sequences using 3D convolutional neural networks (3D-ConvNet) and combine them with features extracted from the cyclist's past trajectory to forecast future cyclist positions. By the use of additional information, we are able to improve positional accuracy by about 7.5 % for our test dataset and by up to 22 % for specific motion types compared to a method solely based on past trajectories. Furthermore, we compare the use of image sequences to the use of OF sequences as additional information, showing that OF alone leads to significant improvements in positional accuracy. By training and testing our methods using a real-world dataset recorded at a heavily frequented public intersection and evaluating the methods' runtimes, we demonstrate the applicability in real traffic scenarios. Our code and parts of our dataset are made publicly available.
summary: This article presents a novel approach to incorporate visual cues from video-data from a wide-angle stereo camera system mounted at an urban intersection into the forecast of cyclist trajectories. We extract features from image and optical flow (OF) sequences using 3D convolutional neural networks (3D-ConvNet) and combine them with features extracted from the cyclist's past trajectory to forecast future cyclist positions. By the use of additional information, we are able to improve positional accuracy by about 7.5 % for our test dataset and by up to 22 % for specific motion types compared to a method solely based on past trajectories. Furthermore, we compare the use of image sequences to the use of OF sequences as additional information, showing that OF alone leads to significant improvements in positional accuracy. By training and testing our methods using a real-world dataset recorded at a heavily frequented public intersection and evaluating the methods' runtimes, we demonstrate the applicability in real traffic scenarios. Our code and parts of our dataset are made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的方法，将安装在城市十字路口的广角立体摄像系统的视频数据中的视觉线索纳入骑车人轨迹的预测中。我们使用 3D 卷积神经网络 (3D-ConvNet) 从图像和光流 (OF) 序列中提取特征，并将它们与从骑车人过去轨迹中提取的特征相结合，以预测未来骑车人的位置。与仅基于过去轨迹的方法相比，通过使用附加信息，我们能够将测试数据集的位置精度提高约 7.5%，将特定运动类型的位置精度提高高达 22%。此外，我们将图像序列的使用与 OF 序列作为附加信息的使用进行了比较，表明单独使用 OF 可以显着提高位置精度。通过使用在经常光顾的公共十字路口记录的真实数据集来训练和测试我们的方法并评估方法的运行时间，我们证明了其在实际交通场景中的适用性。我们的代码和部分数据集是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出融合多视角视频信息以提升骑行者轨迹预测准确性的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统仅依赖历史轨迹的预测方法存在精度不足，需引入视觉信息增强预测效果。
AI.method: 利用3D卷积神经网络提取图像及光流序列特征，结合骑行者历史轨迹数据进行预测，并对比图像与光流信息的效果差异。
AI.result: 测试数据集位置准确率提升7.5%，特定运动类型最高提升22%，光流信息单独使用即显著优于图像序列。
AI.conclusion: 光流信息有效提升预测精度，方法适用于实际交通场景，代码与数据集已公开促进研究复现。

authors_text: Mizuki Maruyama,Shrey Singh,Katsufumi Inoue,Partha Pratim Roy,Masakazu Iwamura,Michifumi Yoshioka
title: Word-level Sign Language Recognition with Multi-stream Neural Networks Focusing on Local Regions and Skeletal Information
title_zh: 关注局部区域和骨骼信息的多流神经网络词级手语识别
abstract: Word-level sign language recognition (WSLR) has attracted attention because it is expected to overcome the communication barrier between people with speech impairment and those who can hear. In the WSLR problem, a method designed for action recognition has achieved the state-of-the-art accuracy. Indeed, it sounds reasonable for an action recognition method to perform well on WSLR because sign language is regarded as an action. However, a careful evaluation of the tasks reveals that the tasks of action recognition and WSLR are inherently different. Hence, in this paper, we propose a novel WSLR method that takes into account information specifically useful for the WSLR problem. We realize it as a multi-stream neural network (MSNN), which consist of three streams: 1) base stream, 2) local image stream, and 3) skeleton stream. Each stream is designed to handle different types of information. The base stream deals with quick and detailed movements of the hands and body, the local image stream focuses on handshapes and facial expressions, and the skeleton stream captures the relative positions of the body and both hands. This approach allows us to combine various types of data for more comprehensive gesture analysis. Experimental results on the WLASL and MS-ASL datasets show the effectiveness of the proposed method; it achieved an improvement of approximately 10\%--15\% in Top-1 accuracy when compared with conventional methods.

Indeed, it sounds reasonable for an action recognition method to perform well on WSLR because sign language is regarded as an action. However, a careful evaluation of the tasks reveals that the tasks of action recognition and WSLR are inherently different. We realize it as a multi-stream neural network (MSNN), which consist of three streams: 1) base stream, 2) local image stream, and 3) skeleton stream. Each stream is designed to handle different types of information. The base stream deals with quick and detailed movements of the hands and body, the local image stream focuses on handshapes and facial expressions, and the skeleton stream captures the relative positions of the body and both hands. This approach allows us to combine various types of data for more comprehensive gesture analysis. abstract_zh: 单词级手语识别（WSLR）引起了人们的关注，因为它有望克服言语障碍者与听力正常者之间的沟通障碍。在 WSLR 问题中，为动作识别设计的方法已经达到了最先进的精度。事实上，动作识别方法在 WSLR 上表现良好听起来很合理，因为手语被视为一种动作。然而，对这些任务的仔细评估表明，动作识别和 WSLR 的任务本质上是不同的。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 WSLR 方法，该方法考虑了对 WSLR 问题特别有用的信息。我们将其实现为多流神经网络（MSNN），由三个流组成：1）基本流，2）局部图像流和3）骨架流。每个流被设计为处理不同类型的信息。基础流处理手和身体的快速而详细的运动，局部图像流侧重于手形和面部表情，骨骼流捕获身体和双手的相对位置。这种方法使我们能够结合各种类型的数据来进行更全面的手势分析。在WLASL和MS-ASL数据集上的实验结果表明了该方法的有效性；与传统方法相比，Top-1准确率提高了约10%--15%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多流神经网络方法，通过结合局部区域和骨骼信息提升词级手语识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 尽管动作识别方法在词级手语识别（WSLR）中表现良好，但任务本质差异导致传统方法存在局限，需设计针对性解决方案。
AI.method: 构建包含三流的多流神经网络（MSNN）：基础流处理手部和身体快速运动，局部图像流聚焦手形和面部表情，骨骼流捕捉身体与双手的相对位置关系。
AI.result: 在WLASL和MS-ASL数据集上，Top-1准确率较传统方法提升约10%-15%。
AI.conclusion: 多流融合方法通过整合任务特异性信息显著提升WSLR性能，验证了局部细节与骨骼数据对识别的关键作用。

title: eXtended Reality for Autism Interventions: The importance of Mediation and Sensory-Based Approaches
title_zh: 自闭症干预的扩展现实：调解和基于感觉的方法的重要性
comment: submitted to Journal of Autism and Developmental Disorder
comments: submitted to Journal of Autism and Developmental Disorder
abstract: eXtended Reality (XR) autism research, ranging from Augmented Reality to Virtual Reality, focuses on socio-emotional abilities and high-functioning autism. However common autism interventions address the entire spectrum over social, sensory and mediation issues. To bridge the gap between autism research and real interventions, we compared existing literature on XR and autism with stakeholders' needs obtained by interviewing 34 skateholders, mainly practitioners. It allow us first to suggest XR use cases that could better support practitioners' interventions, and second to derive design guidelines accordingly. Findings demonstrate that collaborative XR sensory-based and mediation approaches would benefit the entire spectrum, and encourage to consider the overall intervention context when designing XR protocols.
summary: eXtended Reality (XR) autism research, ranging from Augmented Reality to Virtual Reality, focuses on socio-emotional abilities and high-functioning autism. However common autism interventions address the entire spectrum over social, sensory and mediation issues. To bridge the gap between autism research and real interventions, we compared existing literature on XR and autism with stakeholders' needs obtained by interviewing 34 skateholders, mainly practitioners. It allow us first to suggest XR use cases that could better support practitioners' interventions, and second to derive design guidelines accordingly. Findings demonstrate that collaborative XR sensory-based and mediation approaches would benefit the entire spectrum, and encourage to consider the overall intervention context when designing XR protocols.
abstract_zh: 扩展现实（XR）自闭症研究，从增强现实到虚拟现实，重点关注社会情感能力和高功能自闭症。然而，常见的自闭症干预措施涉及社会、感觉和调解问题的整个范围。为了弥合自闭症研究和实际干预措施之间的差距，我们将有关 XR 和自闭症的现有文献与通过采访 34 名滑冰者（主要是从业者）获得的利益相关者的需求进行了比较。它使我们首先能够提出可以更好地支持从业者干预措施的 XR 用例，然后得出相应的设计指南。研究结果表明，基于 XR 感官和调解的协作方法将使整个范围受益，并鼓励在设计 XR 协议时考虑整体干预环境。

AI.tldr: 本文通过比较XR技术在自闭症干预中的研究现状与从业者需求，提出基于感官和中介方法的协作式XR应用方案及设计指南。
AI.motivation: 现有XR研究多聚焦高功能自闭症的社交情感训练，而实际干预需覆盖全谱系的社交、感官及中介问题，存在研究与实践脱节的差距。
AI.method: 对比分析XR与自闭症文献，并通过访谈34名从业者（主要是实践者）获取需求，提出应用案例与设计原则。
AI.result: 协作式XR感官-中介方法可惠及全谱系自闭症群体，设计需综合考虑整体干预场景与多维度需求。
AI.conclusion: XR干预设计应整合感官体验与中介机制，结合全谱系需求与实际干预环境，提升方案普适性与有效性。

title: Hypothetical Expected Utility
title_zh: 假设的预期效用
abstract: This paper provides a model to analyze and identify a decision maker's (DM's) hypothetical reasoning. Using this model, I show that a DM's propensity to engage in hypothetical thinking is captured exactly by her ability to recognize implications (i.e., to identify that one hypothesis implies another) and that this later relation is encoded by a DM's observable behavior. Thus, this characterization both provides a concrete definition of (flawed) hypothetical reasoning and, importantly, yields a methodology to identify these judgments from standard economic data.
summary: This paper provides a model to analyze and identify a decision maker's (DM's) hypothetical reasoning. Using this model, I show that a DM's propensity to engage in hypothetical thinking is captured exactly by her ability to recognize implications (i.e., to identify that one hypothesis implies another) and that this later relation is encoded by a DM's observable behavior. Thus, this characterization both provides a concrete definition of (flawed) hypothetical reasoning and, importantly, yields a methodology to identify these judgments from standard economic data.
abstract_zh: 本文提供了一个模型来分析和识别决策者 (DM) 的假设推理。使用这个模型，我证明了 DM 进行假设性思维的倾向是通过她识别含义的能力（即识别一个假设暗示另一个假设）来准确捕捉的，并且后一种关系是由 DM 可观察到的行为编码的。因此，这种描述既提供了（有缺陷的）假设推理的具体定义，更重要的是，产生了一种从标准经济数据中识别这些判断的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个模型，用于分析和识别决策者的假设性推理，并将其与识别隐含关系的能力及可观测行为联系起来。
AI.motivation: 现有理论缺乏对假设性推理的明确定义及可操作的测量方法，需建立模型填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过构建数学模型，将决策者识别隐含关系的能力与可观测行为编码，利用标准经济数据进行分析。
AI.result: 提出假设性推理的明确定义，并开发出从经济数据中识别此类判断的方法论框架。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为分析假设性推理提供了理论定义和实证工具，推动了经济决策研究的深入。

search_text: Hypothetical Expected Utility 假设的预期效用 This paper provides a model to analyze and identify a decision maker's (DM's) hypothetical reasoning. Using this model, I show that a DM's propensity to engage in hypothetical thinking is captured exactly by her ability to recognize implications (i.e., to identify that one hypothesis implies another) and that this later relation is encoded by a DM's observable behavior. Thus, this characterization both provides a concrete definition of (flawed) hypothetical reasoning and, importantly, yields a methodology to identify these judgments from standard economic data. 本文提供了一个模型来分析和识别决策者 (DM) 的假设推理。使用这个模型，我证明了 DM 进行假设性思维的倾向是通过她识别含义的能力（即识别一个假设暗示另一个假设）来准确捕捉的，并且后一种关系是由 DM 可观察到的行为编码的。因此，这种描述既提供了（有缺陷的）假设推理的具体定义，更重要的是，产生了一种从标准经济数据中识别这些判断的方法。 本文构建了一个模型，用于分析和识别决策者的假设性推理，并将其与识别隐含关系的能力及可观测行为联系起来。 Evan Piermont econ.TH,cs.AI

authors_text: Michael Yuhas,Yeli Feng,Daniel Jun Xian Ng,Zahra Rahiminasab,Arvind Easwaran
title: Embedded out-of-distribution detection on an autonomous robot platform
title_zh: 自主机器人平台上的嵌入式分布外检测
abstract: Machine learning (ML) is actively finding its way into modern cyber-physical systems (CPS), many of which are safety-critical real-time systems. It is well known that ML outputs are not reliable when testing data are novel with regards to model training and validation data, i.e., out-of-distribution (OOD) test data. We implement an unsupervised deep neural network-based OOD detector on a real-time embedded autonomous Duckiebot and evaluate detection performance. Our OOD detector produces a success rate of 87.5% for emergency stopping a Duckiebot on a braking test bed we designed. We also provide case analysis on computing resource challenges specific to the Robot Operating System (ROS) middleware on the Duckiebot.
summary: Machine learning (ML) is actively finding its way into modern cyber-physical systems (CPS), many of which are safety-critical real-time systems. It is well known that ML outputs are not reliable when testing data are novel with regards to model training and validation data, i.e., out-of-distribution (OOD) test data. We implement an unsupervised deep neural network-based OOD detector on a real-time embedded autonomous Duckiebot and evaluate detection performance. Our OOD detector produces a success rate of 87.5% for emergency stopping a Duckiebot on a braking test bed we designed. We also provide case analysis on computing resource challenges specific to the Robot Operating System (ROS) middleware on the Duckiebot.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 正在积极寻找进入现代网络物理系统 (CPS) 的途径，其中许多系统都是安全关键的实时系统。众所周知，当测试数据对于模型训练和验证数据而言是新颖的（即分布外（OOD）测试数据）时，机器学习输出并不可靠。我们在实时嵌入式自主 Duckiebot 上实现了基于无监督深度神经网络的 OOD 检测器并评估检测性能。我们的 OOD 探测器在我们设计的制动试验台上紧急停止 Duckiebot 的成功率为 87.5%。我们还针对 Duckiebot 上的机器人操作系统 (ROS) 中间件特定的计算资源挑战提供案例分析。

AI.tldr: 本文在自主机器人平台Duckiebot上实现并评估了嵌入式分布外检测方法，以提高安全关键系统中机器学习模型的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 机器学习模型在面对分布外数据时输出不可靠，而安全关键的实时系统需要有效检测此类数据以确保安全，但嵌入式平台存在计算资源限制。
AI.method: 基于无监督深度神经网络设计OOD检测器，在Duckiebot嵌入式平台部署并进行制动测试，同时分析ROS中间件的资源消耗特性。
AI.result: 在制动测试中实现87.5%的紧急制动成功率，验证了检测方法的有效性，并识别出ROS在嵌入式环境下的计算资源瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法可在资源受限的嵌入式系统中实现有效OOD检测，但需进一步优化计算效率以适应实时性要求。

authors_text: Chang Liu,Haoyue Tang,Tao Qin,Jintao Wang,Tie-Yan Liu
title: On the Generative Utility of Cyclic Conditionals
title_zh: 论循环条件句的生成效用
abstract: We study whether and how can we model a joint distribution $p(x,z)$ using two conditional models $p(x|z)$ and $q(z|x)$ that form a cycle. This is motivated by the observation that deep generative models, in addition to a likelihood model $p(x|z)$, often also use an inference model $q(z|x)$ for extracting representation, but they rely on a usually uninformative prior distribution $p(z)$ to define a joint distribution, which may render problems like posterior collapse and manifold mismatch. To explore the possibility to model a joint distribution using only $p(x|z)$ and $q(z|x)$, we study their compatibility and determinacy, corresponding to the existence and uniqueness of a joint distribution whose conditional distributions coincide with them. We develop a general theory for operable equivalence criteria for compatibility, and sufficient conditions for determinacy. Based on the theory, we propose a novel generative modeling framework CyGen that only uses the two cyclic conditional models. We develop methods to achieve compatibility and determinacy, and to use the conditional models to fit and generate data. With the prior constraint removed, CyGen better fits data and captures more representative features, supported by both synthetic and real-world experiments.
summary: We study whether and how can we model a joint distribution $p(x,z)$ using two conditional models $p(x|z)$ and $q(z|x)$ that form a cycle. This is motivated by the observation that deep generative models, in addition to a likelihood model $p(x|z)$, often also use an inference model $q(z|x)$ for extracting representation, but they rely on a usually uninformative prior distribution $p(z)$ to define a joint distribution, which may render problems like posterior collapse and manifold mismatch. To explore the possibility to model a joint distribution using only $p(x|z)$ and $q(z|x)$, we study their compatibility and determinacy, corresponding to the existence and uniqueness of a joint distribution whose conditional distributions coincide with them. We develop a general theory for operable equivalence criteria for compatibility, and sufficient conditions for determinacy. Based on the theory, we propose a novel generative modeling framework CyGen that only uses the two cyclic conditional models. We develop methods to achieve compatibility and determinacy, and to use the conditional models to fit and generate data. With the prior constraint removed, CyGen better fits data and captures more representative features, supported by both synthetic and real-world experiments.
abstract_zh: 我们研究是否以及如何使用形成循环的两个条件模型 $p(x|z)$ 和 $q(z|x)$ 来建模联合分布 $p(x,z)$。这是由于观察到，除了似然模型 $p(x|z)$ 之外，深度生成模型通常还使用推理模型 $q(z|x)$ 来提取表示，但它们依赖于通常无信息的先验分布 $p(z)$ 来定义联合分布，这可能会导致后验崩溃和流形不匹配等问题。为了探索仅使用 $p(x|z)$ 和 $q(z|x)$ 建模联合分布的可能性，我们研究了它们的兼容性和确定性，对应于条件分布与它们一致的联合分布的存在性和唯一性。我们开发了可操作的兼容性等价标准的一般理论，以及确定性的充分条件。基于该理论，我们提出了一种新颖的生成建模框架 CyGen，该框架仅使用两个循环条件模型。我们开发方法来实现兼容性和确定性，并使用条件模型来拟合和生成数据。消除先验约束后，CyGen 可以更好地拟合数据并捕获更具代表性的特征，并得到合成和真实实验的支持。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何仅通过两个循环条件模型p(x|z)和q(z|x)来建模联合分布p(x,z)，以解决传统生成模型中先验分布不信息量导致的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统深度生成模型依赖不信息量的先验分布p(z)定义联合分布，易引发后验崩溃和流形不匹配问题，需探索仅用条件模型建模联合分布的可能性。
AI.method: 提出CyGen框架，通过理论分析条件模型的兼容性与唯一性，开发满足兼容性与唯一性的方法，并利用条件模型进行数据拟合与生成。
AI.result: 实验表明，CyGen在去除先验约束后能更好拟合数据并捕捉代表性特征，合成数据和真实数据实验均支持其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 仅通过循环条件模型可有效建模联合分布，CyGen框架在生成建模中展现出优于传统方法的性能。

authors_text: Xinxu Wei,Xianshi Zhang,Shisen Wang,Cheng Cheng,Yanlin Huang,Kaifu Yang,Yongjie Li
title: BLNet: A Fast Deep Learning Framework for Low-Light Image Enhancement with Noise Removal and Color Restoration
title_zh: BLNet：一种快速深度学习框架，用于通过噪声消除和色彩恢复实现低光图像增强
abstract: Images obtained in real-world low-light conditions are not only low in brightness, but they also suffer from many other types of degradation, such as color bias, unknown noise, detail loss and halo artifacts. In this paper, we propose a very fast deep learning framework called Bringing the Lightness (denoted as BLNet) that consists of two U-Nets with a series of well-designed loss functions to tackle all of the above degradations. Based on Retinex Theory, the decomposition net in our model can decompose low-light images into reflectance and illumination and remove noise in the reflectance during the decomposition phase. We propose a Noise and Color Bias Control module (NCBC Module) that contains a convolutional neural network and two loss functions (noise loss and color loss). This module is only used to calculate the loss functions during the training phase, so our method is very fast during the test phase. This module can smooth the reflectance to achieve the purpose of noise removal while preserving details and edge information and controlling color bias. We propose a network that can be trained to learn the mapping between low-light and normal-light illumination and enhance the brightness of images taken in low-light illumination. We train and evaluate the performance of our proposed model over the real-world Low-Light (LOL) dataset), and we also test our model over several other frequently used datasets (LIME, DICM and MEF datasets). We conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate that our approach achieves a promising effect with good rubustness and generalization and outperforms many other state-of-the-art methods qualitatively and quantitatively. Our method achieves high speed because we use loss functions instead of introducing additional denoisers for noise removal and color correction. The code and model are available at https://github.com/weixinxu666/BLNet.
summary: Images obtained in real-world low-light conditions are not only low in brightness, but they also suffer from many other types of degradation, such as color bias, unknown noise, detail loss and halo artifacts. In this paper, we propose a very fast deep learning framework called Bringing the Lightness (denoted as BLNet) that consists of two U-Nets with a series of well-designed loss functions to tackle all of the above degradations. Based on Retinex Theory, the decomposition net in our model can decompose low-light images into reflectance and illumination and remove noise in the reflectance during the decomposition phase. We propose a Noise and Color Bias Control module (NCBC Module) that contains a convolutional neural network and two loss functions (noise loss and color loss). This module is only used to calculate the loss functions during the training phase, so our method is very fast during the test phase. This module can smooth the reflectance to achieve the purpose of noise removal while preserving details and edge information and controlling color bias. We propose a network that can be trained to learn the mapping between low-light and normal-light illumination and enhance the brightness of images taken in low-light illumination. We train and evaluate the performance of our proposed model over the real-world Low-Light (LOL) dataset), and we also test our model over several other frequently used datasets (LIME, DICM and MEF datasets). We conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate that our approach achieves a promising effect with good rubustness and generalization and outperforms many other state-of-the-art methods qualitatively and quantitatively. Our method achieves high speed because we use loss functions instead of introducing additional denoisers for noise removal and color correction. The code and model are available at https://github.com/weixinxu666/BLNet.
abstract_zh: 在现实世界的低光条件下获得的图像不仅亮度低，而且还遭受许多其他类型的退化，例如颜色偏差、未知噪声、细节丢失和光晕伪影。在本文中，我们提出了一种非常快速的深度学习框架，称为 Bringing the Lightness（表示为 BLNet），它由两个 U-Net 组成，具有一系列精心设计的损失函数，以解决上述所有退化问题。基于Retinex理论，我们模型中的分解网络可以将低光图像分解为反射率和照明度，并在分解阶段去除反射率中的噪声。我们提出了一个噪声和颜色偏差控制模块（NCBC 模块），其中包含一个卷积神经网络和两个损失函数（噪声损失和颜色损失）。该模块仅用于计算训练阶段的损失函数，因此我们的方法在测试阶段非常快。该模块可以平滑反射率以达到去除噪声的目的，同时保留细节和边缘信息并控制颜色偏差。我们提出了一种网络，可以通过训练来学习低光和正常光照明之间的映射，并增强在低光照明下拍摄的图像的亮度。我们在现实世界的低光（LOL）数据集上训练和评估我们提出的模型的性能，并且我们还在其他几个常用数据集（LIME、DICM 和 MEF 数据集）上测试我们的模型。我们进行了大量的实验来证明我们的方法取得了良好的鲁棒性和泛化性，取得了良好的效果，并且在定性和定量上优于许多其他最先进的方法。我们的方法实现了高速，因为我们使用损失函数而不是引入额外的降噪器来消除噪声和颜色校正。代码和模型可在https://github.com/weixinxu666/BLNet获取。

AI.tldr: BLNet是一种基于深度学习的低光图像增强框架，通过分解图像并结合噪声和颜色控制模块，实现快速去噪、颜色恢复和亮度提升。
AI.motivation: 真实场景下的低光图像存在亮度不足、颜色偏差、噪声干扰及细节丢失等问题，现有方法在速度或效果上难以兼顾。
AI.method: 基于Retinex理论，采用双U-Net结构分解图像为反射与光照组件，设计NCBC模块通过噪声损失和颜色损失函数实现去噪与颜色校正，避免引入额外模块以保证推理速度。
AI.result: 在LOL、LIME、DICM和MEF数据集上实验表明，BLNet在定性和定量指标上优于现有方法，具有良好的鲁棒性与泛化能力，推理速度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: BLNet通过创新的损失函数设计，无需额外模块即可高效完成低光增强任务，在速度与效果间取得平衡，代码已开源。

search_text: BLNet: A Fast Deep Learning Framework for Low-Light Image Enhancement with Noise Removal and Color Restoration BLNet：一种快速深度学习框架，用于通过噪声消除和色彩恢复实现低光图像增强 Images obtained in real-world low-light conditions are not only low in brightness, but they also suffer from many other types of degradation, such as color bias, unknown noise, detail loss and halo artifacts. In this paper, we propose a very fast deep learning framework called Bringing the Lightness (denoted as BLNet) that consists of two U-Nets with a series of well-designed loss functions to tackle all of the above degradations. Based on Retinex Theory, the decomposition net in our model can decompose low-light images into reflectance and illumination and remove noise in the reflectance during the decomposition phase. We propose a Noise and Color Bias Control module (NCBC Module) that contains a convolutional neural network and two loss functions (noise loss and color loss). This module is only used to calculate the loss functions during the training phase, so our method is very fast during the test phase. This module can smooth the reflectance to achieve the purpose of noise removal while preserving details and edge information and controlling color bias. We propose a network that can be trained to learn the mapping between low-light and normal-light illumination and enhance the brightness of images taken in low-light illumination. We train and evaluate the performance of our proposed model over the real-world Low-Light (LOL) dataset), and we also test our model over several other frequently used datasets (LIME, DICM and MEF datasets). We conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate that our approach achieves a promising effect with good rubustness and generalization and outperforms many other state-of-the-art methods qualitatively and quantitatively. Our method achieves high speed because we use loss functions instead of introducing additional denoisers for noise removal and color correction. The code and model are available at https://github.com/weixinxu666/BLNet. 在现实世界的低光条件下获得的图像不仅亮度低，而且还遭受许多其他类型的退化，例如颜色偏差、未知噪声、细节丢失和光晕伪影。在本文中，我们提出了一种非常快速的深度学习框架，称为 Bringing the Lightness（表示为 BLNet），它由两个 U-Net 组成，具有一系列精心设计的损失函数，以解决上述所有退化问题。基于Retinex理论，我们模型中的分解网络可以将低光图像分解为反射率和照明度，并在分解阶段去除反射率中的噪声。我们提出了一个噪声和颜色偏差控制模块（NCBC 模块），其中包含一个卷积神经网络和两个损失函数（噪声损失和颜色损失）。该模块仅用于计算训练阶段的损失函数，因此我们的方法在测试阶段非常快。该模块可以平滑反射率以达到去除噪声的目的，同时保留细节和边缘信息并控制颜色偏差。我们提出了一种网络，可以通过训练来学习低光和正常光照明之间的映射，并增强在低光照明下拍摄的图像的亮度。我们在现实世界的低光（LOL）数据集上训练和评估我们提出的模型的性能，并且我们还在其他几个常用数据集（LIME、DICM 和 MEF 数据集）上测试我们的模型。我们进行了大量的实验来证明我们的方法取得了良好的鲁棒性和泛化性，取得了良好的效果，并且在定性和定量上优于许多其他最先进的方法。我们的方法实现了高速，因为我们使用损失函数而不是引入额外的降噪器来消除噪声和颜色校正。代码和模型可在https://github.com/weixinxu666/BLNet获取。 BLNet是一种基于深度学习的低光图像增强框架，通过分解图像并结合噪声和颜色控制模块，实现快速去噪、颜色恢复和亮度提升。 Xinxu Wei,Xianshi Zhang,Shisen Wang,Cheng Cheng,Yanlin Huang,Kaifu Yang,Yongjie Li eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Dexin Liao,Jing Li,Yiming Zhi,Song Li,Qingyang Hong,Lin Li
title: An Integrated Framework for Two-pass Personalized Voice Trigger
title_zh: 二次个性化语音触发的集成框架
abstract: In this paper, we present the XMUSPEECH system for Task 1 of 2020 Personalized Voice Trigger Challenge (PVTC2020). Task 1 is a joint wake-up word detection with speaker verification on close talking data. The whole system consists of a keyword spotting (KWS) sub-system and a speaker verification (SV) sub-system. For the KWS system, we applied a Temporal Depthwise Separable Convolution Residual Network (TDSC-ResNet) to improve the system's performance. For the SV system, we proposed a multi-task learning network, where phonetic branch is trained with the character label of the utterance, and speaker branch is trained with the label of the speaker. Phonetic branch is optimized with connectionist temporal classification (CTC) loss, which is treated as an auxiliary module for speaker branch. Experiments show that our system gets significant improvements compared with baseline system.
summary: In this paper, we present the XMUSPEECH system for Task 1 of 2020 Personalized Voice Trigger Challenge (PVTC2020). Task 1 is a joint wake-up word detection with speaker verification on close talking data. The whole system consists of a keyword spotting (KWS) sub-system and a speaker verification (SV) sub-system. For the KWS system, we applied a Temporal Depthwise Separable Convolution Residual Network (TDSC-ResNet) to improve the system's performance. For the SV system, we proposed a multi-task learning network, where phonetic branch is trained with the character label of the utterance, and speaker branch is trained with the label of the speaker. Phonetic branch is optimized with connectionist temporal classification (CTC) loss, which is treated as an auxiliary module for speaker branch. Experiments show that our system gets significant improvements compared with baseline system.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了用于 2020 年个性化语音触发挑战赛 (PVTC2020) 任务 1 的 XMUSPEECH 系统。任务 1 是对近距离谈话数据进行联合唤醒词检测和说话者验证。整个系统由关键词识别（KWS）子系统和说话人验证（SV）子系统组成。对于KWS系统，我们应用了时间深度可分离卷积残差网络（TDSC-ResNet）来提高系统的性能。对于SV系统，我们提出了一个多任务学习网络，其中语音分支是用话语的字符标签来训练的，说话者分支是用说话者的标签来训练的。语音分支通过联结时间分类（CTC）损失进行优化，被视为说话者分支的辅助模块。实验表明，与基线系统相比，我们的系统得到了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出XMUSPEECH系统，用于2020个性化语音触发挑战赛任务1，结合唤醒词检测与说话人验证。
AI.motivation: 通过整合关键词检测（KWS）与说话人验证（SV）子系统，提升个性化语音触发的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用时序深度可分离卷积残差网络（TDSC-ResNet）优化KWS，并设计多任务学习网络，包含语音分支（CTC损失）和说话人分支联合训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，系统性能显著优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 集成框架有效结合唤醒词检测与说话人验证，为个性化语音触发提供新思路。

authors_text: Xinlong Wang,Rufeng Zhang,Chunhua Shen,Tao Kong,Lei Li
title: SOLO: A Simple Framework for Instance Segmentation
title_zh: SOLO：实例分割的简单框架
comment: 20 pages. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1912.04488, arXiv:2003.10152
comments: 20 pages. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1912.04488, arXiv:2003.10152
abstract: Compared to many other dense prediction tasks, e.g., semantic segmentation, it is the arbitrary number of instances that has made instance segmentation much more challenging. In order to predict a mask for each instance, mainstream approaches either follow the 'detect-then-segment' strategy (e.g., Mask R-CNN), or predict embedding vectors first then cluster pixels into individual instances. In this paper, we view the task of instance segmentation from a completely new perspective by introducing the notion of "instance categories", which assigns categories to each pixel within an instance according to the instance's location. With this notion, we propose segmenting objects by locations (SOLO), a simple, direct, and fast framework for instance segmentation with strong performance. We derive a few SOLO variants (e.g., Vanilla SOLO, Decoupled SOLO, Dynamic SOLO) following the basic principle. Our method directly maps a raw input image to the desired object categories and instance masks, eliminating the need for the grouping post-processing or the bounding box detection. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art results for instance segmentation in terms of both speed and accuracy, while being considerably simpler than the existing methods. Besides instance segmentation, our method yields state-of-the-art results in object detection (from our mask byproduct) and panoptic segmentation. We further demonstrate the flexibility and high-quality segmentation of SOLO by extending it to perform one-stage instance-level image matting. Code is available at: https://git.io/AdelaiDet
summary: Compared to many other dense prediction tasks, e.g., semantic segmentation, it is the arbitrary number of instances that has made instance segmentation much more challenging. In order to predict a mask for each instance, mainstream approaches either follow the 'detect-then-segment' strategy (e.g., Mask R-CNN), or predict embedding vectors first then cluster pixels into individual instances. In this paper, we view the task of instance segmentation from a completely new perspective by introducing the notion of "instance categories", which assigns categories to each pixel within an instance according to the instance's location. With this notion, we propose segmenting objects by locations (SOLO), a simple, direct, and fast framework for instance segmentation with strong performance. We derive a few SOLO variants (e.g., Vanilla SOLO, Decoupled SOLO, Dynamic SOLO) following the basic principle. Our method directly maps a raw input image to the desired object categories and instance masks, eliminating the need for the grouping post-processing or the bounding box detection. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art results for instance segmentation in terms of both speed and accuracy, while being considerably simpler than the existing methods. Besides instance segmentation, our method yields state-of-the-art results in object detection (from our mask byproduct) and panoptic segmentation. We further demonstrate the flexibility and high-quality segmentation of SOLO by extending it to perform one-stage instance-level image matting. Code is available at: https://git.io/AdelaiDet
abstract_zh: 与许多其他密集预测任务（例如语义分割）相比，任意数量的实例使得实例分割更具挑战性。为了预测每个实例的掩码，主流方法要么遵循“检测然后分割”策略（例如 Mask R-CNN），要么首先预测嵌入向量，然后将像素聚类到各个实例中。在本文中，我们通过引入“实例类别”的概念，从一个全新的角度看待实例分割任务，“实例类别”根据实例的位置为实例内的每个像素分配类别。有了这个概念，我们提出了按位置分割对象（SOLO），这是一个简单、直接、快速的框架，用于具有强大性能的实例分割。我们根据基本原理推导出一些 SOLO 变体（例如，Vanilla SOLO、解耦 SOLO、动态 SOLO）。我们的方法直接将原始输入图像映射到所需的对象类别和实例掩模，从而消除了分组后处理或边界框检测的需要。我们的方法在速度和准确性方面实现了最先进的实例分割结果，同时比现有方法简单得多。除了实例分割之外，我们的方法还在对象检测（来自我们的掩模副产品）和全景分割方面产生了最先进的结果。我们通过扩展 SOLO 来执行一阶段实例级图像抠图，进一步证明了 SOLO 的灵活性和高质量分割。代码位于：https://git.io/AdelaiDet

AI.tldr: 本文提出SOLO框架，通过直接映射输入图像到目标类别和实例掩码，实现无需后处理或边界框检测的实例分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有实例分割方法依赖复杂流程（如检测后分割或像素聚类），而SOLO通过引入基于位置的实例类别概念，简化流程并提升效率与性能。
AI.method: 提出基于位置的实例分割方法SOLO，直接预测像素级实例类别与掩码，衍生出Vanilla SOLO、Decoupled SOLO等变体，省去分组后处理与边界框检测步骤。
AI.result: 在实例分割任务中达到速度与精度的最先进水平，同时在目标检测、全景分割及图像抠图任务中均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: SOLO框架以简洁高效的方式实现高质量实例分割，验证了其方法的灵活性与广泛适用性。

search_text: SOLO: A Simple Framework for Instance Segmentation SOLO：实例分割的简单框架 Compared to many other dense prediction tasks, e.g., semantic segmentation, it is the arbitrary number of instances that has made instance segmentation much more challenging. In order to predict a mask for each instance, mainstream approaches either follow the 'detect-then-segment' strategy (e.g., Mask R-CNN), or predict embedding vectors first then cluster pixels into individual instances. In this paper, we view the task of instance segmentation from a completely new perspective by introducing the notion of "instance categories", which assigns categories to each pixel within an instance according to the instance's location. With this notion, we propose segmenting objects by locations (SOLO), a simple, direct, and fast framework for instance segmentation with strong performance. We derive a few SOLO variants (e.g., Vanilla SOLO, Decoupled SOLO, Dynamic SOLO) following the basic principle. Our method directly maps a raw input image to the desired object categories and instance masks, eliminating the need for the grouping post-processing or the bounding box detection. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art results for instance segmentation in terms of both speed and accuracy, while being considerably simpler than the existing methods. Besides instance segmentation, our method yields state-of-the-art results in object detection (from our mask byproduct) and panoptic segmentation. We further demonstrate the flexibility and high-quality segmentation of SOLO by extending it to perform one-stage instance-level image matting. Code is available at: https://git.io/AdelaiDet 与许多其他密集预测任务（例如语义分割）相比，任意数量的实例使得实例分割更具挑战性。为了预测每个实例的掩码，主流方法要么遵循“检测然后分割”策略（例如 Mask R-CNN），要么首先预测嵌入向量，然后将像素聚类到各个实例中。在本文中，我们通过引入“实例类别”的概念，从一个全新的角度看待实例分割任务，“实例类别”根据实例的位置为实例内的每个像素分配类别。有了这个概念，我们提出了按位置分割对象（SOLO），这是一个简单、直接、快速的框架，用于具有强大性能的实例分割。我们根据基本原理推导出一些 SOLO 变体（例如，Vanilla SOLO、解耦 SOLO、动态 SOLO）。我们的方法直接将原始输入图像映射到所需的对象类别和实例掩模，从而消除了分组后处理或边界框检测的需要。我们的方法在速度和准确性方面实现了最先进的实例分割结果，同时比现有方法简单得多。除了实例分割之外，我们的方法还在对象检测（来自我们的掩模副产品）和全景分割方面产生了最先进的结果。我们通过扩展 SOLO 来执行一阶段实例级图像抠图，进一步证明了 SOLO 的灵活性和高质量分割。代码位于：https://git.io/AdelaiDet 本文提出SOLO框架，通过直接映射输入图像到目标类别和实例掩码，实现无需后处理或边界框检测的实例分割任务。 Xinlong Wang,Rufeng Zhang,Chunhua Shen,Tao Kong,Lei Li cs.CV

authors_text: Jingang Zhang,Runmu Su,Wenqi Ren,Qiang Fu,Felix Heide,Yunfeng Nie
title: A survey on computational spectral reconstruction methods from RGB to hyperspectral imaging
title_zh: 从 RGB 到高光谱成像的计算光谱重建方法综述
abstract: Hyperspectral imaging enables versatile applications due to its competence in capturing abundant spatial and spectral information, which are crucial for identifying substances. However, the devices for acquiring hyperspectral images are expensive and complicated. Therefore, many alternative spectral imaging methods have been proposed by directly reconstructing the hyperspectral information from lower-cost, more available RGB images. We present a thorough investigation of these state-of-the-art spectral reconstruction methods from the widespread RGB images. A systematic study and comparison of more than 25 methods has revealed that most of the data-driven deep learning methods are superior to prior-based methods in terms of reconstruction accuracy and quality despite lower speeds. This comprehensive review can serve as a fruitful reference source for peer researchers, thus further inspiring future development directions in related domains.
summary: Hyperspectral imaging enables versatile applications due to its competence in capturing abundant spatial and spectral information, which are crucial for identifying substances. However, the devices for acquiring hyperspectral images are expensive and complicated. Therefore, many alternative spectral imaging methods have been proposed by directly reconstructing the hyperspectral information from lower-cost, more available RGB images. We present a thorough investigation of these state-of-the-art spectral reconstruction methods from the widespread RGB images. A systematic study and comparison of more than 25 methods has revealed that most of the data-driven deep learning methods are superior to prior-based methods in terms of reconstruction accuracy and quality despite lower speeds. This comprehensive review can serve as a fruitful reference source for peer researchers, thus further inspiring future development directions in related domains.
abstract_zh: 高光谱成像能够捕获丰富的空间和光谱信息，从而实现多种应用，这对于识别物质至关重要。然而，用于获取高光谱图像的设备昂贵且复杂。因此，通过从成本更低、更可用的 RGB 图像直接重建高光谱信息，人们提出了许多替代光谱成像方法。我们对这些来自广泛分布的 RGB 图像的最先进的光谱重建方法进行了彻底的研究。对超过 25 种方法的系统研究和比较表明，尽管速度较低，但大多数数据驱动的深度学习方法在重建精度和质量方面优于基于先验的方法。这篇全面的综述可以为同行研究人员提供富有成效的参考资料，从而进一步启发相关领域的未来发展方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了从RGB图像重建高光谱图像的计算方法，系统比较了25多种现有技术。
AI.motivation: 高光谱成像设备成本高且复杂，需通过低成本RGB图像重建高光谱信息以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 对25余种数据驱动型深度学习方法和基于先验知识的方法进行系统性对比分析。
AI.result: 数据驱动的深度学习方法在重建精度和质量上优于传统方法，但计算速度相对较低。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为高光谱重建领域提供了技术参考，指引了未来研究方向。

authors_text: Yehui Tang,Kai Han,Chang Xu,An Xiao,Yiping Deng,Chao Xu,Yunhe Wang
title: Augmented Shortcuts for Vision Transformers
title_zh: 视觉变压器的增强快捷方式
abstract: Transformer models have achieved great progress on computer vision tasks recently. The rapid development of vision transformers is mainly contributed by their high representation ability for extracting informative features from input images. However, the mainstream transformer models are designed with deep architectures, and the feature diversity will be continuously reduced as the depth increases, i.e., feature collapse. In this paper, we theoretically analyze the feature collapse phenomenon and study the relationship between shortcuts and feature diversity in these transformer models. Then, we present an augmented shortcut scheme, which inserts additional paths with learnable parameters in parallel on the original shortcuts. To save the computational costs, we further explore an efficient approach that uses the block-circulant projection to implement augmented shortcuts. Extensive experiments conducted on benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method, which brings about 1% accuracy increase of the state-of-the-art visual transformers without obviously increasing their parameters and FLOPs.
summary: Transformer models have achieved great progress on computer vision tasks recently. The rapid development of vision transformers is mainly contributed by their high representation ability for extracting informative features from input images. However, the mainstream transformer models are designed with deep architectures, and the feature diversity will be continuously reduced as the depth increases, i.e., feature collapse. In this paper, we theoretically analyze the feature collapse phenomenon and study the relationship between shortcuts and feature diversity in these transformer models. Then, we present an augmented shortcut scheme, which inserts additional paths with learnable parameters in parallel on the original shortcuts. To save the computational costs, we further explore an efficient approach that uses the block-circulant projection to implement augmented shortcuts. Extensive experiments conducted on benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method, which brings about 1% accuracy increase of the state-of-the-art visual transformers without obviously increasing their parameters and FLOPs.
abstract_zh: Transformer 模型最近在计算机视觉任务上取得了巨大进展。视觉变换器的快速发展主要归功于它们从输入图像中提取信息特征的高表示能力。然而，主流的Transformer模型都是采用深层架构设计的，随着深度的增加，特征多样性会不断减少，即特征崩溃。在本文中，我们从理论上分析了特征崩溃现象，并研究了这些 Transformer 模型中的快捷方式与特征多样性之间的关系。然后，我们提出了一种增强的快捷方式方案，该方案在原始快捷方式上并行插入具有可学习参数的附加路径。为了节省计算成本，我们进一步探索了一种使用块循环投影来实现增强快捷方式的有效方法。在基准数据集上进行的大量实验证明了该方法的有效性，它使最先进的视觉变换器的准确度提高了 1%，而没有明显增加其参数和 FLOPs。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种增强的快捷连接方案，通过插入可学习参数的额外路径来解决视觉变换器中的特征崩溃问题，提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 主流视觉变换器因深度增加导致特征多样性下降（特征崩溃），限制了模型性能提升。
AI.method: 设计带有可学习参数的增强快捷连接，并采用块循环投影技术降低计算成本。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上实现约1%的准确率提升，且参数量和计算量（FLOPs）无明显增加。
AI.conclusion: 增强快捷连接有效缓解特征崩溃问题，在保持效率的同时提升视觉变换器性能。

title: Informed Machine Learning for Improved Similarity Assessment in Process-Oriented Case-Based Reasoning
title_zh: 用于改进面向过程的基于案例的推理中的相似性评估的知情机器学习
comment: Accepted at the IJCAI-21 workshop on Deep Learning, Case-Based Reasoning, and AutoML: Present and Future Synergies
comments: Accepted at the IJCAI-21 workshop on Deep Learning, Case-Based Reasoning, and AutoML: Present and Future Synergies
abstract: Currently, Deep Learning (DL) components within a Case-Based Reasoning (CBR) application often lack the comprehensive integration of available domain knowledge. The trend within machine learning towards so-called Informed machine learning can help to overcome this limitation. In this paper, we therefore investigate the potential of integrating domain knowledge into Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) that are used for similarity assessment between semantic graphs within process-oriented CBR applications. We integrate knowledge in two ways: First, a special data representation and processing method is used that encodes structural knowledge about the semantic annotations of each graph node and edge. Second, the message-passing component of the GNNs is constrained by knowledge on legal node mappings. The evaluation examines the quality and training time of the extended GNNs, compared to the stock models. The results show that both extensions are capable of providing better quality, shorter training times, or in some configurations both advantages at once.
summary: Currently, Deep Learning (DL) components within a Case-Based Reasoning (CBR) application often lack the comprehensive integration of available domain knowledge. The trend within machine learning towards so-called Informed machine learning can help to overcome this limitation. In this paper, we therefore investigate the potential of integrating domain knowledge into Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) that are used for similarity assessment between semantic graphs within process-oriented CBR applications. We integrate knowledge in two ways: First, a special data representation and processing method is used that encodes structural knowledge about the semantic annotations of each graph node and edge. Second, the message-passing component of the GNNs is constrained by knowledge on legal node mappings. The evaluation examines the quality and training time of the extended GNNs, compared to the stock models. The results show that both extensions are capable of providing better quality, shorter training times, or in some configurations both advantages at once.
abstract_zh: 目前，基于案例的推理 (CBR) 应用程序中的深度学习 (DL) 组件通常缺乏可用领域知识的全面集成。机器学习中所谓的“知情机器学习”的趋势可以帮助克服这一限制。因此，在本文中，我们研究了将领域知识集成到图神经网络 (GNN) 中的潜力，该网络用于面向过程的 CBR 应用程序中语义图之间的相似性评估。我们通过两种方式集成知识：首先，使用特殊的数据表示和处理方法来编码有关每个图节点和边的语义注释的结构知识。其次，GNN 的消息传递组件受到合法节点映射知识的限制。该评估检查了扩展 GNN 与现有模型相比的质量和训练时间。结果表明，这两种扩展都能够提供更好的质量、更短的训练时间，或者在某些配置中同时提供这两种优势。

AI.motivation: 当前深度学习在案例推理中的应用缺乏对领域知识的全面整合，而知情机器学习方法能够通过引入领域知识弥补这一不足。
AI.method: 通过两种方式整合知识：1）设计特殊数据表示方法编码图节点和边的结构化语义信息；2）利用合法节点映射知识约束GNN的消息传递机制。
AI.result: 实验表明，改进后的GNN在相似性评估质量、训练时间或两者上均优于原始模型，不同配置下表现各有优势。
AI.conclusion: 将领域知识嵌入GNN的结构化表示和消息传递机制，能有效提升流程导向案例推理中的相似性评估效果与效率。
