search_text: Informed Machine Learning for Improved Similarity Assessment in Process-Oriented Case-Based Reasoning 用于改进面向过程的基于案例的推理中的相似性评估的知情机器学习 Currently, Deep Learning (DL) components within a Case-Based Reasoning (CBR) application often lack the comprehensive integration of available domain knowledge. The trend within machine learning towards so-called Informed machine learning can help to overcome this limitation. In this paper, we therefore investigate the potential of integrating domain knowledge into Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) that are used for similarity assessment between semantic graphs within process-oriented CBR applications. We integrate knowledge in two ways: First, a special data representation and processing method is used that encodes structural knowledge about the semantic annotations of each graph node and edge. Second, the message-passing component of the GNNs is constrained by knowledge on legal node mappings. The evaluation examines the quality and training time of the extended GNNs, compared to the stock models. The results show that both extensions are capable of providing better quality, shorter training times, or in some configurations both advantages at once. 目前，基于案例的推理 (CBR) 应用程序中的深度学习 (DL) 组件通常缺乏可用领域知识的全面集成。机器学习中所谓的“知情机器学习”的趋势可以帮助克服这一限制。因此，在本文中，我们研究了将领域知识集成到图神经网络 (GNN) 中的潜力，该网络用于面向过程的 CBR 应用程序中语义图之间的相似性评估。我们通过两种方式集成知识：首先，使用特殊的数据表示和处理方法来编码有关每个图节点和边的语义注释的结构知识。其次，GNN 的消息传递组件受到合法节点映射知识的限制。该评估检查了扩展 GNN 与现有模型相比的质量和训练时间。结果表明，这两种扩展都能够提供更好的质量、更短的训练时间，或者在某些配置中同时提供这两种优势。 本文研究如何将领域知识整合到图神经网络（GNN）中，以提升流程导向的案例推理（CBR）应用中语义图的相似性评估性能。 Maximilian Hoffmann,Ralph Bergmann cs.AI

authors_text: Anirudh Raju,Milind Rao,Gautam Tiwari,Pranav Dheram,Bryan Anderson,Zhe Zhang,Chul Lee,Bach Bui,Ariya Rastrow
title: On joint training with interfaces for spoken language understanding
title_zh: 关于口语理解接口的联合训练
abstract: Spoken language understanding (SLU) systems extract both text transcripts and semantics associated with intents and slots from input speech utterances. SLU systems usually consist of (1) an automatic speech recognition (ASR) module, (2) an interface module that exposes relevant outputs from ASR, and (3) a natural language understanding (NLU) module. Interfaces in SLU systems carry information on text transcriptions or richer information like neural embeddings from ASR to NLU. In this paper, we study how interfaces affect joint-training for spoken language understanding. Most notably, we obtain the state-of-the-art results on the publicly available 50-hr SLURP dataset. We first leverage large-size pretrained ASR and NLU models that are connected by a text interface, and then jointly train both models via a sequence loss function. For scenarios where pretrained models are not utilized, the best results are obtained through a joint sequence loss training using richer neural interfaces. Finally, we show the overall diminishing impact of leveraging pretrained models with increased training data size.
summary: Spoken language understanding (SLU) systems extract both text transcripts and semantics associated with intents and slots from input speech utterances. SLU systems usually consist of (1) an automatic speech recognition (ASR) module, (2) an interface module that exposes relevant outputs from ASR, and (3) a natural language understanding (NLU) module. Interfaces in SLU systems carry information on text transcriptions or richer information like neural embeddings from ASR to NLU. In this paper, we study how interfaces affect joint-training for spoken language understanding. Most notably, we obtain the state-of-the-art results on the publicly available 50-hr SLURP dataset. We first leverage large-size pretrained ASR and NLU models that are connected by a text interface, and then jointly train both models via a sequence loss function. For scenarios where pretrained models are not utilized, the best results are obtained through a joint sequence loss training using richer neural interfaces. Finally, we show the overall diminishing impact of leveraging pretrained models with increased training data size.
abstract_zh: 口语理解 (SLU) 系统从输入语音中提取与意图和槽相关的文本转录和语义。 SLU 系统通常由 (1) 自动语音识别 (ASR) 模块、(2) 公开 ASR 相关输出的接口模块以及 (3) 自然语言理解 (NLU) 模块组成。 SLU 系统中的接口携带文本转录信息或更丰富的信息，例如从 ASR 到 NLU 的神经嵌入。在本文中，我们研究了界面如何影响口语理解的联合训练。最值得注意的是，我们在公开的 50 小时 SLURP 数据集上获得了最先进的结果。我们首先利用通过文本接口连接的大型预训练 ASR 和 NLU 模型，然后通过序列损失函数联合训练这两个模型。对于不使用预训练模型的场景，通过使用更丰富的神经接口进行联合序列损失训练可以获得最佳结果。最后，我们展示了利用预训练模型和增加训练数据大小的整体影响逐渐减弱。

AI.tldr: 研究接口对口语语言理解系统联合训练的影响，并在SLURP数据集上取得最佳结果。
AI.motivation: 现有SLU系统中接口设计对联合训练效果的影响尚未被充分探索，需明确不同接口类型与训练策略的优化方向。
AI.method: 通过文本接口连接预训练ASR与NLU模型，采用序列损失函数联合训练；在无预训练模型时使用丰富神经接口进行联合训练。
AI.result: 在50小时SLURP数据集上达到SOTA性能，且神经接口在无预训练场景下表现更优，预训练模型效果随数据量增加而减弱。
AI.conclusion: 接口设计显著影响联合训练效果，预训练模型优势在数据量充足时下降，需根据数据规模选择合适训练策略。

title: Positive-unlabeled Learning for Cell Detection in Histopathology Images with Incomplete Annotations
title_zh: 带有不完整注释的组织病理学图像中细胞检测的阳性未标记学习
abstract: Cell detection in histopathology images is of great value in clinical practice. \textit{Convolutional neural networks} (CNNs) have been applied to cell detection to improve the detection accuracy, where cell annotations are required for network training. However, due to the variety and large number of cells, complete annotations that include every cell of interest in the training images can be challenging. Usually, incomplete annotations can be achieved, where positive labeling results are carefully examined to ensure their reliability but there can be other positive instances, i.e., cells of interest, that are not included in the annotations. This annotation strategy leads to a lack of knowledge about true negative samples. Most existing methods simply treat instances that are not labeled as positive as truly negative during network training, which can adversely affect the network performance. In this work, to address the problem of incomplete annotations, we formulate the training of detection networks as a positive-unlabeled learning problem. Specifically, the classification loss in network training is revised to take into account incomplete annotations, where the terms corresponding to negative samples are approximated with the true positive samples and the other samples of which the labels are unknown. To evaluate the proposed method, experiments were performed on a publicly available dataset for mitosis detection in breast cancer cells, and the experimental results show that our method improves the performance of cell detection given incomplete annotations for training.
summary: Cell detection in histopathology images is of great value in clinical practice. \textit{Convolutional neural networks} (CNNs) have been applied to cell detection to improve the detection accuracy, where cell annotations are required for network training. However, due to the variety and large number of cells, complete annotations that include every cell of interest in the training images can be challenging. Usually, incomplete annotations can be achieved, where positive labeling results are carefully examined to ensure their reliability but there can be other positive instances, i.e., cells of interest, that are not included in the annotations. This annotation strategy leads to a lack of knowledge about true negative samples. Most existing methods simply treat instances that are not labeled as positive as truly negative during network training, which can adversely affect the network performance. In this work, to address the problem of incomplete annotations, we formulate the training of detection networks as a positive-unlabeled learning problem. Specifically, the classification loss in network training is revised to take into account incomplete annotations, where the terms corresponding to negative samples are approximated with the true positive samples and the other samples of which the labels are unknown. To evaluate the proposed method, experiments were performed on a publicly available dataset for mitosis detection in breast cancer cells, and the experimental results show that our method improves the performance of cell detection given incomplete annotations for training.
abstract_zh: 组织病理学图像中的细胞检测在临床实践中具有重要价值。 \textit{卷积神经网络}（CNN）已应用于细胞检测以提高检测精度，其中网络训练需要细胞注释。然而，由于细胞的多样性和数量巨大，包含训练图像中每个感兴趣的细胞的完整注释可能具有挑战性。通常，可以实现不完整的注释，其中仔细检查阳性标记结果以确保其可靠性，但可能存在其他阳性实例，即感兴趣的细胞，未包含在注释中。这种注释策略导致缺乏对真实负样本的了解。大多数现有方法只是在网络训练期间将未标记为正面的实例视为真正的负面实例，这可能会对网络性能产生不利影响。在这项工作中，为了解决注释不完整的问题，我们将检测网络的训练制定为正向无标记学习问题。具体来说，修改网络训练中的分类损失以考虑不完整的注释，其中与负样本相对应的项用真实的正样本和标签未知的其他样本进行近似。为了评估所提出的方法，在公开的乳腺癌细胞有丝分裂检测数据集上进行了实验，实验结果表明，在训练注释不完整的情况下，我们的方法提高了细胞检测的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于正样本-未标注样本学习的细胞检测方法，用于解决病理图像中因标注不完整导致的检测性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 病理图像中的细胞检测需要大量标注数据，但完整标注难以实现。现有方法将未标注样本视为负样本可能导致性能下降，需改进标注不完整场景下的检测方法。
AI.method: 将检测网络训练建模为正样本-未标注样本学习问题，通过修正分类损失函数，利用真实正样本和未知样本近似负样本，适应不完整标注场景。
AI.result: 在乳腺癌细胞有丝分裂检测公开数据集上实验表明，该方法在标注不完整情况下显著提升了细胞检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的正样本-未标注样本学习方法有效缓解了病理图像标注不完整性对检测性能的影响，为弱监督细胞检测提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于正样本-未标注样本学习的细胞检测方法，用于解决病理图像中因标注不完整导致的检测性能下降问题。
ai_content.motivation: 病理图像中的细胞检测需要大量标注数据，但完整标注难以实现。现有方法将未标注样本视为负样本可能导致性能下降，需改进标注不完整场景下的检测方法。
ai_content.method: 将检测网络训练建模为正样本-未标注样本学习问题，通过修正分类损失函数，利用真实正样本和未知样本近似负样本，适应不完整标注场景。
ai_content.result: 在乳腺癌细胞有丝分裂检测公开数据集上实验表明，该方法在标注不完整情况下显著提升了细胞检测性能。
ai_content.conclusion: 提出的正样本-未标注样本学习方法有效缓解了病理图像标注不完整性对检测性能的影响，为弱监督细胞检测提供了新思路。

search_text: Positive-unlabeled Learning for Cell Detection in Histopathology Images with Incomplete Annotations 带有不完整注释的组织病理学图像中细胞检测的阳性未标记学习 Cell detection in histopathology images is of great value in clinical practice. \textit{Convolutional neural networks} (CNNs) have been applied to cell detection to improve the detection accuracy, where cell annotations are required for network training. However, due to the variety and large number of cells, complete annotations that include every cell of interest in the training images can be challenging. Usually, incomplete annotations can be achieved, where positive labeling results are carefully examined to ensure their reliability but there can be other positive instances, i.e., cells of interest, that are not included in the annotations. This annotation strategy leads to a lack of knowledge about true negative samples. Most existing methods simply treat instances that are not labeled as positive as truly negative during network training, which can adversely affect the network performance. In this work, to address the problem of incomplete annotations, we formulate the training of detection networks as a positive-unlabeled learning problem. Specifically, the classification loss in network training is revised to take into account incomplete annotations, where the terms corresponding to negative samples are approximated with the true positive samples and the other samples of which the labels are unknown. To evaluate the proposed method, experiments were performed on a publicly available dataset for mitosis detection in breast cancer cells, and the experimental results show that our method improves the performance of cell detection given incomplete annotations for training. 组织病理学图像中的细胞检测在临床实践中具有重要价值。 \textit{卷积神经网络}（CNN）已应用于细胞检测以提高检测精度，其中网络训练需要细胞注释。然而，由于细胞的多样性和数量巨大，包含训练图像中每个感兴趣的细胞的完整注释可能具有挑战性。通常，可以实现不完整的注释，其中仔细检查阳性标记结果以确保其可靠性，但可能存在其他阳性实例，即感兴趣的细胞，未包含在注释中。这种注释策略导致缺乏对真实负样本的了解。大多数现有方法只是在网络训练期间将未标记为正面的实例视为真正的负面实例，这可能会对网络性能产生不利影响。在这项工作中，为了解决注释不完整的问题，我们将检测网络的训练制定为正向无标记学习问题。具体来说，修改网络训练中的分类损失以考虑不完整的注释，其中与负样本相对应的项用真实的正样本和标签未知的其他样本进行近似。为了评估所提出的方法，在公开的乳腺癌细胞有丝分裂检测数据集上进行了实验，实验结果表明，在训练注释不完整的情况下，我们的方法提高了细胞检测的性能。 本文提出一种基于正样本-未标注样本学习的细胞检测方法，用于解决病理图像中因标注不完整导致的检测性能下降问题。 Zipei Zhao,Fengqian Pang,Zhiwen Liu,Chuyang Ye cs.CV

authors_text: Ľuboš Hládek,Stephan D. Ewert,Bernhard U. Seeber
title: Communication conditions in virtual acoustic scenes in an underground station
title_zh: 地铁车站虚拟声学场景的通信状况
abstract: Underground stations are a common communication situation in towns: we talk with friends or colleagues, listen to announcements or shop for titbits while background noise and reverberation are challenging communication. Here, we perform an acoustical analysis of two communication scenes in an underground station in Munich and test speech intelligibility. The acoustical conditions were measured in the station and are compared to simulations in the real-time Simulated Open Field Environment (rtSOFE). We compare binaural room impulse responses measured with an artificial head in the station to modeled impulse responses for free-field auralization via 60 loudspeakers in the rtSOFE. We used the image source method to model early reflections and a set of multi-microphone recordings to model late reverberation. The first communication scene consists of 12 equidistant (1.6 m) horizontally spaced source positions around a listener, simulating different direction-dependent spatial unmasking conditions. The second scene mimics an approaching speaker across six radially spaced source positions (from 1 m to 10 m) with varying direct sound level and thus direct-to-reverberant energy. The acoustic parameters of the underground station show a moderate amount of reverberation (T30 in octave bands was between 2.3 s and 0.6 s and early-decay times between 1.46 s and 0.46 s). The binaural and energetic parameters of the auralization were in a close match to the measurement. Measured speech reception thresholds were within the error of the speech test, letting us to conclude that the auralized simulation reproduces acoustic and perceptually relevant parameters for speech intelligibility with high accuracy.

abstract_zh: 地铁站是城镇中常见的通讯环境：我们与朋友或同事交谈、收听广播或购买花絮，而背景噪音和混响对通讯造成了挑战。在这里，我们对慕尼黑地铁站的两个通信场景进行声学分析并测试语音清晰度。声学条件在该站进行测量，并与实时模拟露天环境 (rtSOFE) 中的模拟进行比较。我们将使用工作站中的人工头测量的双耳房间脉冲响应与通过 rtSOFE 中的 60 个扬声器进行自由场可听的建模脉冲响应进行比较。我们使用图像源方法来模拟早期反射，并使用一组多麦克风录音来模拟后期混响。第一个通信场景由听者周围 12 个等距 (1.6 m) 水平间隔的源位置组成，模拟不同方向相关的空间揭露条件。第二个场景模仿一个接近的扬声器跨越六个径向间隔的源位置（从 1 m 到 10 m），具有不同的直接声级，从而直接到混响能量。地铁站的声学参数显示出中等程度的混响（倍频程T30在2.3 s至0.6 s之间，早期衰减时间在1.46 s至0.46 s之间）。可听的双耳和能量参数与测量结果非常匹配。测量的语音接收阈值在语音测试的误差范围内，让我们得出结论，可听模拟以高精度再现了语音清晰度的声学和感知相关参数。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了地下车站的声学环境对语音通信的影响，通过测量与模拟对比验证了虚拟声学场景的准确性。
AI.motivation: 地下车站存在噪声和混响，影响语音通信质量，需评估实际声学条件并验证模拟方法的可靠性。
AI.method: 在慕尼黑地下车站测量双耳脉冲响应，结合图像源法与多麦克风记录模拟早期反射和晚期混响，对比两个通信场景的声学参数。
AI.result: 模拟结果与实测数据吻合，语音接收阈值误差在允许范围内，证明虚拟声学场景能准确反映实际通信条件。
AI.conclusion: rtSOFE模拟有效还原了地下车站的声学特性，可作为研究语音可懂度的可靠工具。

authors_text: Stefan Fichna,Thomas Biberger,Bernhard U. Seeber,Stephan D. Ewert
title: Effect of acoustic scene complexity and visual scene representation on auditory perception in virtual audio-visual environments
title_zh: 虚拟视听环境中声学场景复杂性和视觉场景表示对听觉感知的影响
comment: Accepted publication in Proceedings of 3DA 2021 International Conference on Immersive and 3D Audio
comments: Accepted publication in Proceedings of 3DA 2021 International Conference on Immersive and 3D Audio
abstract: In daily life, social interaction and acoustic communication often take place in complex acoustic environments (CAE) with a variety of interfering sounds and reverberation. For hearing research and the evaluation of hearing systems, simulated CAEs using virtual reality techniques have gained interest in the context of ecological validity. In the current study, the effect of scene complexity and visual representation of the scene on psychoacoustic measures like sound source location, distance perception, loudness, speech intelligibility, and listening effort in a virtual audio-visual environment was investigated. A 3-dimensional, 86-channel loudspeaker array was used to render the sound field in combination with or without a head-mounted display (HMD) to create an immersive stereoscopic visual representation of the scene. The scene consisted of a ring of eight (virtual) loudspeakers which played a target speech stimulus and nonsense speech interferers in several spatial conditions. Either an anechoic (snowy outdoor scenery) or echoic environment (loft apartment) with a reverberation time (T60) of about 1.5 s was simulated. In addition to varying the number of interferers, scene complexity was varied by assessing the psychoacoustic measures in isolated consecutive measurements orcsimultaneously. Results showed no significant effect of wearing the HMD on the data. Loudness and distance perception showed significantly different results when they were measured simultaneously instead of consecutively in isolation. The advantage of the suggested setup is that it can be directly transferred to a corresponding real room, enabling a 1:1 comparison and verification of the perception experiments in the real and virtual environment.
summary: In daily life, social interaction and acoustic communication often take place in complex acoustic environments (CAE) with a variety of interfering sounds and reverberation. For hearing research and the evaluation of hearing systems, simulated CAEs using virtual reality techniques have gained interest in the context of ecological validity. In the current study, the effect of scene complexity and visual representation of the scene on psychoacoustic measures like sound source location, distance perception, loudness, speech intelligibility, and listening effort in a virtual audio-visual environment was investigated. A 3-dimensional, 86-channel loudspeaker array was used to render the sound field in combination with or without a head-mounted display (HMD) to create an immersive stereoscopic visual representation of the scene. The scene consisted of a ring of eight (virtual) loudspeakers which played a target speech stimulus and nonsense speech interferers in several spatial conditions. Either an anechoic (snowy outdoor scenery) or echoic environment (loft apartment) with a reverberation time (T60) of about 1.5 s was simulated. In addition to varying the number of interferers, scene complexity was varied by assessing the psychoacoustic measures in isolated consecutive measurements orcsimultaneously. Results showed no significant effect of wearing the HMD on the data. Loudness and distance perception showed significantly different results when they were measured simultaneously instead of consecutively in isolation. The advantage of the suggested setup is that it can be directly transferred to a corresponding real room, enabling a 1:1 comparison and verification of the perception experiments in the real and virtual environment.
abstract_zh: 在日常生活中，社交互动和声学交流经常发生在复杂的声学环境（CAE）中，存在各种干扰声音和混响。对于听力研究和听力系统评估，使用虚拟现实技术的模拟 CAE 在生态有效性方面引起了人们的兴趣。在当前的研究中，研究了场景复杂性和场景的视觉表征对虚拟视听环境中声源位置、距离感知、响度、语音清晰度和听力努力等心理声学测量的影响。使用 3 维、86 通道扬声器阵列结合或不结合头戴式显示器 (HMD) 来渲染声场，以创建身临其境的场景立体视觉呈现。该场景由八个（虚拟）扬声器组成的环组成，在多个空间条件下播放目标语音刺激和无意义的语音干扰。模拟了混响时间（T60）约为 1.5 秒的无回声（白雪皑皑的室外风景）或回声环境（阁楼公寓）。除了改变干扰源的数量之外，还通过评估孤立的连续测量或同时评估心理声学测量来改变场景复杂性。结果显示佩戴 HMD 对数据没有显着影响。当同时测量响度和距离感知而不是单独连续测量时，它们显示出显着不同的结果。建议设置的优点是可以直接转移到相应的真实房间，从而能够对真实和虚拟环境中的感知实验进行1:1的比较和验证。

AI.tldr: 研究复杂声学环境和视觉场景表征对虚拟视听环境中听觉感知的影响，包括声音定位、距离感知、响度、言语可懂度和听觉努力等心理声学指标。
AI.motivation: 现实生活中社交互动常发生在复杂声学环境中，需通过虚拟现实技术模拟生态效度场景以评估听力系统及研究听觉机制。
AI.method: 使用86通道三维扬声器阵列结合头戴式显示器（HMD）创建沉浸式视觉场景，通过改变干扰声数量及测量方式（连续或同时测量），在无混响（雪景）和混响（公寓）环境中测试心理声学指标。
AI.result: 佩戴HMD无显著影响，但同时测量相比连续测量显著影响响度和距离感知；该实验设置可直接用于真实房间对比验证。
AI.conclusion: 提出的虚拟环境设置具备真实场景可比性，测量方式对感知结果有显著影响，为听力研究和系统评估提供新方法。

search_text: Effect of acoustic scene complexity and visual scene representation on auditory perception in virtual audio-visual environments 虚拟视听环境中声学场景复杂性和视觉场景表示对听觉感知的影响 In daily life, social interaction and acoustic communication often take place in complex acoustic environments (CAE) with a variety of interfering sounds and reverberation. For hearing research and the evaluation of hearing systems, simulated CAEs using virtual reality techniques have gained interest in the context of ecological validity. In the current study, the effect of scene complexity and visual representation of the scene on psychoacoustic measures like sound source location, distance perception, loudness, speech intelligibility, and listening effort in a virtual audio-visual environment was investigated. A 3-dimensional, 86-channel loudspeaker array was used to render the sound field in combination with or without a head-mounted display (HMD) to create an immersive stereoscopic visual representation of the scene. The scene consisted of a ring of eight (virtual) loudspeakers which played a target speech stimulus and nonsense speech interferers in several spatial conditions. Either an anechoic (snowy outdoor scenery) or echoic environment (loft apartment) with a reverberation time (T60) of about 1.5 s was simulated. In addition to varying the number of interferers, scene complexity was varied by assessing the psychoacoustic measures in isolated consecutive measurements orcsimultaneously. Results showed no significant effect of wearing the HMD on the data. Loudness and distance perception showed significantly different results when they were measured simultaneously instead of consecutively in isolation. The advantage of the suggested setup is that it can be directly transferred to a corresponding real room, enabling a 1:1 comparison and verification of the perception experiments in the real and virtual environment. 在日常生活中，社交互动和声学交流经常发生在复杂的声学环境（CAE）中，存在各种干扰声音和混响。对于听力研究和听力系统评估，使用虚拟现实技术的模拟 CAE 在生态有效性方面引起了人们的兴趣。在当前的研究中，研究了场景复杂性和场景的视觉表征对虚拟视听环境中声源位置、距离感知、响度、语音清晰度和听力努力等心理声学测量的影响。使用 3 维、86 通道扬声器阵列结合或不结合头戴式显示器 (HMD) 来渲染声场，以创建身临其境的场景立体视觉呈现。该场景由八个（虚拟）扬声器组成的环组成，在多个空间条件下播放目标语音刺激和无意义的语音干扰。模拟了混响时间（T60）约为 1.5 秒的无回声（白雪皑皑的室外风景）或回声环境（阁楼公寓）。除了改变干扰源的数量之外，还通过评估孤立的连续测量或同时评估心理声学测量来改变场景复杂性。结果显示佩戴 HMD 对数据没有显着影响。当同时测量响度和距离感知而不是单独连续测量时，它们显示出显着不同的结果。建议设置的优点是可以直接转移到相应的真实房间，从而能够对真实和虚拟环境中的感知实验进行1:1的比较和验证。 研究复杂声学环境和视觉场景表征对虚拟视听环境中听觉感知的影响，包括声音定位、距离感知、响度、言语可懂度和听觉努力等心理声学指标。 Stefan Fichna,Thomas Biberger,Bernhard U. Seeber,Stephan D. Ewert eess.AS,cs.SD

title: Faithful Edge Federated Learning: Scalability and Privacy
title_zh: Faithful Edge 联合学习：可扩展性和隐私
abstract: Federated learning enables machine learning algorithms to be trained over a network of multiple decentralized edge devices without requiring the exchange of local datasets. Successfully deploying federated learning requires ensuring that agents (e.g., mobile devices) faithfully execute the intended algorithm, which has been largely overlooked in the literature. In this study, we first use risk bounds to analyze how the key feature of federated learning, unbalanced and non-i.i.d. data, affects agents' incentives to voluntarily participate and obediently follow traditional federated learning algorithms. To be more specific, our analysis reveals that agents with less typical data distributions and relatively more samples are more likely to opt out of or tamper with federated learning algorithms. To this end, we formulate the first faithful implementation problem of federated learning and design two faithful federated learning mechanisms which satisfy economic properties, scalability, and privacy. Further, the time complexity of computing all agents' payments in the number of agents is $\mathcal{O}(1)$. First, we design a Faithful Federated Learning (FFL) mechanism which approximates the Vickrey-Clarke-Groves (VCG) payments via an incremental computation. We show that it achieves (probably approximate) optimality, faithful implementation, voluntary participation, and some other economic properties (such as budget balance). Second, by partitioning agents into several subsets, we present a scalable VCG mechanism approximation. We further design a scalable and Differentially Private FFL (DP-FFL) mechanism, the first differentially private faithful mechanism, that maintains the economic properties. Our mechanism enables one to make three-way performance tradeoffs among privacy, the iterations needed, and payment accuracy loss.
summary: Federated learning enables machine learning algorithms to be trained over a network of multiple decentralized edge devices without requiring the exchange of local datasets. Successfully deploying federated learning requires ensuring that agents (e.g., mobile devices) faithfully execute the intended algorithm, which has been largely overlooked in the literature. In this study, we first use risk bounds to analyze how the key feature of federated learning, unbalanced and non-i.i.d. data, affects agents' incentives to voluntarily participate and obediently follow traditional federated learning algorithms. To be more specific, our analysis reveals that agents with less typical data distributions and relatively more samples are more likely to opt out of or tamper with federated learning algorithms. To this end, we formulate the first faithful implementation problem of federated learning and design two faithful federated learning mechanisms which satisfy economic properties, scalability, and privacy. Further, the time complexity of computing all agents' payments in the number of agents is $\mathcal{O}(1)$. First, we design a Faithful Federated Learning (FFL) mechanism which approximates the Vickrey-Clarke-Groves (VCG) payments via an incremental computation. We show that it achieves (probably approximate) optimality, faithful implementation, voluntary participation, and some other economic properties (such as budget balance). Second, by partitioning agents into several subsets, we present a scalable VCG mechanism approximation. We further design a scalable and Differentially Private FFL (DP-FFL) mechanism, the first differentially private faithful mechanism, that maintains the economic properties. Our mechanism enables one to make three-way performance tradeoffs among privacy, the iterations needed, and payment accuracy loss.
abstract_zh: 联合学习使机器学习算法能够在多个分散边缘设备的网络上进行训练，而无需交换本地数据集。成功部署联邦学习需要确保代理（例如移动设备）忠实地执行预期算法，而这一点在文献中很大程度上被忽视了。在本研究中，我们首先使用风险界限来分析联邦学习的关键特征，不平衡和非独立同分布。数据，影响代理自愿参与并服从传统联邦学习算法的动机。更具体地说，我们的分析表明，数据分布不太典型且样本相对较多的代理更有可能选择退出或篡改联邦学习算法。为此，我们提出了联邦学习的第一个忠实实现问题，并设计了两种满足经济性、可扩展性和隐私性的忠实联邦学习机制。此外，计算代理数量中所有代理付款的时间复杂度为$\mathcal{O}(1)$。首先，我们设计了一种忠实联邦学习（FFL）机制，通过增量计算来近似 Vickrey-Clarke-Groves（VCG）支付。我们证明它实现了（可能近似）最优性、忠实执行、自愿参与和一些其他经济特性（例如预算平衡）。其次，通过将智能体划分为几个子集，我们提出了一种可扩展的 VCG 机制近似。我们进一步设计了一个可扩展的差分隐私 FFL（DP-FFL）机制，这是第一个保持经济属性的差分隐私忠实机制。我们的机制使人们能够在隐私、所需迭代和支付准确性损失之间进行三向性能权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种可信边缘联邦学习机制（FFL和DP-FFL），解决非独立同分布数据下设备参与度不足及算法篡改问题，兼顾可扩展性与隐私保护。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习研究忽视了设备在非独立同分布数据下可能拒绝参与或篡改算法的激励问题，需设计兼顾经济属性、可扩展性与隐私的可信机制。
AI.method: 基于风险界分析数据分布对设备激励的影响，设计增量计算VCG支付的FFL机制及分组子集的可扩展VCG近似机制，并引入差分隐私构建DP-FFL机制。
AI.result: FFL机制实现近似最优性、自愿参与等经济属性，时间复杂度为O(1)；DP-FFL首次实现隐私保护下的可信机制，支持隐私、迭代次数与支付精度的三向权衡。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过理论分析与机制设计，为非独立同分布场景下的可信联邦学习提供了可扩展、隐私保护的解决方案，推动了联邦学习在边缘计算中的实际应用。

authors_text: Gaia Nicosia,Andrea Pacifici,Ulrich Pferschy,Julia Resch,Giovanni Righini
title: Optimally rescheduling jobs with a LIFO buffer
title_zh: 使用 LIFO 缓冲区优化重新安排作业
abstract: This paper considers single-machine scheduling problems in which a given solution, i.e. an ordered set of jobs, has to be improved as much as possible by re-sequencing the jobs. The need for rescheduling may arise in different contexts, e.g. due to changes in the job data or because of the local objective in a stage of a supply chain \red{that is} not aligned with the given sequence. A common production setting entails the movement of jobs (or parts) on a conveyor. This is reflected in our model by facilitating the re-sequencing of jobs via a buffer of limited capacity accessible by a LIFO policy. We consider the classical objective functions of total weighted completion time, maximum lateness and (weighted) number of late jobs and study their complexity. For three of these problems we present strictly polynomial-time dynamic programming algorithms, while for the case of minimizing the weighted number of late jobs NP-hardness is proven and a pseudo-polynomial algorithm is given.
summary: This paper considers single-machine scheduling problems in which a given solution, i.e. an ordered set of jobs, has to be improved as much as possible by re-sequencing the jobs. The need for rescheduling may arise in different contexts, e.g. due to changes in the job data or because of the local objective in a stage of a supply chain \red{that is} not aligned with the given sequence. A common production setting entails the movement of jobs (or parts) on a conveyor. This is reflected in our model by facilitating the re-sequencing of jobs via a buffer of limited capacity accessible by a LIFO policy. We consider the classical objective functions of total weighted completion time, maximum lateness and (weighted) number of late jobs and study their complexity. For three of these problems we present strictly polynomial-time dynamic programming algorithms, while for the case of minimizing the weighted number of late jobs NP-hardness is proven and a pseudo-polynomial algorithm is given.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑单机调度问题，其中给定的解决方案，即一组有序的作业，必须通过对作业重新排序来尽可能地改进。重新安排的需要可能会在不同的情况下出现，例如由于工作数据的变化或由于供应链某个阶段的本地目标\red{即}与给定序列不相符。常见的生产环境需要在传送带上移动作业（或零件）。这在我们的模型中得到了体现，通过后进先出策略可访问的有限容量的缓冲区来促进作业的重新排序。我们考虑总加权完成时间、最大迟到时间和迟到作业（加权）数量的经典目标函数，并研究它们的复杂性。对于其中三个问题，我们提出了严格的多项式时间动态规划算法，而对于最小化后期作业的加权数量的情况，证明了 NP 难度并给出了伪多项式算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在单机调度问题中，通过有限容量的LIFO缓冲区对给定作业序列进行最优重新排序，以优化经典调度目标函数。
AI.motivation: 实际生产中因数据变化或供应链阶段目标冲突需调整作业顺序，而传送带式生产环境可通过LIFO缓冲区实现灵活调度，需分析不同目标函数的复杂性及求解方法。
AI.method: 针对总加权完成时间、最大延误时间和加权延误作业数等目标，设计动态规划算法并分析其复杂度，对NP难问题提出伪多项式算法。
AI.result: 为三个经典调度问题提出多项式时间动态规划算法，证明加权延误作业数最小化为NP难问题并提供伪多项式算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析与算法设计，解决了LIFO缓冲区约束下单机调度问题的复杂性判定与优化方法，为实际生产调度提供理论支持。

search_text: Optimally rescheduling jobs with a LIFO buffer 使用 LIFO 缓冲区优化重新安排作业 This paper considers single-machine scheduling problems in which a given solution, i.e. an ordered set of jobs, has to be improved as much as possible by re-sequencing the jobs. The need for rescheduling may arise in different contexts, e.g. due to changes in the job data or because of the local objective in a stage of a supply chain \red{that is} not aligned with the given sequence. A common production setting entails the movement of jobs (or parts) on a conveyor. This is reflected in our model by facilitating the re-sequencing of jobs via a buffer of limited capacity accessible by a LIFO policy. We consider the classical objective functions of total weighted completion time, maximum lateness and (weighted) number of late jobs and study their complexity. For three of these problems we present strictly polynomial-time dynamic programming algorithms, while for the case of minimizing the weighted number of late jobs NP-hardness is proven and a pseudo-polynomial algorithm is given. 本文考虑单机调度问题，其中给定的解决方案，即一组有序的作业，必须通过对作业重新排序来尽可能地改进。重新安排的需要可能会在不同的情况下出现，例如由于工作数据的变化或由于供应链某个阶段的本地目标\red{即}与给定序列不相符。常见的生产环境需要在传送带上移动作业（或零件）。这在我们的模型中得到了体现，通过后进先出策略可访问的有限容量的缓冲区来促进作业的重新排序。我们考虑总加权完成时间、最大迟到时间和迟到作业（加权）数量的经典目标函数，并研究它们的复杂性。对于其中三个问题，我们提出了严格的多项式时间动态规划算法，而对于最小化后期作业的加权数量的情况，证明了 NP 难度并给出了伪多项式算法。 本文研究在单机调度问题中，通过有限容量的LIFO缓冲区对给定作业序列进行最优重新排序，以优化经典调度目标函数。 Gaia Nicosia,Andrea Pacifici,Ulrich Pferschy,Julia Resch,Giovanni Righini cs.DS

title: Whose Opinions Matter? Perspective-aware Models to Identify Opinions of Hate Speech Victims in Abusive Language Detection
title_zh: 谁的意见重要？在辱骂性语言检测中识别仇恨言论受害者观点的视角感知模型
abstract: Social media platforms provide users the freedom of expression and a medium to exchange information and express diverse opinions. Unfortunately, this has also resulted in the growth of abusive content with the purpose of discriminating people and targeting the most vulnerable communities such as immigrants, LGBT, Muslims, Jews and women. Because abusive language is subjective in nature, there might be highly polarizing topics or events involved in the annotation of abusive contents such as hate speech (HS). Therefore, we need novel approaches to model conflicting perspectives and opinions coming from people with different personal and demographic backgrounds. In this paper, we present an in-depth study to model polarized opinions coming from different communities under the hypothesis that similar characteristics (ethnicity, social background, culture etc.) can influence the perspectives of annotators on a certain phenomenon. We believe that by relying on this information, we can divide the annotators into groups sharing similar perspectives. We can create separate gold standards, one for each group, to train state-of-the-art deep learning models. We can employ an ensemble approach to combine the perspective-aware classifiers from different groups to an inclusive model. We also propose a novel resource, a multi-perspective English language dataset annotated according to different sub-categories relevant for characterising online abuse: hate speech, aggressiveness, offensiveness and stereotype. By training state-of-the-art deep learning models on this novel resource, we show how our approach improves the prediction performance of a state-of-the-art supervised classifier.
summary: Social media platforms provide users the freedom of expression and a medium to exchange information and express diverse opinions. Unfortunately, this has also resulted in the growth of abusive content with the purpose of discriminating people and targeting the most vulnerable communities such as immigrants, LGBT, Muslims, Jews and women. Because abusive language is subjective in nature, there might be highly polarizing topics or events involved in the annotation of abusive contents such as hate speech (HS). Therefore, we need novel approaches to model conflicting perspectives and opinions coming from people with different personal and demographic backgrounds. In this paper, we present an in-depth study to model polarized opinions coming from different communities under the hypothesis that similar characteristics (ethnicity, social background, culture etc.) can influence the perspectives of annotators on a certain phenomenon. We believe that by relying on this information, we can divide the annotators into groups sharing similar perspectives. We can create separate gold standards, one for each group, to train state-of-the-art deep learning models. We can employ an ensemble approach to combine the perspective-aware classifiers from different groups to an inclusive model. We also propose a novel resource, a multi-perspective English language dataset annotated according to different sub-categories relevant for characterising online abuse: hate speech, aggressiveness, offensiveness and stereotype. By training state-of-the-art deep learning models on this novel resource, we show how our approach improves the prediction performance of a state-of-the-art supervised classifier.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体平台为用户提供言论自由以及交换信息和表达不同意见的媒介。不幸的是，这也导致了旨在歧视他人并针对移民、LGBT、穆斯林、犹太人和妇女等最弱势群体的辱骂内容的增长。由于辱骂性语言本质上是主观的，因此在仇恨言论（HS）等辱骂性内容的注释中可能会涉及高度两极分化的主题或事件。因此，我们需要新的方法来模拟来自不同个人和人口背景的人的相互冲突的观点和意见。在本文中，我们提出了一项深入的研究，以模拟来自不同社区的两极分化观点，假设相似的特征（种族、社会背景、文化等）可以影响注释者对某种现象的看法。我们相信，通过依赖这些信息，我们可以将注释者分为具有相似观点的组。我们可以为每个组创建单独的黄金标准，以训练最先进的深度学习模型。我们可以采用集成方法将来自不同组的视角感知分类器组合成一个包容性模型。我们还提出了一种新颖的资源，即根据与描述在线虐待相关的不同子类别注释的多视角英语数据集：仇恨言论、攻击性、攻击性和刻板印象。通过在这个新颖的资源上训练最先进的深度学习模型，我们展示了我们的方法如何提高最先进的监督分类器的预测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视角感知的模型，通过考虑不同群体的背景差异来改进仇恨言论检测中的意见识别。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体上的仇恨言论具有主观性，不同群体（如移民、LGBT等）对同一现象可能产生冲突的标注意见，传统方法难以准确捕捉这种多样性。
AI.method: 根据标注者的人口统计学特征（如种族、文化背景）将其分组，为每组创建独立的黄金标准数据集，训练群体特定的深度学习模型，并通过集成学习融合多视角分类器。同时构建包含多维度标注（仇恨言论、攻击性、冒犯性等）的新型数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在监督分类任务中显著提升了仇恨言论检测的预测性能，特别是在处理跨群体视角差异时表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模不同群体的视角差异，能够更全面地捕捉仇恨言论的主观性特征，为构建包容性更强的滥用语言检测系统提供新思路。

authors_text: Frauke Wilm,Michaela Benz,Volker Bruns,Serop Baghdadlian,Jakob Dexl,David Hartmann,Petr Kuritcyn,Martin Weidenfeller,Thomas Wittenberg,Susanne Merkel,Arndt Hartmann,Markus Eckstein,Carol I. Geppert
title: Fast whole-slide cartography in colon cancer histology using superpixels and CNN classification
title_zh: 使用超像素和 CNN 分类在结肠癌组织学中进行快速全幻灯片制图
comment: 28 pages, 17 figures, 5 tables, published in SPIE Journal of Medical Imaging
comments: 28 pages, 17 figures, 5 tables, published in SPIE Journal of Medical Imaging
abstract: Automatic outlining of different tissue types in digitized histological specimen provides a basis for follow-up analyses and can potentially guide subsequent medical decisions. The immense size of whole-slide-images (WSI), however, poses a challenge in terms of computation time. In this regard, the analysis of non-overlapping patches outperforms pixelwise segmentation approaches, but still leaves room for optimization. Furthermore, the division into patches, regardless of the biological structures they contain, is a drawback due to the loss of local dependencies. We propose to subdivide the WSI into coherent regions prior to classification by grouping visually similar adjacent pixels into superpixels. Afterwards, only a random subset of patches per superpixel is classified and patch labels are combined into a superpixel label. We propose a metric for identifying superpixels with an uncertain classification and evaluate two medical applications, namely tumor area and invasive margin estimation and tumor composition analysis. The algorithm has been developed on 159 hand-annotated WSIs of colon resections and its performance is compared to an analysis without prior segmentation. The algorithm shows an average speed-up of 41% and an increase in accuracy from 93.8% to 95.7%. By assigning a rejection label to uncertain superpixels, we further increase the accuracy by 0.4%. Whilst tumor area estimation shows high concordance to the annotated area, the analysis of tumor composition highlights limitations of our approach. By combining superpixel segmentation and patch classification, we designed a fast and accurate framework for whole-slide cartography that is AI-model agnostic and provides the basis for various medical endpoints.
summary: Automatic outlining of different tissue types in digitized histological specimen provides a basis for follow-up analyses and can potentially guide subsequent medical decisions. The immense size of whole-slide-images (WSI), however, poses a challenge in terms of computation time. Furthermore, the division into patches, regardless of the biological structures they contain, is a drawback due to the loss of local dependencies. We propose to subdivide the WSI into coherent regions prior to classification by grouping visually similar adjacent pixels into superpixels. Afterwards, only a random subset of patches per superpixel is classified and patch labels are combined into a superpixel label. We propose a metric for identifying superpixels with an uncertain classification and evaluate two medical applications, namely tumor area and invasive margin estimation and tumor composition analysis. The algorithm has been developed on 159 hand-annotated WSIs of colon resections and its performance is compared to an analysis without prior segmentation. The algorithm shows an average speed-up of 41% and an increase in accuracy from 93.8% to 95.7%. By assigning a rejection label to uncertain superpixels, we further increase the accuracy by 0.4%. Whilst tumor area estimation shows high concordance to the annotated area, the analysis of tumor composition highlights limitations of our approach. By combining superpixel segmentation and patch classification, we designed a fast and accurate framework for whole-slide cartography that is AI-model agnostic and provides the basis for various medical endpoints.
abstract_zh: 数字化组织学标本中不同组织类型的自动勾画为后续分析提供了基础，并有可能指导后续的医疗决策。然而，整个幻灯片图像（WSI）的巨大尺寸对计算时间提出了挑战。在这方面，非重叠补丁的分析优于像素分割方法，但仍然留有优化的空间。此外，由于丢失了局部依赖性，无论它们包含什么生物结构，将其划分为一个缺点也是一个缺点。我们建议在分类之前将 WSI 细分为相干区域，方法是将视觉上相似的相邻像素分组为超像素。之后，仅对每个超像素的补丁的随机子集进行分类，并将补丁标签组合成超像素标签。我们提出了一种用于识别具有不确定分类的超像素的指标，并评估两种医学应用，即肿瘤面积和侵入性边缘估计以及肿瘤成分分析。该算法是在 159 个手动注释的结肠切除 WSI 上开发的，并将其性能与没有事先分割的分析进行了比较。该算法平均加速了 41%，准确率从 93.8% 提高到 95.7%。通过为不确定的超像素分配拒绝标签，我们将准确度进一步提高了 0.4%。虽然肿瘤面积估计与注释区域高度一致，但肿瘤成分的分析凸显了我们方法的局限性。通过结合超像素分割和斑块分类，我们设计了一个快速、准确的全幻灯片制图框架，该框架与人工智能模型无关，并为各种医疗端点提供了基础。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合超像素分割和卷积神经网络（CNN）分类的快速全切片图像绘制方法，用于结直肠癌组织学分析。
AI.motivation: 全切片图像（WSI）的尺寸庞大导致计算时间过长，传统基于非重叠区域块的方法存在局部依赖丢失的问题，需优化分割与分类流程。
AI.method: 通过超像素分割将WSI划分为连贯区域，对每个超像素内的随机区域块进行分类并合并标签；引入不确定分类度量，结合肿瘤面积估算和肿瘤组成分析两种医学应用进行验证。
AI.result: 算法平均加速41%，准确率从93.8%提升至95.7%，引入拒绝标签后进一步提升0.4%；肿瘤面积估计与标注高度一致，但肿瘤组成分析存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了快速且准确的全切片图像绘制，具有AI模型无关性，为多种医学终点分析提供基础，但肿瘤组成分析仍需改进。

search_text: Fast whole-slide cartography in colon cancer histology using superpixels and CNN classification 使用超像素和 CNN 分类在结肠癌组织学中进行快速全幻灯片制图 Automatic outlining of different tissue types in digitized histological specimen provides a basis for follow-up analyses and can potentially guide subsequent medical decisions. The immense size of whole-slide-images (WSI), however, poses a challenge in terms of computation time. In this regard, the analysis of non-overlapping patches outperforms pixelwise segmentation approaches, but still leaves room for optimization. Furthermore, the division into patches, regardless of the biological structures they contain, is a drawback due to the loss of local dependencies. We propose to subdivide the WSI into coherent regions prior to classification by grouping visually similar adjacent pixels into superpixels. Afterwards, only a random subset of patches per superpixel is classified and patch labels are combined into a superpixel label. We propose a metric for identifying superpixels with an uncertain classification and evaluate two medical applications, namely tumor area and invasive margin estimation and tumor composition analysis. The algorithm has been developed on 159 hand-annotated WSIs of colon resections and its performance is compared to an analysis without prior segmentation. The algorithm shows an average speed-up of 41% and an increase in accuracy from 93.8% to 95.7%. By assigning a rejection label to uncertain superpixels, we further increase the accuracy by 0.4%. Whilst tumor area estimation shows high concordance to the annotated area, the analysis of tumor composition highlights limitations of our approach. By combining superpixel segmentation and patch classification, we designed a fast and accurate framework for whole-slide cartography that is AI-model agnostic and provides the basis for various medical endpoints. 数字化组织学标本中不同组织类型的自动勾画为后续分析提供了基础，并有可能指导后续的医疗决策。然而，整个幻灯片图像（WSI）的巨大尺寸对计算时间提出了挑战。在这方面，非重叠补丁的分析优于像素分割方法，但仍然留有优化的空间。此外，由于丢失了局部依赖性，无论它们包含什么生物结构，将其划分为一个缺点也是一个缺点。我们建议在分类之前将 WSI 细分为相干区域，方法是将视觉上相似的相邻像素分组为超像素。之后，仅对每个超像素的补丁的随机子集进行分类，并将补丁标签组合成超像素标签。我们提出了一种用于识别具有不确定分类的超像素的指标，并评估两种医学应用，即肿瘤面积和侵入性边缘估计以及肿瘤成分分析。该算法是在 159 个手动注释的结肠切除 WSI 上开发的，并将其性能与没有事先分割的分析进行了比较。该算法平均加速了 41%，准确率从 93.8% 提高到 95.7%。通过为不确定的超像素分配拒绝标签，我们将准确度进一步提高了 0.4%。虽然肿瘤面积估计与注释区域高度一致，但肿瘤成分的分析凸显了我们方法的局限性。通过结合超像素分割和斑块分类，我们设计了一个快速、准确的全幻灯片制图框架，该框架与人工智能模型无关，并为各种医疗端点提供了基础。 该论文提出了一种结合超像素分割和卷积神经网络（CNN）分类的快速全切片图像绘制方法，用于结直肠癌组织学分析。 Frauke Wilm,Michaela Benz,Volker Bruns,Serop Baghdadlian,Jakob Dexl,David Hartmann,Petr Kuritcyn,Martin Weidenfeller,Thomas Wittenberg,Susanne Merkel,Arndt Hartmann,Markus Eckstein,Carol I. title: A Structured Analysis of the Video Degradation Effects on the Performance of a Machine Learning-enabled Pedestrian Detector
title_zh: 视频降质对机器学习行人检测器性能影响的结构化分析
abstract: ML-enabled software systems have been incorporated in many public demonstrations for automated driving (AD) systems. Such solutions have also been considered as a crucial approach to aim at SAE Level 5 systems, where the passengers in such vehicles do not have to interact with the system at all anymore. Already in 2016, Nvidia demonstrated a complete end-to-end approach for training the complete software stack covering perception, planning and decision making, and the actual vehicle control. While such approaches show the great potential of such ML-enabled systems, there have also been demonstrations where already changes to single pixels in a video frame can potentially lead to completely different decisions with dangerous consequences. In this paper, a structured analysis has been conducted to explore video degradation effects on the performance of an ML-enabled pedestrian detector. Firstly, a baseline of applying YOLO to 1,026 frames with pedestrian annotations in the KITTI Vision Benchmark Suite has been established. Next, video degradation candidates for each of these frames were generated using the leading video codecs libx264, libx265, Nvidia HEVC, and AV1: 52 frames for the various compression presets for color and gray-scale frames resulting in 104 degradation candidates per original KITTI frame and 426,816 images in total. YOLO was applied to each image to compute the intersection-over-union (IoU) metric to compare the performance with the original baseline. While aggressively lossy compression settings result in significant performance drops as expected, it was also observed that some configurations actually result in slightly better IoU results compared to the baseline. The findings show that carefully chosen lossy video configurations preserve a decent performance of particular ML-enabled systems while allowing for substantial savings when storing or transmitting data.

Such solutions have also been considered as a crucial approach to aim at SAE Level 5 systems, where the passengers in such vehicles do not have to interact with the system at all anymore. While such approaches show the great potential of such ML-enabled systems, there have also been demonstrations where already changes to single pixels in a video frame can potentially lead to completely different decisions with dangerous consequences. In this paper, a structured analysis has been conducted to explore video degradation effects on the performance of an ML-enabled pedestrian detector. Firstly, a baseline of applying YOLO to 1,026 frames with pedestrian annotations in the KITTI Vision Benchmark Suite has been established. Next, video degradation candidates for each of these frames were generated using the leading video codecs libx264, libx265, Nvidia HEVC, and AV1: 52 frames for the various compression presets for color and gray-scale frames resulting in 104 degradation candidates per original KITTI frame and 426,816 images in total. YOLO was applied to each image to compute the intersection-over-union (IoU) metric to compare the performance with the original baseline. While aggressively lossy compression settings result in significant performance drops as expected, it was also observed that some configurations actually result in slightly better IoU results compared to the baseline. The findings show that carefully chosen lossy video configurations preserve a decent performance of particular ML-enabled systems while allowing for substantial savings when storing or transmitting data.
abstract_zh: 支持机器学习的软件系统已被纳入许多自动驾驶 (AD) 系统的公开演示中。此类解决方案也被认为是实现 SAE 5 级系统的关键方法，在该系统中，此类车辆中的乘客不再需要与系统进行交互。早在 2016 年，Nvidia 就展示了一种完整的端到端方法，用于训练涵盖感知、规划和决策以及实际车辆控制的完整软件堆栈。虽然这些方法显示了此类支持机器学习的系统的巨大潜力，但也有一些演示表明，视频帧中单个像素的更改可能会导致完全不同的决策，从而带来危险的后果。在本文中，进行了结构化分析，以探索视频退化对支持 ML 的行人检测器性能的影响。首先，建立了将 YOLO 应用到 KITTI Vision Benchmark Suite 中带有行人注释的 1,026 帧的基线。接下来，使用领先的视频编解码器 libx264、libx265、Nvidia HEVC 和 AV1 生成每个帧的视频降级候选：针对彩色和灰度帧的各种压缩预设，生成 52 个帧，导致每个原始 KITTI 帧有 104 个降级候选，总共 426,816 个图像。将 YOLO 应用于每个图像以计算交并集 (IoU) 指标，以将性能与原始基线进行比较。虽然激进的有损压缩设置会导致性能显着下降（如预期），但我们还观察到，与基线相比，某些配置实际上会产生稍微更好的 IoU 结果。研究结果表明，精心选择的有损视频配置可以保留特定的支持机器学习的系统的良好性能，同时在存储或传输数据时可以节省大量成本。

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了视频降质对基于机器学习的行人检测器性能的影响，通过对比不同视频编码标准的压缩效果评估检测性能变化。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统依赖机器学习模型进行环境感知，但视频压缩可能引入降质影响检测可靠性，需量化不同编码方案对模型性能的影响以平衡数据存储与安全需求。
AI.method: 以KITTI数据集为基准，使用YOLO检测器处理1,026帧标注数据，通过libx264/x265/HEVC/AV1等编码器生成52种压缩配置的降质样本（共426,816张图像），计算交并比(IoU)评估检测性能变化。
AI.result: 激进的有损压缩导致性能显著下降，但部分配置的压缩方案反而提升了IoU指标，表明特定编码参数可维持检测性能的同时减少数据存储需求。
AI.conclusion: 通过合理选择视频编码参数，可在保证机器学习感知系统性能的前提下实现数据存储与传输成本的显著优化。

The findings show that carefully chosen lossy video configurations preserve a decent performance of particular ML-enabled systems while allowing for substantial savings when storing or transmitting data. 支持机器学习的软件系统已被纳入许多自动驾驶 (AD) 系统的公开演示中。此类解决方案也被认为是实现 SAE 5 级系统的关键方法，在该系统中，此类车辆中的乘客不再需要与系统进行交互。早在 2016 年，Nvidia 就展示了一种完整的端到端方法，用于训练涵盖感知、规划和决策以及实际车辆控制的完整软件堆栈。虽然这些方法显示了此类支持机器学习的系统的巨大潜力，但也有一些演示表明，视频帧中单个像素的更改可能会导致完全不同的决策，从而带来危险的后果。在本文中，进行了结构化分析，以探索视频退化对支持 ML 的行人检测器性能的影响。首先，建立了将 YOLO 应用到 KITTI Vision Benchmark Suite 中带有行人注释的 1,026 帧的基线。接下来，使用领先的视频编解码器 libx264、libx265、Nvidia HEVC 和 AV1 生成每个帧的视频降级候选：针对彩色和灰度帧的各种压缩预设，生成 52 个帧，导致每个原始 KITTI 帧有 104 个降级候选，总共 426,816 个图像。将 YOLO 应用于每个图像以计算交并集 (IoU) 指标，以将性能与原始基线进行比较。虽然激进的有损压缩设置会导致性能显着下降（如预期），但我们还观察到，与基线相比，某些配置实际上会产生稍微更好的 IoU 结果。研究结果表明，精心选择的有损视频配置可以保留特定的支持机器学习的系统的良好性能，同时在存储或传输数据时可以节省大量成本。 本文系统分析了视频降质对基于机器学习的行人检测器性能的影响，通过对比不同视频编码标准的压缩效果评估检测性能变化。 Christian Berger cs.CV

authors_text: Christoph Kirsch,Josef Poppitz,Torben Wendt,Steven van de Par,Stephan D. Ewert
title: Spatial resolution of late reverberation in virtual acoustic environments
title_zh: 虚拟声学环境中后期混响的空间分辨率
abstract: Late reverberation involves the superposition of many sound reflections resulting in a diffuse sound field. Since the spatially resolved perception of individual diffuse reflections is impossible, simplifications can potentially be made for modelling late reverberation in room acoustics simulations with reduced spatial resolution. Such simplifications are desired for interactive, real-time virtual acoustic environments with applications in hearing research and for the evaluation of hearing supportive devices. In this context, the number and spatial arrangement of loudspeakers used for playback additionally affect spatial resolution. The current study assessed the minimum number of spatially evenly distributed virtual late reverberation sources required to perceptually approximate spatially highly resolved isotropic and anisotropic late reverberation and to technically approximate a spherically isotropic diffuse sound field. The spatial resolution of the rendering was systematically reduced by using subsets of the loudspeakers of an 86-channel spherical loudspeaker array in an anechoic chamber. It was tested whether listeners can distinguish lower spatial resolutions for the rendering of late reverberation from the highest achievable spatial resolution in different simulated rooms. Rendering of early reflections was kept fixed. The coherence of the sound field across a pair of microphones at ear and behind-the-ear hearing device distance was assessed to separate the effects of number of virtual sources and loudspeaker array geometry. Results show that between 12 and 24 reverberation sources are required.

abstract_zh: 后期混响涉及许多声音反射的叠加，从而形成扩散声场。由于单个漫反射的空间分辨感知是不可能的，因此可以在空间分辨率降低的情况下对房间声学模拟中的后期混响进行简化建模。这种简化是应用于听力研究和听力支持设备评估的交互式实时虚拟声学环境所需要的。在这种情况下，用于回放的扬声器的数量和空间布置另外影响空间分辨率。当前的研究评估了感知上近似空间高分辨率各向同性和各向异性后期混响以及技术上近似球形各向同性扩散声场所需的空间均匀分布的虚拟后期混响源的最小数量。通过在消声室中使用 86 通道球形扬声器阵列的扬声器子集，系统地降低了渲染的空间分辨率。测试了听众是否能够区分不同模拟房间中后期混响渲染的较低空间分辨率和可实现的最高空间分辨率。早期反射的渲染保持固定。评估耳前一对麦克风和耳后助听器距离的声场相干性，以区分虚拟源数量和扬声器阵列几何形状的影响。结果显示需要 12 到 24 个混响源。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在虚拟声学环境中，感知上近似高度空间解析度的混响所需的最小虚拟声源数量。
AI.motivation: 为了在实时交互式虚拟声学环境中简化混响建模，需确定降低空间解析度的可行范围，以平衡计算效率与感知质量。
AI.method: 通过使用86通道球形扬声器阵列的子集，在消声室中系统降低渲染空间解析度，测试听者能否区分不同解析度的混响，并评估麦克风对的声场相干性以分离声源数量与阵列几何的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，12至24个虚拟混响声源即可在感知上近似高解析度的各向同性和各向异性混响。
AI.conclusion: 减少至12-24个声源可有效维持混响的感知质量，为实时声学模拟和助听设备评估提供技术依据。

title: Experience-Driven PCG via Reinforcement Learning: A Super Mario Bros Study
title_zh: 通过强化学习实现体验驱动的 PCG：《超级马里奥兄弟》研究
comment: This paper is accepted by the 2021 IEEE Conference on Games
comments: This paper is accepted by the 2021 IEEE Conference on Games
abstract: We introduce a procedural content generation (PCG) framework at the intersections of experience-driven PCG and PCG via reinforcement learning, named ED(PCG)RL, EDRL in short. EDRL is able to teach RL designers to generate endless playable levels in an online manner while respecting particular experiences for the player as designed in the form of reward functions. The framework is tested initially in the Super Mario Bros game. In particular, the RL designers of Super Mario Bros generate and concatenate level segments while considering the diversity among the segments. The correctness of the generation is ensured by a neural net-assisted evolutionary level repairer and the playability of the whole level is determined through AI-based testing. Our agents in this EDRL implementation learn to maximise a quantification of Koster's principle of fun by moderating the degree of diversity across level segments. Moreover, we test their ability to design fun levels that are diverse over time and playable. Our proposed framework is capable of generating endless, playable Super Mario Bros levels with varying degrees of fun, deviation from earlier segments, and playability. EDRL can be generalised to any game that is built as a segment-based sequential process and features a built-in compressed representation of its game content.
summary: We introduce a procedural content generation (PCG) framework at the intersections of experience-driven PCG and PCG via reinforcement learning, named ED(PCG)RL, EDRL in short. EDRL is able to teach RL designers to generate endless playable levels in an online manner while respecting particular experiences for the player as designed in the form of reward functions. The framework is tested initially in the Super Mario Bros game. In particular, the RL designers of Super Mario Bros generate and concatenate level segments while considering the diversity among the segments. The correctness of the generation is ensured by a neural net-assisted evolutionary level repairer and the playability of the whole level is determined through AI-based testing. Our agents in this EDRL implementation learn to maximise a quantification of Koster's principle of fun by moderating the degree of diversity across level segments. Moreover, we test their ability to design fun levels that are diverse over time and playable. Our proposed framework is capable of generating endless, playable Super Mario Bros levels with varying degrees of fun, deviation from earlier segments, and playability. EDRL can be generalised to any game that is built as a segment-based sequential process and features a built-in compressed representation of its game content.
abstract_zh: 我们在经验驱动的 PCG 和通过强化学习的 PCG 的交叉点引入了一种程序内容生成 (PCG) 框架，简称 ED(PCG)RL，简称 EDRL。 EDRL 能够教会 RL 设计师以在线方式生成无尽的可玩关卡，同时尊重以奖励函数的形式设计的玩家的特定体验。该框架最初在《超级马里奥兄弟》游戏中进行了测试。特别是，《超级马里奥兄弟》的 RL 设计师在生成并连接关卡片段时，同时考虑了片段之间的多样性。生成的正确性由神经网络辅助进化关卡修复器保证，整个关卡的可玩性由基于人工智能的测试确定。在这个 EDRL 实施中，我们的代理学习通过调节各个级别段的多样性程度来最大限度地量化 Koster 的乐趣原则。此外，我们还测试他们设计随时间变化且可玩的有趣关卡的能力。我们提出的框架能够生成无尽的、可玩的《超级马里奥兄弟》关卡，这些关卡具有不同程度的乐趣、与早期片段的偏差和可玩性。 EDRL 可以推广到任何构建为基于分段的顺序过程并具有游戏内容的内置压缩表示形式的游戏。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合经验驱动与强化学习的程序化内容生成框架EDRL，用于在超级马里奥兄弟游戏中生成无尽且可玩的关卡。
AI.motivation: 传统程序化内容生成难以平衡关卡多样性与可玩性，而强化学习可动态优化生成过程，但需结合玩家体验设计目标进行约束。
AI.method: 基于强化学习的设计师生成关卡片段并拼接，通过神经网络辅助的进化修复器确保生成正确性，AI测试评估可玩性，并量化Koster乐趣原则以调节多样性。
AI.result: 成功生成具有不同乐趣程度、片段多样性及可玩性的超级马里奥关卡，验证框架有效性，且方法可推广至其他基于片段的顺序游戏。
AI.conclusion: EDRL框架通过强化学习与经验驱动结合，实现了符合设计目标的程序化内容生成，为游戏关卡设计提供了可扩展的解决方案。

Moreover, we test their ability to design fun levels that are diverse over time and playable. EDRL can be generalised to any game that is built as a segment-based sequential process and features a built-in compressed representation of its game content. 我们在经验驱动的 PCG 和通过强化学习的 PCG 的交叉点引入了一种程序内容生成 (PCG) 框架，简称 ED(PCG)RL，简称 EDRL。 EDRL 能够教会 RL 设计师以在线方式生成无尽的可玩关卡，同时尊重以奖励函数的形式设计的玩家的特定体验。该框架最初在《超级马里奥兄弟》游戏中进行了测试。特别是，《超级马里奥兄弟》的 RL 设计师在生成并连接关卡片段时，同时考虑了片段之间的多样性。生成的正确性由神经网络辅助进化关卡修复器保证，整个关卡的可玩性由基于人工智能的测试确定。在这个 EDRL 实施中，我们的代理学习通过调节各个级别段的多样性程度来最大限度地量化 Koster 的乐趣原则。此外，我们还测试他们设计随时间变化且可玩的有趣关卡的能力。我们提出的框架能够生成无尽的、可玩的《超级马里奥兄弟》关卡，这些关卡具有不同程度的乐趣、与早期片段的偏差和可玩性。 EDRL 可以推广到任何构建为基于分段的顺序过程并具有游戏内容的内置压缩表示形式的游戏。 本文提出一种结合经验驱动与强化学习的程序化内容生成框架EDRL，用于在超级马里奥兄弟游戏中生成无尽且可玩的关卡。 Tianye Shu,Jialin Liu,Georgios N. Yannakakis cs.AI

title: Decomposing the Prediction Problem; Autonomous Navigation by neoRL Agents
title_zh: 分解预测问题； neoRL Agent 的自主导航
abstract: Navigating the world is a fundamental ability for any living entity. Accomplishing the same degree of freedom in technology has proven to be difficult. The brain is the only known mechanism capable of voluntary navigation, making neuroscience our best source of inspiration toward autonomy. Assuming that state representation is key, we explore the difference in how the brain and the machine represent the navigational state. Where Reinforcement Learning (RL) requires a monolithic state representation in accordance with the Markov property, Neural Representation of Euclidean Space (NRES) reflects navigational state via distributed activation patterns. We show how NRES-Oriented RL (neoRL) agents are possible before verifying our theoretical findings by experiments. Ultimately, neoRL agents are capable of behavior synthesis across state spaces -- allowing for decomposition of the problem into smaller spaces, alleviating the curse of dimensionality.
summary: Navigating the world is a fundamental ability for any living entity. Accomplishing the same degree of freedom in technology has proven to be difficult. The brain is the only known mechanism capable of voluntary navigation, making neuroscience our best source of inspiration toward autonomy. Assuming that state representation is key, we explore the difference in how the brain and the machine represent the navigational state. Where Reinforcement Learning (RL) requires a monolithic state representation in accordance with the Markov property, Neural Representation of Euclidean Space (NRES) reflects navigational state via distributed activation patterns. We show how NRES-Oriented RL (neoRL) agents are possible before verifying our theoretical findings by experiments. Ultimately, neoRL agents are capable of behavior synthesis across state spaces -- allowing for decomposition of the problem into smaller spaces, alleviating the curse of dimensionality.
abstract_zh: 环游世界是任何生物体的基本能力。事实证明，在技术上实现同样的自由度是很困难的。大脑是唯一已知的能够自主导航的机制，这使得神经科学成为我们实现自主性的最佳灵感来源。假设状态表示是关键，我们探索大脑和机器表示导航状态的差异。强化学习 (RL) 需要符合马尔可夫性质的整体状态表示，而欧几里得空间的神经表示 (NRES) 通过分布式激活模式反映导航状态。在通过实验验证我们的理论结果之前，我们展示了面向 NRES 的 RL (neoRL) 智能体是如何成为可能的。最终，neoRL 代理能够跨状态空间进行行为合成——允许将问题分解为更小的空间，从而减轻维数灾难。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经表征欧几里得空间（NRES）的强化学习框架（neoRL），用于实现自主导航中预测问题的分解。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习（RL）依赖单一状态表示难以处理高维导航问题，而大脑通过分布式激活模式实现导航启发了新的状态表征方法。
AI.method: 将神经表征欧几里得空间（NRES）与强化学习结合，通过分布式激活模式表征导航状态，实现状态空间的分解与行为合成。
AI.result: neoRL代理成功分解导航问题至子空间，有效缓解了维度灾难，验证了理论模型的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 受神经科学启发的neoRL框架为自主导航提供了新思路，通过状态空间分解显著提升了复杂环境下的学习效率。

authors_text: Sebastian Doliwa,Muhammad Ayaz Hussain,Tim Sziburis,Ioannis Iossifidis
title: Biologically Inspired Model for Timed Motion in Robotic Systems
title_zh: 机器人系统中定时运动的仿生模型
abstract: The goal of this work is the development of a motion model for sequentially timed movement actions in robotic systems under specific consideration of temporal stabilization, that is maintaining an approximately constant overall movement time (isochronous behavior). This is demonstrated both in simulation and on a physical robotic system for the task of intercepting a moving target in three-dimensional space. Motivated from humanoid motion, timing plays a vital role to generate a naturalistic behavior in interaction with the dynamic environment as well as adaptively planning and executing action sequences on-line. In biological systems, many of the physiological and anatomical functions follow a particular level of periodicity and stabilization, which exhibit a certain extent of resilience against external disturbances. A main aspect thereof is stabilizing movement timing against limited perturbations. Especially human arm movement, namely when it is tasked to reach a certain goal point, pose or configuration, shows a stabilizing behavior. This work incorporates the utilization of an extended Kalman filter (EKF) which was implemented to predict the target position while coping with non-linear system dynamics. The periodicity and temporal stabilization in biological systems was artificially generated by a Hopf oscillator, yielding a sinusoidal velocity profile for smooth and repeatable motion.
summary: The goal of this work is the development of a motion model for sequentially timed movement actions in robotic systems under specific consideration of temporal stabilization, that is maintaining an approximately constant overall movement time (isochronous behavior). This is demonstrated both in simulation and on a physical robotic system for the task of intercepting a moving target in three-dimensional space. Motivated from humanoid motion, timing plays a vital role to generate a naturalistic behavior in interaction with the dynamic environment as well as adaptively planning and executing action sequences on-line. In biological systems, many of the physiological and anatomical functions follow a particular level of periodicity and stabilization, which exhibit a certain extent of resilience against external disturbances. A main aspect thereof is stabilizing movement timing against limited perturbations. Especially human arm movement, namely when it is tasked to reach a certain goal point, pose or configuration, shows a stabilizing behavior. This work incorporates the utilization of an extended Kalman filter (EKF) which was implemented to predict the target position while coping with non-linear system dynamics. The periodicity and temporal stabilization in biological systems was artificially generated by a Hopf oscillator, yielding a sinusoidal velocity profile for smooth and repeatable motion.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目标是在特别考虑时间稳定性的情况下，为机器人系统中的顺序定时运动动作开发运动模型，即保持大致恒定的总体运动时间（等时行为）。这在模拟和物理机器人系统中都得到了证明，该系统用于拦截三维空间中的移动目标。受类人运动的启发，计时对于在与动态环境交互中生成自然行为以及自适应地在线规划和执行动作序列起着至关重要的作用。在生物系统中，许多生理和解剖功能遵循特定水平的周期性和稳定性，表现出一定程度的抵御外部干扰的能力。其主要方面是针对有限的扰动稳定运动时序。尤其是人类手臂的运动，即当它的任务是达到某个目标点、姿势或配置时，会表现出稳定行为。这项工作结合了扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）的利用，该滤波器用于预测目标位置，同时应对非线性系统动力学。生物系统中的周期性和时间稳定性是由 Hopf 振荡器人为产生的，产生平滑且可重复运动的正弦速度分布。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个生物启发的运动模型，用于机器人系统的定时运动，特别关注时间稳定性，通过模拟和物理机器人系统验证其在三维空间拦截移动目标的有效性。
AI.motivation: 模仿生物系统的定时和稳定性机制，使机器人在动态环境中生成自然运动并适应性地规划执行动作序列。
AI.method: 结合扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）预测目标位置并处理非线性动力学，利用Hopf振荡器生成周期性正弦速度曲线以实现时间稳定性。
AI.result: 在仿真和物理机器人系统中成功验证了模型的有效性，实现了对移动目标的稳定拦截及等时性运动控制。
AI.conclusion: 提出的生物启发模型有效结合了时间稳定性与动态目标追踪能力，为机器人系统的定时运动提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Asim Waqas,Ghulam Rasool,Hamza Farooq,Nidhal C. Bouaynaya
title: Exploring Robust Architectures for Deep Artificial Neural Networks
title_zh: 探索深度人工神经网络的鲁棒架构
abstract: The architectures of deep artificial neural networks (DANNs) are routinely studied to improve their predictive performance. However, the relationship between the architecture of a DANN and its robustness to noise and adversarial attacks is less explored. We investigate how the robustness of DANNs relates to their underlying graph architectures or structures. This study: (1) starts by exploring the design space of architectures of DANNs using graph-theoretic robustness measures; (2) transforms the graphs to DANN architectures to train/validate/test on various image classification tasks; (3) explores the relationship between the robustness of trained DANNs against noise and adversarial attacks and the robustness of their underlying architectures estimated via graph-theoretic measures. We show that the topological entropy and Olivier-Ricci curvature of the underlying graphs can quantify the robustness performance of DANNs. The said relationship is stronger for complex tasks and large DANNs. Our work will allow autoML and neural architecture search community to explore design spaces of robust and accurate DANNs.
summary: The architectures of deep artificial neural networks (DANNs) are routinely studied to improve their predictive performance. However, the relationship between the architecture of a DANN and its robustness to noise and adversarial attacks is less explored. We investigate how the robustness of DANNs relates to their underlying graph architectures or structures. This study: (1) starts by exploring the design space of architectures of DANNs using graph-theoretic robustness measures; (2) transforms the graphs to DANN architectures to train/validate/test on various image classification tasks; (3) explores the relationship between the robustness of trained DANNs against noise and adversarial attacks and the robustness of their underlying architectures estimated via graph-theoretic measures. We show that the topological entropy and Olivier-Ricci curvature of the underlying graphs can quantify the robustness performance of DANNs. The said relationship is stronger for complex tasks and large DANNs. Our work will allow autoML and neural architecture search community to explore design spaces of robust and accurate DANNs.
abstract_zh: 人们经常研究深度人工神经网络 (DANN) 的架构，以提高其预测性能。然而，DANN 的架构与其对噪声和对抗性攻击的鲁棒性之间的关系却很少被探讨。我们研究 DANN 的稳健性与其底层图形架构或结构的关系。本研究：（1）首先使用图论鲁棒性度量探索 DANN 架构的设计空间； (2) 将图转换为 DANN 架构，以训练/验证/测试各种图像分类任务； (3) 探讨了经过训练的 DANN 对噪声和对抗性攻击的鲁棒性与其通过图论测量估计的底层架构的鲁棒性之间的关系。我们证明基础图的拓扑熵和 Olivier-Ricci 曲率可以量化 DANN 的鲁棒性性能。对于复杂任务和大型 DANN，这种关系更为牢固。我们的工作将使 autoML 和神经架构搜索社区能够探索稳健且准确的 DANN 的设计空间。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在研究深度人工神经网络（DANN）架构的鲁棒性，并探索其与图论鲁棒性指标之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注DANN的预测性能，而其架构与鲁棒性（抗噪声和对抗攻击）的关系研究不足，亟需探索以指导鲁棒架构设计。
AI.method: 基于图论鲁棒性指标（如拓扑熵、Olivier-Ricci曲率）分析DANN架构设计空间，通过图像分类任务验证架构鲁棒性，并建立其与图论指标的关联。
AI.result: 发现拓扑熵和Olivier-Ricci曲率可有效量化DANN鲁棒性，且该关联在复杂任务和大型网络中更为显著。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为自动机器学习（AutoML）和神经架构搜索提供了量化评估和优化鲁棒DANN架构的新方法。

search_text: Exploring Robust Architectures for Deep Artificial Neural Networks 探索深度人工神经网络的鲁棒架构 The architectures of deep artificial neural networks (DANNs) are routinely studied to improve their predictive performance. However, the relationship between the architecture of a DANN and its robustness to noise and adversarial attacks is less explored. We investigate how the robustness of DANNs relates to their underlying graph architectures or structures. This study: (1) starts by exploring the design space of architectures of DANNs using graph-theoretic robustness measures; (2) transforms the graphs to DANN architectures to train/validate/test on various image classification tasks; (3) explores the relationship between the robustness of trained DANNs against noise and adversarial attacks and the robustness of their underlying architectures estimated via graph-theoretic measures. We show that the topological entropy and Olivier-Ricci curvature of the underlying graphs can quantify the robustness performance of DANNs. The said relationship is stronger for complex tasks and large DANNs. Our work will allow autoML and neural architecture search community to explore design spaces of robust and accurate DANNs. 人们经常研究深度人工神经网络 (DANN) 的架构，以提高其预测性能。然而，DANN 的架构与其对噪声和对抗性攻击的鲁棒性之间的关系却很少被探讨。我们研究 DANN 的稳健性与其底层图形架构或结构的关系。本研究：（1）首先使用图论鲁棒性度量探索 DANN 架构的设计空间； (2) 将图转换为 DANN 架构，以训练/验证/测试各种图像分类任务； (3) 探讨了经过训练的 DANN 对噪声和对抗性攻击的鲁棒性与其通过图论测量估计的底层架构的鲁棒性之间的关系。我们证明基础图的拓扑熵和 Olivier-Ricci 曲率可以量化 DANN 的鲁棒性性能。对于复杂任务和大型 DANN，这种关系更为牢固。我们的工作将使 autoML 和神经架构搜索社区能够探索稳健且准确的 DANN 的设计空间。 本文旨在研究深度人工神经网络（DANN）架构的鲁棒性，并探索其与图论鲁棒性指标之间的关系。 Asim Waqas,Ghulam Rasool,Hamza Farooq,Nidhal C. Bouaynaya cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Wen Zhiyuan,Cao Jiannong,Yang Ruosong,Liu Shuaiqi,Shen Jiaxing
title: Automatically Select Emotion for Response via Personality-affected Emotion Transition
title_zh: 通过受人格影响的情绪转变自动选择情绪进行反应
abstract: To provide consistent emotional interaction with users, dialog systems should be capable to automatically select appropriate emotions for responses like humans. However, most existing works focus on rendering specified emotions in responses or empathetically respond to the emotion of users, yet the individual difference in emotion expression is overlooked. This may lead to inconsistent emotional expressions and disinterest users. To tackle this issue, we propose to equip the dialog system with personality and enable it to automatically select emotions in responses by simulating the emotion transition of humans in conversation. In detail, the emotion of the dialog system is transitioned from its preceding emotion in context. The transition is triggered by the preceding dialog context and affected by the specified personality trait. To achieve this, we first model the emotion transition in the dialog system as the variation between the preceding emotion and the response emotion in the Valence-Arousal-Dominance (VAD) emotion space. Then, we design neural networks to encode the preceding dialog context and the specified personality traits to compose the variation. Finally, the emotion for response is selected from the sum of the preceding emotion and the variation. We construct a dialog dataset with emotion and personality labels and conduct emotion prediction tasks for evaluation. Experimental results validate the effectiveness of the personality-affected emotion transition.
summary: To provide consistent emotional interaction with users, dialog systems should be capable to automatically select appropriate emotions for responses like humans. However, most existing works focus on rendering specified emotions in responses or empathetically respond to the emotion of users, yet the individual difference in emotion expression is overlooked. This may lead to inconsistent emotional expressions and disinterest users. To tackle this issue, we propose to equip the dialog system with personality and enable it to automatically select emotions in responses by simulating the emotion transition of humans in conversation. In detail, the emotion of the dialog system is transitioned from its preceding emotion in context. The transition is triggered by the preceding dialog context and affected by the specified personality trait. To achieve this, we first model the emotion transition in the dialog system as the variation between the preceding emotion and the response emotion in the Valence-Arousal-Dominance (VAD) emotion space. Then, we design neural networks to encode the preceding dialog context and the specified personality traits to compose the variation. Finally, the emotion for response is selected from the sum of the preceding emotion and the variation. We construct a dialog dataset with emotion and personality labels and conduct emotion prediction tasks for evaluation. Experimental results validate the effectiveness of the personality-affected emotion transition.
abstract_zh: 为了与用户提供一致的情感交互，对话系统应该能够像人类一样自动选择适当的情感进行响应。然而，现有的大多数作品侧重于在响应中呈现特定的情绪或对用户的情绪进行共情反应，而忽略了情绪表达的个体差异。这可能会导致情绪表达不一致并使用户不感兴趣。为了解决这个问题，我们建议为对话系统配备个性，使其能够通过模拟人类在对话中的情绪转变来自动选择响应中的情绪。具体来说，对话系统的情感是从上下文中的先前情感转变而来的。该转换由前面的对话上下文触发，并受指定的性格特征影响。为了实现这一点，我们首先将对话系统中的情绪转变建模为效价-唤醒-主导（VAD）情绪空间中先前情绪和响应情绪之间的变化。然后，我们设计神经网络来编码前面的对话上下文和指定的个性特征来组成变体。最后，从先前的情绪和变化的总和中选择要响应的情绪。我们构建了一个带有情感和个性标签的对话数据集，并进行情感预测任务进行评估。实验结果验证了人格影响情绪转变的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人格特征的情绪转换模型，使对话系统能自动选择符合用户个性的回应情绪。
AI.motivation: 现有对话系统忽视个体情绪表达差异，导致情感交互不一致且缺乏用户兴趣。
AI.method: 在VAD情绪空间建模情绪转换，设计神经网络编码对话上下文与人格特质，通过前序情绪与变化量的叠加选择回应情绪。
AI.result: 构建带情绪与人格标签的数据集，实验验证了人格影响情绪转换方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过模拟人类情绪转换机制，提升了对话系统的情感连贯性与用户兴趣。

title: Bounded rationality for relaxing best response and mutual consistency: The Quantal Hierarchy model of decision-making
title_zh: 放宽最佳响应和相互一致性的有限理性：决策的量子层次模型
abstract: While game theory has been transformative for decision-making, the assumptions made can be overly restrictive in certain instances. In this work, we investigate some of the underlying assumptions of rationality, such as mutual consistency and best response, and consider ways to relax these assumptions using concepts from level-$k$ reasoning and quantal response equilibrium (QRE) respectively. Specifically, we propose an information-theoretic two-parameter model called the Quantal Hierarchy model, which can relax both mutual consistency and best response while still approximating level-$k$, QRE, or typical Nash equilibrium behaviour in the limiting cases. The model is based on a recursive form of the variational free energy principle, representing higher-order reasoning as (pseudo) sequential decision-making in extensive-form game tree. This representation enables us to treat simultaneous games in a similar manner to sequential games, where reasoning resources deplete throughout the game-tree. Bounds in player processing abilities are captured as information costs, where future branches of reasoning are discounted, implying a hierarchy of players where lower-level players have fewer processing resources. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the Quantal Hierarchy model in several canonical economic games, {both simultaneous and sequential}, using out-of-sample modelling.
summary: While game theory has been transformative for decision-making, the assumptions made can be overly restrictive in certain instances. In this work, we investigate some of the underlying assumptions of rationality, such as mutual consistency and best response, and consider ways to relax these assumptions using concepts from level-$k$ reasoning and quantal response equilibrium (QRE) respectively. Specifically, we propose an information-theoretic two-parameter model called the Quantal Hierarchy model, which can relax both mutual consistency and best response while still approximating level-$k$, QRE, or typical Nash equilibrium behaviour in the limiting cases. The model is based on a recursive form of the variational free energy principle, representing higher-order reasoning as (pseudo) sequential decision-making in extensive-form game tree. This representation enables us to treat simultaneous games in a similar manner to sequential games, where reasoning resources deplete throughout the game-tree. Bounds in player processing abilities are captured as information costs, where future branches of reasoning are discounted, implying a hierarchy of players where lower-level players have fewer processing resources. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the Quantal Hierarchy model in several canonical economic games, {both simultaneous and sequential}, using out-of-sample modelling.
abstract_zh: 虽然博弈论对决策产生了变革，但在某些情况下所做的假设可能过于严格。在这项工作中，我们研究了一些合理性的基本假设，例如相互一致性和最佳响应，并考虑分别使用来自 level-$k$ 推理和量子响应均衡 (QRE) 的概念来放松这些假设。具体来说，我们提出了一种称为量子层次模型的信息论双参数模型，它可以放松相互一致性和最佳响应，同时在极限情况下仍然逼近 level-$k$、QRE 或典型的纳什均衡行为。该模型基于变分自由能原理的递归形式，将高阶推理表示为扩展形式博弈树中的（伪）顺序决策。这种表示使我们能够以与顺序游戏类似的方式处理同时游戏，其中推理资源在整个游戏树中耗尽。玩家处理能力的界限被捕获为信息成本，其中未来的推理分支被打折扣，这意味着玩家的层次结构，其中较低级别的玩家拥有较少的处理资源。我们使用样本外建模证明了量子层次模型在几种典型经济博弈（同时和顺序）中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为量化分层模型的信息论双参数模型，用于放松博弈论中互一致性和最佳反应的严格假设，同时近似层级-k、量化响应均衡或典型纳什均衡行为。
AI.motivation: 传统博弈论假设存在过于严格的问题，例如互一致性与最佳反应。本文旨在通过层级-k推理和量化响应均衡的概念，构建更灵活的决策模型以反映有限理性。
AI.method: 基于变分自由能原理的递归形式，将高阶推理表示为扩展形式博弈树中的伪序列决策，通过信息成本量化玩家处理能力限制，统一处理同时博弈与序贯博弈。
AI.result: 在多个经典经济博弈中验证了量化分层模型的有效性，包括同时博弈和序贯博弈的样本外建模表现。
AI.conclusion: 量化分层模型为有限理性决策提供了灵活框架，能够近似不同均衡概念，并通过信息成本刻画玩家推理层级差异。
