search_text: Bounded rationality for relaxing best response and mutual consistency: The Quantal Hierarchy model of decision-making 放宽最佳响应和相互一致性的有限理性：决策的量子层次模型 While game theory has been transformative for decision-making, the assumptions made can be overly restrictive in certain instances. In this work, we investigate some of the underlying assumptions of rationality, such as mutual consistency and best response, and consider ways to relax these assumptions using concepts from level-$k$ reasoning and quantal response equilibrium (QRE) respectively. Specifically, we propose an information-theoretic two-parameter model called the Quantal Hierarchy model, which can relax both mutual consistency and best response while still approximating level-$k$, QRE, or typical Nash equilibrium behaviour in the limiting cases. The model is based on a recursive form of the variational free energy principle, representing higher-order reasoning as (pseudo) sequential decision-making in extensive-form game tree. This representation enables us to treat simultaneous games in a similar manner to sequential games, where reasoning resources deplete throughout the game-tree. Bounds in player processing abilities are captured as information costs, where future branches of reasoning are discounted, implying a hierarchy of players where lower-level players have fewer processing resources. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the Quantal Hierarchy model in several canonical economic games, {both simultaneous and sequential}, using out-of-sample modelling. 虽然博弈论对决策产生了变革，但在某些情况下所做的假设可能过于严格。在这项工作中，我们研究了一些合理性的基本假设，例如相互一致性和最佳响应，并考虑分别使用来自 level-$k$ 推理和量子响应均衡 (QRE) 的概念来放松这些假设。具体来说，我们提出了一种称为量子层次模型的信息论双参数模型，它可以放松相互一致性和最佳响应，同时在极限情况下仍然逼近 level-$k$、QRE 或典型的纳什均衡行为。该模型基于变分自由能原理的递归形式，将高阶推理表示为扩展形式博弈树中的（伪）顺序决策。这种表示使我们能够以与顺序游戏类似的方式处理同时游戏，其中推理资源在整个游戏树中耗尽。玩家处理能力的界限被捕获为信息成本，其中未来的推理分支被打折扣，这意味着玩家的层次结构，其中较低级别的玩家拥有较少的处理资源。我们使用样本外建模证明了量子层次模型在几种典型经济博弈（同时和顺序）中的有效性。 本文提出一种名为量化分层模型的信息论双参数模型，用于放松博弈论中互一致性和最佳反应的严格假设，同时近似层级-k、量化响应均衡或典型纳什均衡行为。 Benjamin Patrick Evans,Mikhail Prokopenko cs.GT,cs.AI,cs.IT,econ.GN

title: Dual Aspect Self-Attention based on Transformer for Remaining Useful Life Prediction
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的双方面自注意力剩余使用寿命预测
abstract: Remaining useful life prediction (RUL) is one of the key technologies of condition-based maintenance, which is important to maintain the reliability and safety of industrial equipments. Massive industrial measurement data has effectively improved the performance of the data-driven based RUL prediction method. While deep learning has achieved great success in RUL prediction, existing methods have difficulties in processing long sequences and extracting information from the sensor and time step aspects. In this paper, we propose Dual Aspect Self-attention based on Transformer (DAST), a novel deep RUL prediction method, which is an encoder-decoder structure purely based on self-attention without any RNN/CNN module. DAST consists of two encoders, which work in parallel to simultaneously extract features of different sensors and time steps. Solely based on self-attention, the DAST encoders are more effective in processing long data sequences, and are capable of adaptively learning to focus on more important parts of input. Moreover, the parallel feature extraction design avoids mutual influence of information from two aspects. Experiments on two widely used turbofan engines datasets show that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art RUL prediction methods.
summary: Remaining useful life prediction (RUL) is one of the key technologies of condition-based maintenance, which is important to maintain the reliability and safety of industrial equipments. Massive industrial measurement data has effectively improved the performance of the data-driven based RUL prediction method. While deep learning has achieved great success in RUL prediction, existing methods have difficulties in processing long sequences and extracting information from the sensor and time step aspects. In this paper, we propose Dual Aspect Self-attention based on Transformer (DAST), a novel deep RUL prediction method, which is an encoder-decoder structure purely based on self-attention without any RNN/CNN module. DAST consists of two encoders, which work in parallel to simultaneously extract features of different sensors and time steps. Solely based on self-attention, the DAST encoders are more effective in processing long data sequences, and are capable of adaptively learning to focus on more important parts of input. Moreover, the parallel feature extraction design avoids mutual influence of information from two aspects. Experiments on two widely used turbofan engines datasets show that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art RUL prediction methods.
abstract_zh: 剩余使用寿命预测（RUL）是状态检修的关键技术之一，对于维护工业设备的可靠性和安全性具有重要意义。海量的工业测量数据有效提高了基于数据驱动的RUL预测方法的性能。虽然深度学习在 RUL 预测方面取得了巨大成功，但现有方法在处理长序列以及从传感器和时间步方面提取信息方面存在困难。在本文中，我们提出了基于 Transformer 的双方面自注意力（DAST），这是一种新颖的深度 RUL 预测方法，它是一种纯粹基于自注意力的编码器-解码器结构，没有任何 RNN/CNN 模块。 DAST 由两个编码器组成，它们并行工作以同时提取不同传感器和时间步长的特征。仅基于自注意力，DAST 编码器在处理长数据序列时更有效，并且能够自适应学习以关注输入中更重要的部分。而且，并行特征提取设计避免了两个方面信息的相互影响。对两个广泛使用的涡轮风扇发动机数据集的实验表明，我们的方法明显优于最先进的 RUL 预测方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的双方面自注意力机制（DAST），用于工业设备剩余使用寿命（RUL）预测，以解决现有方法在处理长序列和多维度特征提取上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在RUL预测中难以有效处理长序列数据，并且难以同时从传感器和时间步两个维度提取信息，导致预测性能受限。
AI.method: DAST采用纯自注意力机制的编码器-解码器结构，包含两个并行编码器，分别从传感器维度和时间步维度提取特征，避免信息相互干扰，提升长序列处理能力。
AI.result: 在两个广泛使用的涡轮风扇发动机数据集上，DAST显著优于当前最先进的RUL预测方法。
AI.conclusion: DAST通过双方面自注意力机制有效解决了长序列处理和多维度特征提取难题，验证了其在RUL预测任务中的优越性。

In this paper, we propose Dual Aspect Self-attention based on Transformer (DAST), a novel deep RUL prediction method, which is an encoder-decoder structure purely based on self-attention without any RNN/CNN module. Moreover, the parallel feature extraction design avoids mutual influence of information from two aspects. authors_text: Tharindu Fernando,Sridha Sridharan,Simon Denman,Houman Ghaemmaghami,Clinton Fookes
title: Robust and Interpretable Temporal Convolution Network for Event Detection in Lung Sound Recordings
title_zh: 用于肺部录音事件检测的鲁棒且可解释的时间卷积网络
abstract: This paper proposes a novel framework for lung sound event detection, segmenting continuous lung sound recordings into discrete events and performing recognition on each event. Exploiting the lightweight nature of Temporal Convolution Networks (TCNs) and their superior results compared to their recurrent counterparts, we propose a lightweight, yet robust, and completely interpretable framework for lung sound event detection. We propose the use of a multi-branch TCN architecture and exploit a novel fusion strategy to combine the resultant features from these branches. This not only allows the network to retain the most salient information across different temporal granularities and disregards irrelevant information, but also allows our network to process recordings of arbitrary length. Results: The proposed method is evaluated on multiple public and in-house benchmarks of irregular and noisy recordings of the respiratory auscultation process for the identification of numerous auscultation events including inhalation, exhalation, crackles, wheeze, stridor, and rhonchi. We exceed the state-of-the-art results in all evaluations. Furthermore, we empirically analyse the effect of the proposed multi-branch TCN architecture and the feature fusion strategy and provide quantitative and qualitative evaluations to illustrate their efficiency. Moreover, we provide an end-to-end model interpretation pipeline that interprets the operations of all the components of the proposed framework. Our analysis of different feature fusion strategies shows that the proposed feature concatenation method leads to better suppression of non-informative features, which drastically reduces the classifier overhead resulting in a robust lightweight network.The lightweight nature of our model allows it to be deployed in end-user devices such as smartphones, and it has the ability to generate predictions in real-time.
summary: This paper proposes a novel framework for lung sound event detection, segmenting continuous lung sound recordings into discrete events and performing recognition on each event. Exploiting the lightweight nature of Temporal Convolution Networks (TCNs) and their superior results compared to their recurrent counterparts, we propose a lightweight, yet robust, and completely interpretable framework for lung sound event detection. We propose the use of a multi-branch TCN architecture and exploit a novel fusion strategy to combine the resultant features from these branches. This not only allows the network to retain the most salient information across different temporal granularities and disregards irrelevant information, but also allows our network to process recordings of arbitrary length. Results: The proposed method is evaluated on multiple public and in-house benchmarks of irregular and noisy recordings of the respiratory auscultation process for the identification of numerous auscultation events including inhalation, exhalation, crackles, wheeze, stridor, and rhonchi. We exceed the state-of-the-art results in all evaluations. Furthermore, we empirically analyse the effect of the proposed multi-branch TCN architecture and the feature fusion strategy and provide quantitative and qualitative evaluations to illustrate their efficiency. Moreover, we provide an end-to-end model interpretation pipeline that interprets the operations of all the components of the proposed framework. Our analysis of different feature fusion strategies shows that the proposed feature concatenation method leads to better suppression of non-informative features, which drastically reduces the classifier overhead resulting in a robust lightweight network.The lightweight nature of our model allows it to be deployed in end-user devices such as smartphones, and it has the ability to generate predictions in real-time.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于肺音事件检测的新颖框架，将连续肺音记录分割成离散事件并对每个事件进行识别。利用时间卷积网络（TCN）的轻量级特性及其与循环网络相比的优越结果，我们提出了一种轻量级、稳健且完全可解释的肺音事件检测框架。我们建议使用多分支 TCN 架构，并利用一种新颖的融合策略来组合这些分支的结果特征。这不仅允许网络在不同的时间粒度上保留最显着的信息并忽略不相关的信息，而且还允许我们的网络处理任意长度的记录。结果：所提出的方法在呼吸听诊过程的不规则和嘈杂记录的多个公共和内部基准上进行了评估，以识别大量听诊事件，包括吸气、呼气、爆裂音、喘息、喘鸣和干啰音。我们在所有评估中都超过了最先进的结果。此外，我们还实证分析了所提出的多分支 TCN 架构和特征融合策略的效果，并提供定量和定性评估来说明其效率。此外，我们提供了一个端到端的模型解释管道，可以解释所提出框架的所有组件的操作。我们对不同特征融合策略的分析表明，所提出的特征串联方法可以更好地抑制非信息特征，从而大大减少分类器开销，从而形成强大的轻量级网络。我们模型的轻量级性质使其可以部署在智能手机等终端用户设备中，并且具有实时生成预测的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于肺部声音事件检测的鲁棒且可解释的时序卷积网络框架，将连续肺部声音记录分割为离散事件并进行识别。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理肺部声音事件检测时存在模型复杂度高、可解释性差及难以处理任意长度录音的问题，需开发轻量级且高效的解决方案以实现实时部署。
AI.method: 采用多分支时序卷积网络（TCN）架构，结合新颖的特征融合策略，通过多粒度时序信息提取与非相关信息抑制，实现任意长度录音的事件检测与轻量化部署。
AI.result: 在多个公开及内部基准数据集上超越现有最佳方法，实验验证多分支架构与特征拼接策略有效提升模型鲁棒性，轻量模型可部署于智能手机实现实时预测。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多分支TCN框架通过特征融合与轻量化设计，在肺部声音事件检测任务中实现了高精度、强可解释性与实时部署能力，为临床辅助诊断提供有效工具。

search_text: Robust and Interpretable Temporal Convolution Network for Event Detection in Lung Sound Recordings 用于肺部录音事件检测的鲁棒且可解释的时间卷积网络 This paper proposes a novel framework for lung sound event detection, segmenting continuous lung sound recordings into discrete events and performing recognition on each event. Exploiting the lightweight nature of Temporal Convolution Networks (TCNs) and their superior results compared to their recurrent counterparts, we propose a lightweight, yet robust, and completely interpretable framework for lung sound event detection. We propose the use of a multi-branch TCN architecture and exploit a novel fusion strategy to combine the resultant features from these branches. This not only allows the network to retain the most salient information across different temporal granularities and disregards irrelevant information, but also allows our network to process recordings of arbitrary length. Results: The proposed method is evaluated on multiple public and in-house benchmarks of irregular and noisy recordings of the respiratory auscultation process for the identification of numerous auscultation events including inhalation, exhalation, crackles, wheeze, stridor, and rhonchi. We exceed the state-of-the-art results in all evaluations. Furthermore, we empirically analyse the effect of the proposed multi-branch TCN architecture and the feature fusion strategy and provide quantitative and qualitative evaluations to illustrate their efficiency. Moreover, we provide an end-to-end model interpretation pipeline that interprets the operations of all the components of the proposed framework. Our analysis of different feature fusion strategies shows that the proposed feature concatenation method leads to better suppression of non-informative features, which drastically reduces the classifier overhead resulting in a robust lightweight network.The lightweight nature of our model allows it to be deployed in end-user devices such as smartphones, and it has the ability to generate predictions in real-time. 本文提出了一种用于肺音事件检测的新颖框架，将连续肺音记录分割成离散事件并对每个事件进行识别。利用时间卷积网络（TCN）的轻量级特性及其与循环网络相比的优越结果，我们提出了一种轻量级、稳健且完全可解释的肺音事件检测框架。我们建议使用多分支 TCN 架构，并利用一种新颖的融合策略来组合这些分支的结果特征。这不仅允许网络在不同的时间粒度上保留最显着的信息并忽略不相关的信息，而且还允许我们的网络处理任意长度的记录。结果：所提出的方法在呼吸听诊过程的不规则和嘈杂记录的多个公共和内部基准上进行了评估，以识别大量听诊事件，包括吸气、呼气、爆裂音、喘息、喘鸣和干啰音。我们在所有评估中都超过了最先进的结果。此外，我们还实证分析了所提出的多分支 TCN 架构和特征融合策略的效果，并提供定量和定性评估来说明其效率。此外，我们提供了一个端到端的模型解释管道，可以解释所提出框架的所有组件的操作。我们对不同特征融合策略的分析表明，所提出的特征串联方法可以更好地抑制非信息特征，从而大大减少分类器开销，从而形成强大的轻量级网络。我们模型的轻量级性质使其可以部署在智能手机等终端用户设备中，并且具有实时生成预测的能力。 本文提出一种用于肺部声音事件检测的鲁棒且可解释的时序卷积网络框架，将连续肺部声音记录分割为离散事件并进行识别。 Tharindu Fernando,Sridha Sridharan,Simon Denman,Houman Ghaemmaghami,Clinton Fookes cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

title: The Evolution of Out-of-Distribution Robustness Throughout Fine-Tuning
title_zh: 微调期间分布外鲁棒性的演变
abstract: Although machine learning models typically experience a drop in performance on out-of-distribution data, accuracies on in- versus out-of-distribution data are widely observed to follow a single linear trend when evaluated across a testbed of models. Models that are more accurate on the out-of-distribution data relative to this baseline exhibit "effective robustness" and are exceedingly rare. Identifying such models, and understanding their properties, is key to improving out-of-distribution performance. We conduct a thorough empirical investigation of effective robustness during fine-tuning and surprisingly find that models pre-trained on larger datasets exhibit effective robustness during training that vanishes at convergence. We study how properties of the data influence effective robustness, and we show that it increases with the larger size, more diversity, and higher example difficulty of the dataset. We also find that models that display effective robustness are able to correctly classify 10% of the examples that no other current testbed model gets correct. Finally, we discuss several strategies for scaling effective robustness to the high-accuracy regime to improve the out-of-distribution accuracy of state-of-the-art models.
summary: Although machine learning models typically experience a drop in performance on out-of-distribution data, accuracies on in- versus out-of-distribution data are widely observed to follow a single linear trend when evaluated across a testbed of models. Models that are more accurate on the out-of-distribution data relative to this baseline exhibit "effective robustness" and are exceedingly rare. Identifying such models, and understanding their properties, is key to improving out-of-distribution performance. We conduct a thorough empirical investigation of effective robustness during fine-tuning and surprisingly find that models pre-trained on larger datasets exhibit effective robustness during training that vanishes at convergence. We study how properties of the data influence effective robustness, and we show that it increases with the larger size, more diversity, and higher example difficulty of the dataset. We also find that models that display effective robustness are able to correctly classify 10% of the examples that no other current testbed model gets correct. Finally, we discuss several strategies for scaling effective robustness to the high-accuracy regime to improve the out-of-distribution accuracy of state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 尽管机器学习模型在分布外数据上的性能通常会下降，但在模型测试台上进行评估时，广泛观察到分布内数据与分布外数据的准确性遵循单一线性趋势。相对于该基线在分布外数据上更准确的模型表现出“有效的鲁棒性”，并且非常罕见。识别此类模型并了解其属性是提高分布外性能的关键。我们对微调过程中的有效鲁棒性进行了彻底的实证研究，令人惊讶地发现，在较大数据集上预训练的模型在训练过程中表现出有效的鲁棒性，但在收敛时消失。我们研究了数据的属性如何影响有效的鲁棒性，并且我们发现它随着数据集的规模越大、多样性越高、示例难度越高而增加。我们还发现，表现出有效鲁棒性的模型能够正确分类 10% 的示例，而其他当前测试床模型无法正确分类。最后，我们讨论了几种将有效鲁棒性扩展到高精度体系的策略，以提高最先进模型的分布外精度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了微调过程中预训练模型的分布外鲁棒性变化及其影响因素，分析了数据集特性对有效鲁棒性的作用。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器学习模型在分布外数据上表现下降，但现有模型的分布内与分布外准确率呈现单一线性趋势，具备有效鲁棒性的模型极为稀少，亟需探索其形成机制以提升分布外性能。
AI.method: 通过大规模实验分析微调过程中有效鲁棒性的动态变化，研究数据集规模、多样性及样本难度对鲁棒性的影响，并对比不同模型的分类能力。
AI.result: 发现大预训练数据集可提升有效鲁棒性，但该特性在收敛时消失；具备有效鲁棒性的模型能正确分类其他模型无法处理的10%样本。
AI.conclusion: 通过扩展有效鲁棒性的规模化策略，可提升前沿模型的分布外准确率，为鲁棒性优化提供新方向。

We conduct a thorough empirical investigation of effective robustness during fine-tuning and surprisingly find that models pre-trained on larger datasets exhibit effective robustness during training that vanishes at convergence. We study how properties of the data influence effective robustness, and we show that it increases with the larger size, more diversity, and higher example difficulty of the dataset. authors_text: Juan Tapia,Enrique Lopez Droguett,Andres Valenzuela,Daniel Benalcazar,Leonardo Causa,Christoph Busch
title: Semantic Segmentation of Periocular Near-Infra-Red Eye Images Under Alcohol Effects
title_zh: 酒精作用下眼周近红外图像的语义分割
abstract: This paper proposes a new framework to detect, segment, and estimate the localization of the eyes from a periocular Near-Infra-Red iris image under alcohol consumption. The purpose of the system is to measure the fitness for duty. Fitness systems allow us to determine whether a person is physically or psychologically able to perform their tasks. Our framework is based on an object detector trained from scratch to detect both eyes from a single image. Then, two efficient networks were used for semantic segmentation; a Criss-Cross attention network and DenseNet10, with only 122,514 and 210,732 parameters, respectively. These networks can find the pupil, iris, and sclera. In the end, the binary output eye mask is used for pupil and iris diameter estimation with high precision. Five state-of-the-art algorithms were used for this purpose. A mixed proposal reached the best results. A second contribution is establishing an alcohol behavior curve to detect the alcohol presence utilizing a stream of images captured from an iris instance. Also, a manually labeled database with more than 20k images was created. Our best method obtains a mean Intersection-over-Union of 94.54% with DenseNet10 with only 210,732 parameters and an error of only 1-pixel on average.
summary: This paper proposes a new framework to detect, segment, and estimate the localization of the eyes from a periocular Near-Infra-Red iris image under alcohol consumption. The purpose of the system is to measure the fitness for duty. Fitness systems allow us to determine whether a person is physically or psychologically able to perform their tasks. Our framework is based on an object detector trained from scratch to detect both eyes from a single image. Then, two efficient networks were used for semantic segmentation; a Criss-Cross attention network and DenseNet10, with only 122,514 and 210,732 parameters, respectively. These networks can find the pupil, iris, and sclera. In the end, the binary output eye mask is used for pupil and iris diameter estimation with high precision. Five state-of-the-art algorithms were used for this purpose. A mixed proposal reached the best results. A second contribution is establishing an alcohol behavior curve to detect the alcohol presence utilizing a stream of images captured from an iris instance. Also, a manually labeled database with more than 20k images was created. Our best method obtains a mean Intersection-over-Union of 94.54% with DenseNet10 with only 210,732 parameters and an error of only 1-pixel on average.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的框架，用于在饮酒情况下从眼周近红外虹膜图像中检测、分割和估计眼睛的定位。该系统的目的是衡量是否适合工作。健身系统使我们能够确定一个人的身体或心理是否能够执行其任务。我们的框架基于从头开始训练的对象检测器，可以从单个图像中检测双眼。然后，使用两个高效的网络进行语义分割； Criss-Cross 注意力网络和 DenseNet10，分别只有 122,514 个和 210,732 个参数。这些网络可以找到瞳孔、虹膜和巩膜。最后，利用二进制输出眼罩进行高精度的瞳孔和虹膜直径估计。为此使用了五种最先进的算法。混合提案达到了最佳结果。第二个贡献是建立酒精行为曲线，利用从虹膜实例捕获的图像流来检测酒精的存在。此外，还创建了一个包含超过 20k 图像的手动标记数据库。我们的最佳方法在仅使用 210,732 个参数的 DenseNet10 中获得了 94.54% 的平均 Intersection-over-Union，平均误差仅为 1 个像素。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于近红外眼图像的语义分割框架，用于检测酒精影响下的眼部区域，以评估人员是否适合工作。
AI.motivation: 通过分析酒精对眼部特征的影响，建立评估人员工作能力的系统，确保安全关键岗位人员的生理和心理状态符合要求。
AI.method: 采用从零训练的对象检测器定位双眼，结合Criss-Cross注意力网络和DenseNet10进行语义分割，并利用五种先进算法估算瞳孔和虹膜直径，同时构建包含20k张标注图像的数据集。
AI.result: DenseNet10模型在仅21万参数下达到94.54%的平均交并比（mIoU），直径估算平均误差仅为1像素，酒精行为曲线检测效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效实现了酒精影响下的眼部特征分割与酒精检测，为工作能力评估提供了高效可靠的解决方案，并贡献了新的数据集。

ai_content_json.result: DenseNet10模型在仅21万参数下达到94.54%的平均交并比（mIoU），直径估算平均误差仅为1像素，酒精行为曲线检测效果显著。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该框架有效实现了酒精影响下的眼部特征分割与酒精检测，为工作能力评估提供了高效可靠的解决方案，并贡献了新的数据集。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于近红外眼图像的语义分割框架，用于检测酒精影响下的眼部区域，以评估人员是否适合工作。
motivation: 通过分析酒精对眼部特征的影响，建立评估人员工作能力的系统，确保安全关键岗位人员的生理和心理状态符合要求。

conclusion: 该框架有效实现了酒精影响下的眼部特征分割与酒精检测，为工作能力评估提供了高效可靠的解决方案，并贡献了新的数据集。
search_text: Semantic Segmentation of Periocular Near-Infra-Red Eye Images Under Alcohol Effects 酒精作用下眼周近红外图像的语义分割 This paper proposes a new framework to detect, segment, and estimate the localization of the eyes from a periocular Near-Infra-Red iris image under alcohol consumption. The purpose of the system is to measure the fitness for duty. Fitness systems allow us to determine whether a person is physically or psychologically able to perform their tasks. Our framework is based on an object detector trained from scratch to detect both eyes from a single image. Then, two efficient networks were used for semantic segmentation; a Criss-Cross attention network and DenseNet10, with only 122,514 and 210,732 parameters, respectively. These networks can find the pupil, iris, and sclera. In the end, the binary output eye mask is used for pupil and iris diameter estimation with high precision. Five state-of-the-art algorithms were used for this purpose. A mixed proposal reached the best results. A second contribution is establishing an alcohol behavior curve to detect the alcohol presence utilizing a stream of images captured from an iris instance. Also, a manually labeled database with more than 20k images was created. Our best method obtains a mean Intersection-over-Union of 94.54% with DenseNet10 with only 210,732 parameters and an error of only 1-pixel on average. 本文提出了一种新的框架，用于在饮酒情况下从眼周近红外虹膜图像中检测、分割和估计眼睛的定位。该系统的目的是衡量是否适合工作。健身系统使我们能够确定一个人的身体或心理是否能够执行其任务。我们的框架基于从头开始训练的对象检测器，可以从单个图像中检测双眼。然后，使用两个高效的网络进行语义分割； Criss-Cross 注意力网络和 DenseNet10，分别只有 122,514 个和 210,732 个参数。这些网络可以找到瞳孔、虹膜和巩膜。最后，利用二进制输出眼罩进行高精度的瞳孔和虹膜直径估计。为此使用了五种最先进的算法。混合提案达到了最佳结果。第二个贡献是建立酒精行为曲线，利用从虹膜实例捕获的图像流来检测酒精的存在。此外，还创建了一个包含超过 20k 图像的手动标记数据库。我们的最佳方法在仅使用 210,732 个参数的 DenseNet10 中获得了 94.54% 的平均 Intersection-over-Union，平均误差仅为 1 个像素。 本文提出一种基于近红外眼图像的语义分割框架，用于检测酒精影响下的眼部区域，以评估人员是否适合工作。 Juan Tapia,Enrique Lopez Droguett,Andres Valenzuela,Daniel Benalcazar,Leonardo Causa,Christoph Busch cs.CV

authors_text: Hanbin Zhao,Xin Qin,Shihao Su,Yongjian Fu,Zibo Lin,Xi Li
title: When Video Classification Meets Incremental Classes
title_zh: 当视频分类遇到增量类
abstract: With the rapid development of social media, tremendous videos with new classes are generated daily, which raise an urgent demand for video classification methods that can continuously update new classes while maintaining the knowledge of old videos with limited storage and computing resources. In this paper, we summarize this task as Class-Incremental Video Classification (CIVC) and propose a novel framework to address it. As a subarea of incremental learning tasks, the challenge of catastrophic forgetting is unavoidable in CIVC. To better alleviate it, we utilize some characteristics of videos. First, we decompose the spatio-temporal knowledge before distillation rather than treating it as a whole in the knowledge transfer process; trajectory is also used to refine the decomposition. Second, we propose a dual granularity exemplar selection method to select and store representative video instances of old classes and key-frames inside videos under a tight storage budget. We benchmark our method and previous SOTA class-incremental learning methods on Something-Something V2 and Kinetics datasets, and our method outperforms previous methods significantly.
summary: With the rapid development of social media, tremendous videos with new classes are generated daily, which raise an urgent demand for video classification methods that can continuously update new classes while maintaining the knowledge of old videos with limited storage and computing resources. In this paper, we summarize this task as Class-Incremental Video Classification (CIVC) and propose a novel framework to address it. As a subarea of incremental learning tasks, the challenge of catastrophic forgetting is unavoidable in CIVC. To better alleviate it, we utilize some characteristics of videos. First, we decompose the spatio-temporal knowledge before distillation rather than treating it as a whole in the knowledge transfer process; trajectory is also used to refine the decomposition. Second, we propose a dual granularity exemplar selection method to select and store representative video instances of old classes and key-frames inside videos under a tight storage budget. We benchmark our method and previous SOTA class-incremental learning methods on Something-Something V2 and Kinetics datasets, and our method outperforms previous methods significantly.
abstract_zh: 随着社交媒体的快速发展，每天都会产生大量新类别的视频，这对视频分类方法提出了迫切的需求，该方法能够在有限的存储和计算资源下不断更新新类别，同时保持旧视频的知识。在本文中，我们将此任务总结为类增量视频分类（CIVC），并提出了一个新的框架来解决它。作为增量学习任务的一个子领域，灾难性遗忘的挑战在 CIVC 中是不可避免的。为了更好地缓解它，我们利用了视频的一些特性。首先，我们在蒸馏之前对时空知识进行分解，而不是在知识转移过程中将其视为一个整体；轨迹也用于细化分解。其次，我们提出了一种双粒度样本选择方法，用于在存储预算紧张的情况下选择和存储旧类的代表性视频实例和视频内的关键帧。我们在 Something-Something V2 和 Kinetics 数据集上对我们的方法和之前的 SOTA 类增量学习方法进行了基准测试，我们的方法显着优于之前的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种解决类增量视频分类中灾难性遗忘问题的新框架
AI.motivation: 社交媒体产生大量新类别视频，需要在有限资源下持续更新分类模型并保留旧知识
AI.method: 分解时空知识并利用轨迹优化，结合双粒度示例选择方法在有限存储下保留旧类代表性样本
AI.result: 在Something-Something V2和Kinetics数据集上显著优于现有SOTA方法
AI.conclusion: 提出有效框架缓解灾难性遗忘，为增量视频分类提供新思路

authors_text: Yuma Koizumi,Shigeki Karita,Scott Wisdom,Hakan Erdogan,John R. Hershey,Llion Jones,Michiel Bacchiani
title: DF-Conformer: Integrated architecture of Conv-TasNet and Conformer using linear complexity self-attention for speech enhancement
title_zh: DF-Conformer：Conv-TasNet 和 Conformer 的集成架构，使用线性复杂度自注意力进行语音增强
abstract: Single-channel speech enhancement (SE) is an important task in speech processing. A widely used framework combines an analysis/synthesis filterbank with a mask prediction network, such as the Conv-TasNet architecture. In such systems, the denoising performance and computational efficiency are mainly affected by the structure of the mask prediction network. In this study, we aim to improve the sequential modeling ability of Conv-TasNet architectures by integrating Conformer layers into a new mask prediction network. To make the model computationally feasible, we extend the Conformer using linear complexity attention and stacked 1-D dilated depthwise convolution layers. We trained the model on 3,396 hours of noisy speech data, and show that (i) the use of linear complexity attention avoids high computational complexity, and (ii) our model achieves higher scale-invariant signal-to-noise ratio than the improved time-dilated convolution network (TDCN++), an extended version of Conv-TasNet.
summary: Single-channel speech enhancement (SE) is an important task in speech processing. A widely used framework combines an analysis/synthesis filterbank with a mask prediction network, such as the Conv-TasNet architecture. In such systems, the denoising performance and computational efficiency are mainly affected by the structure of the mask prediction network. In this study, we aim to improve the sequential modeling ability of Conv-TasNet architectures by integrating Conformer layers into a new mask prediction network. To make the model computationally feasible, we extend the Conformer using linear complexity attention and stacked 1-D dilated depthwise convolution layers. We trained the model on 3,396 hours of noisy speech data, and show that (i) the use of linear complexity attention avoids high computational complexity, and (ii) our model achieves higher scale-invariant signal-to-noise ratio than the improved time-dilated convolution network (TDCN++), an extended version of Conv-TasNet.
abstract_zh: 单通道语音增强（SE）是语音处理中的一项重要任务。广泛使用的框架将分析/合成滤波器组与掩模预测网络相结合，例如 Conv-TasNet 架构。在此类系统中，去噪性能和计算效率主要受掩模预测网络结构的影响。在本研究中，我们的目标是通过将 Conformer 层集成到新的掩模预测网络中来提高 Conv-TasNet 架构的顺序建模能力。为了使模型在计算上可行，我们使用线性复杂度注意力和堆叠一维扩张深度卷积层来扩展 Conformer。我们在 3,396 小时的噪声语音数据上训练模型，结果表明：(i) 使用线性复杂度注意力机制避免了高计算复杂度，(ii) 我们的模型比改进的时间扩张卷积网络 (TDCN++)（Conv-TasNet 的扩展版本）实现了更高的尺度不变信噪比。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DF-Conformer架构，结合Conv-TasNet与Conformer模型，利用线性复杂度自注意力机制提升语音增强效果。
AI.motivation: 传统Conv-TasNet架构的掩码预测网络在序列建模能力和计算效率上存在局限，需改进以兼顾性能与复杂度。
AI.method: 将Conformer层集成至掩码预测网络，采用线性复杂度自注意力机制与堆叠一维扩张深度卷积，降低计算量并增强时序建模能力。
AI.result: 在3,396小时噪声语音数据训练后，模型在保持低计算复杂度的同时，尺度不变信噪比优于改进型TDCN++模型。
AI.conclusion: DF-Conformer通过创新架构设计有效平衡了语音增强的计算效率与性能，为单通道降噪提供新方案。

title: Optimal Epidemic Control as a Contextual Combinatorial Bandit with Budget
title_zh: 作为具有预算的上下文组合强盗的最优流行病控制
comment: Proceeding of FUZZ-IEEE 2022. This work extends our prior work on real-world applications of budgeted bandits (e.g. arXiv:1906.09384), and aims to solve the critical problem of epidemic control. Codes at: https://github.com/doerlbh/BanditZoo
comments: Proceeding of FUZZ-IEEE 2022. This work extends our prior work on real-world applications of budgeted bandits (e.g. arXiv:1906.09384), and aims to solve the critical problem of epidemic control. Codes at: https://github.com/doerlbh/BanditZoo
abstract: In light of the COVID-19 pandemic, it is an open challenge and critical practical problem to find a optimal way to dynamically prescribe the best policies that balance both the governmental resources and epidemic control in different countries and regions. To solve this multi-dimensional tradeoff of exploitation and exploration, we formulate this technical challenge as a contextual combinatorial bandit problem that jointly optimizes a multi-criteria reward function. Given the historical daily cases in a region and the past intervention plans in place, the agent should generate useful intervention plans that policy makers can implement in real time to minimizing both the number of daily COVID-19 cases and the stringency of the recommended interventions. We prove this concept with simulations of multiple realistic policy making scenarios and demonstrate a clear advantage in providing a pareto optimal solution in the epidemic intervention problem.
summary: In light of the COVID-19 pandemic, it is an open challenge and critical practical problem to find a optimal way to dynamically prescribe the best policies that balance both the governmental resources and epidemic control in different countries and regions. To solve this multi-dimensional tradeoff of exploitation and exploration, we formulate this technical challenge as a contextual combinatorial bandit problem that jointly optimizes a multi-criteria reward function. Given the historical daily cases in a region and the past intervention plans in place, the agent should generate useful intervention plans that policy makers can implement in real time to minimizing both the number of daily COVID-19 cases and the stringency of the recommended interventions. We prove this concept with simulations of multiple realistic policy making scenarios and demonstrate a clear advantage in providing a pareto optimal solution in the epidemic intervention problem.
abstract_zh: 鉴于COVID-19大流行，找到一种最佳方式来动态制定最佳政策，平衡不同国家和地区的政府资源和疫情控制是一个公开的挑战和关键的实际问题。为了解决利用和探索的多维权衡，我们将这一技术挑战表述为联合优化多标准奖励函数的上下文组合强盗问题。鉴于一个地区的历史每日病例和过去制定的干预计划，代理应制定有用的干预计划，政策制定者可以实时实施该计划，以最大程度地减少每日 COVID-19 病例数和建议干预措施的严格性。我们通过模拟多种现实政策制定场景来证明这一概念，并展示了在流行病干预问题中提供帕累托最优解的明显优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合预算约束的上下文组合老虎机框架，用于解决疫情控制中多目标优化问题，平衡病例减少与干预强度。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情暴露出动态制定兼顾资源限制与疫情控制效果的政策的迫切需求，传统方法难以有效处理多准则决策的探索与利用权衡。
AI.method: 将疫情干预建模为上下文组合老虎机问题，通过历史数据和干预记录生成实时策略，在多准则奖励函数下联合优化干预方案。
AI.result: 模拟实验显示该方法在多个现实场景中能提供帕累托最优解，显著优于基准方法，在病例控制与干预强度间取得更好平衡。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效解决了疫情干预的多目标优化难题，为政策制定者提供了兼顾防控效果与资源消耗的动态决策工具。

search_text: Optimal Epidemic Control as a Contextual Combinatorial Bandit with Budget 作为具有预算的上下文组合强盗的最优流行病控制 In light of the COVID-19 pandemic, it is an open challenge and critical practical problem to find a optimal way to dynamically prescribe the best policies that balance both the governmental resources and epidemic control in different countries and regions. To solve this multi-dimensional tradeoff of exploitation and exploration, we formulate this technical challenge as a contextual combinatorial bandit problem that jointly optimizes a multi-criteria reward function. Given the historical daily cases in a region and the past intervention plans in place, the agent should generate useful intervention plans that policy makers can implement in real time to minimizing both the number of daily COVID-19 cases and the stringency of the recommended interventions. We prove this concept with simulations of multiple realistic policy making scenarios and demonstrate a clear advantage in providing a pareto optimal solution in the epidemic intervention problem. 鉴于COVID-19大流行，找到一种最佳方式来动态制定最佳政策，平衡不同国家和地区的政府资源和疫情控制是一个公开的挑战和关键的实际问题。为了解决利用和探索的多维权衡，我们将这一技术挑战表述为联合优化多标准奖励函数的上下文组合强盗问题。鉴于一个地区的历史每日病例和过去制定的干预计划，代理应制定有用的干预计划，政策制定者可以实时实施该计划，以最大程度地减少每日 COVID-19 病例数和建议干预措施的严格性。我们通过模拟多种现实政策制定场景来证明这一概念，并展示了在流行病干预问题中提供帕累托最优解的明显优势。 本文提出一种结合预算约束的上下文组合老虎机框架，用于解决疫情控制中多目标优化问题，平衡病例减少与干预强度。 Baihan Lin,Djallel Bouneffouf cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

title: CityNet: A Comprehensive Multi-Modal Urban Dataset for Advanced Research in Urban Computing
title_zh: CityNet：用于城市计算高级研究的综合多模式城市数据集
abstract: Data-driven approaches have emerged as a popular tool for addressing challenges in urban computing. However, current research efforts have primarily focused on limited data sources, which fail to capture the complexity of urban data arising from multiple entities and their interconnections. Therefore, a comprehensive and multifaceted dataset is required to enable more extensive studies in urban computing. In this paper, we present CityNet, a multi-modal urban dataset that incorporates various data, including taxi trajectory, traffic speed, point of interest (POI), road network, wind, rain, temperature, and more, from seven cities. We categorize this comprehensive data into three streams: mobility data, geographical data, and meteorological data. We begin by detailing the generation process and basic properties of CityNet. Additionally, we conduct extensive data mining and machine learning experiments, including spatio-temporal predictions, transfer learning, and reinforcement learning, to facilitate the use of CityNet. Our experimental results provide benchmarks for various tasks and methods, and also reveal internal correlations among cities and tasks within CityNet that can be leveraged to improve spatiotemporal forecasting performance. Based on our benchmarking results and the correlations uncovered, we believe that CityNet can significantly contribute to the field of urban computing by enabling research on advanced topics.
summary: Data-driven approaches have emerged as a popular tool for addressing challenges in urban computing. However, current research efforts have primarily focused on limited data sources, which fail to capture the complexity of urban data arising from multiple entities and their interconnections. Therefore, a comprehensive and multifaceted dataset is required to enable more extensive studies in urban computing. In this paper, we present CityNet, a multi-modal urban dataset that incorporates various data, including taxi trajectory, traffic speed, point of interest (POI), road network, wind, rain, temperature, and more, from seven cities. We categorize this comprehensive data into three streams: mobility data, geographical data, and meteorological data. We begin by detailing the generation process and basic properties of CityNet. Additionally, we conduct extensive data mining and machine learning experiments, including spatio-temporal predictions, transfer learning, and reinforcement learning, to facilitate the use of CityNet. Our experimental results provide benchmarks for various tasks and methods, and also reveal internal correlations among cities and tasks within CityNet that can be leveraged to improve spatiotemporal forecasting performance. Based on our benchmarking results and the correlations uncovered, we believe that CityNet can significantly contribute to the field of urban computing by enabling research on advanced topics.
abstract_zh: 数据驱动的方法已成为解决城市计算挑战的流行工具。然而，当前的研究工作主要集中在有限的数据源上，无法捕捉由多个实体及其互连产生的城市数据的复杂性。因此，需要一个全面且多方面的数据集，以便能够对城市计算进行更广泛的研究。在本文中，我们提出了 CityNet，这是一个多模式城市数据集，其中包含来自七个城市的各种数据，包括出租车轨迹、交通速度、兴趣点 (POI)、道路网络、风、雨、温度等。我们将这些综合数据分为三个流：移动数据、地理数据和气象数据。我们首先详细介绍 CityNet 的生成过程和基本属性。此外，我们还进行了广泛的数据挖掘和机器学习实验，包括时空预测、迁移学习和强化学习，以促进 CityNet 的使用。我们的实验结果为各种任务和方法提供了基准，并揭示了 CityNet 中城市和任务之间的内部相关性，可用于提高时空预测性能。根据我们的基准测试结果和发现的相关性，我们相信 CityNet 可以通过支持高级主题的研究为城市计算领域做出重大贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CityNet，一个包含多种城市数据的多模态数据集，用于推动城市计算领域的研究。
AI.motivation: 现有城市计算研究依赖有限的数据源，无法全面反映城市数据的复杂性和多实体关联性，需构建更全面的数据集以支持深入研究。
AI.method: 整合七城市多源数据（如出租车轨迹、天气、POI等），分为移动性、地理和气象三类数据流，并通过时空预测、迁移学习等方法验证数据集有效性。
AI.result: 建立多个任务基准，揭示城市间及任务间的内在关联，为时空预测性能提升提供参考。
AI.conclusion: CityNet通过多模态数据和实验基准，为城市计算领域高级研究（如跨城迁移、强化学习）提供重要支持。
